subject: Can you take a minute?

| | | Peter, it’s Rick Scott.

_**"Let's put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate."** \- U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley_

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor.

**Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters’ eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. **His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.**

**Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate.** If you don’t want to read to the end of this note, please make sure you click this link to donate to help Navy Seal Tim Sheehy WIN and FLIP the Senate RED before you close out your browser.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[rush $5 or whatever you can towards our critical fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74942939/443102360/67630301?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.00.00_B1_Underdog_30op_RS&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjgyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGNkMmQzMy1iOTk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bm0yac6PWUYwVCT_0qqhUzlqSn2AnQ4c6Ss0P1hhlas=)** But first, I want to reflect on how far we’ve come since last year: Back then, I was a first-time candidate running against a rising MAGA star in a notorious swing district. To say pundits underestimated me would be the understatement of the year. They wished me luck but said I didn’t stand a chance. In the run up to Election Day, I was being outspent 8 to 1, pummeled with attack ads, and lagging behind in poll after poll. But with the help of this grassroots team, we defied everyone’s expectations and managed to close the gap. **We lost by just 1,600 votes.** _Our race was the third closest House race in the country – and political pundits are already predicting this cycle could be just as close._ In fact, _The Cook Political Report_ is calling our opponent among the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election. This team knows how to overcome the odds. Flipping this battleground district is going to take significant resources. That starts with meeting fundraising goals. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Tuberville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
As we look for ways to award back pay to military officers whose promotions and raises were held up for nine months, I’ve got one suggestion.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1848%2E4032634%2ENIRoCu)
---
After nine months of jeopardizing national security and treating military families like political footballs, Tommy Tuberville finally ended his one-man blockade on military promotions and pay raises for hundreds of service members. As a reminder, Tuberville refused to approve more than 400 military promotions to protest an unrelated policy to help service members and their families access needed health care — specifically, to travel to access abortion care. This blockade imposed serious consequences, including:
* Leaving our national security at risk, and not just for the past nine months: This hold likely did permanent damage to our military in terms of retention and recruitment — and hurt the United States’ standing in the world.
* Leaving hundreds of military families — who have sacrificed so much — in limbo: without formal assignments, they couldn’t make decisions about moving or enrolling their kids at new schools.
* Leaving critical positions unfilled: We didn’t have a Chief of Staff of the Army or a Commandant of the Marine Corps or a Chief of Naval Operations because Tuberville wouldn’t let us confirm them. And he held up the confirmation of the Chair of the Joint Chiefs of Staff.

As we look for ways to award back pay to military officers whose promotions and raises were held up for nine months, I’ve got one suggestion: This back pay should be coming out of Tuberville's bank account. Also, Tuberville is still stopping eleven 4-star military leaders from assuming their duties right now. I will stay on this until every single hold ends. Now, you may be wondering: how could one senator block all these nominees? Well, you know how the Senate has to confirm federal judges, ambassadors, cabinet members, and other top presidential nominees? The Senate also has to approve thousands of military promotions every year. Typically, those votes are just formalities. But Tuberville took advantage of Senate procedural rules to hold all of them up. And for months, Senate Republicans enabled this out-of-control obstruction. Here’s the way I see it: we cannot, cannot, cannot allow this tactic to become another tool the Senate GOP uses to create more chaos in our government. Republicans have already shown that they’re willing to leave a Supreme Court seat vacant if there’s a Democrat in the White House. Republicans have already wielded the filibuster to block Democratic Senate majorities from passing bills that vast majorities of Americans support. Republicans have already weaponized the debt ceiling to extract policy demands that they otherwise wouldn’t have enough votes to pass. It can’t become similarly routine for service members and their families to be used as pawns. Also, make no mistake: it’s no surprise that abortion rights are the underlying issue here. The American people support reproductive freedom, and Republican extremists know it, so they look for ways to enact their agenda without going through the ballot box. I will stay on this until every single hold ends. I’ll keep fighting to overcome any escalation of the GOP’s obstruction. I’ll keep working to get things done for the American people. I’ll keep pushing back as they try to rip away even more reproductive freedoms. And I’m always grateful to have your support. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

---

Peter,

As the father of a young daughter, I can’t wait to watch her play her first sports and join her first team.

I want to make sure that as she grows up, if she wants to pursue athletics, the playing field and the locker room are _always_ safe spaces for her.

**That’s why I’m standing with leaders like Riley Gaines to protect women's sports from biological men.**

Riley has faced hate, and threats, and even _been held hostage_ for her courage protecting sports for the next generation of women.

_Her bravery has not gone unnoticed._

Now, we need YOU to join us to stand up for our daughters, granddaughters, sisters, and friends.

**[Will you sign our petition today to BAN biological men from women's sports?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=630179d5ba2643f9bd221bb6631c8f7e&_e=YZAWK8iRwcld_zSs1nQ7uJCCbZMsOX9xV0A2dEioQYkcldygXNaIAFBa8s6OnUYTZLJQmnGpg3O1UHKhD-g6V-7a3ldITDWm-6--dKl5qjLUfUvEVEzlBXfLNKlYIFDx7bfblGYjTxWqOhxrpESfUOzWRLlACbwRouscW6NtIzbXy4EMASEv5DEzQJP0i-NUaUY0wfo1O95-tVcNXjSNYzF0SOIsisW75gm4TJUu8LH7QEqGlRlAyPAO5izZzyzaIF142BHpssOTmRFjPZElXhQCYy-69kdOWZUgh32hNbVhK6-bW1wilcutq2Ee-Rj4nteTBDEim4zs_C-AwHeGODuFIKohA24KZgb7yKqOZmw0JpjAiKaDIH2GmU7_L6qm)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Our contribution limit is higher than in any other Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34554%2E3422442%2E9Btvw4)
Derek, did you know that the individual contribution limit for our race is $13,200?
**That’s double the contribution limit for Senate races everywhere else in the country.**
I’m very proud *not* to rely on these big checks, in fact 99% of our contributions are of $100 or less. But these high contribution limits are putting us at a disadvantage. More on why and how below, [**but if you’re short on time and able to help us close the gap—you can click here to give $5.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231210-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAO23_1_CON_2023MMDD_V1_F&refcode2=34554_3422442_9Btvw4&akid=34554%2E3422442%2E9Btvw4)
**_Here’s why contribution limits doubled:_**
After Senator Feinstein passed away in the fall, Governor Newsom appointed Senator Laphonza Butler to serve out the remainder of Feinstein’s term. But Newsom also called a special election, allowing California voters to choose who will serve our state beginning November 2024. So the special election will elect someone who serves from November 2024 through January 2025, while the regular election will elect someone to serve a normal six year term that begins in January.
**These two elections will take place on the SAME ballot.** It does not mean I need to reach the same voters twice, but it means my opponent has the opportunity to hit up the same, wealthy donors again. **Politico analysis shows he has 10x the high dollar donors that we do—equating to a multi-million dollar gap in our fundraising.**
I know that our team has what it takes to narrow the gap and do more with less. Instead of courting one person with the ability to give $13,200, I’m sending this email. **[Can we collectively raise $13,200 through this email?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231210-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_CON_2023MMDD_V1_F&refcode2=34554_3422442_9Btvw4&akid=34554%2E3422442%2E9Btvw4)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231210-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_CON_2023MMDD_V1_F&refcode2=34554_3422442_9Btvw4&akid=34554%2E3422442%2E9Btvw4)
Thank you so much for anything you can give to help us reach our goal.
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_CON_2023MMDD_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34554_3422442_9Btvw4&akid=34554%2E3422442%2E9Btvw4)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=34554%2E3422442%2E9Btvw4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=34554%2E3422442%2E9Btvw4)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr. surges in the polls
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This is a crucial moment in our campaign.

|
---
| | | **This is a crucial moment in our campaign.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraise_video_email_1r_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Authentic change in politics comes from just one place – the collective will of the people. Today, we invite you to step into a movement that is reshaping the political landscape.
As RFK Jr. surges in the polls, he needs your support to cross a major threshold: inclusion on the ballot next November. “Your support” means you personally, because we are aspiring to 100% participation.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRY0vlZPDYmnNnFtCCf1wfHw&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraise_video_email_1r_1_nd&n=2)
This is a crucial moment in our campaign.
Unlike the two party candidates, an independent must gather signatures in every state to get on the ballot. Now more than ever, your contribution holds the key to transforming mere hope into actual change. We don’t have the corporate dollars. That’s why we need you to support our 50-state all-out effort.
We understand that not everyone can contribute the same amount. Like the diverse offerings in a church collection basket, every donation, regardless of size, builds solidarity. It says, “We take this mission seriously.” [Even $5 signals the strength of our movement.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraise_video_email_1r_1_nd&n=3)
[As we strive for 100% participation, any amount you can give helps our grassroots efforts to put RFK Jr. on the ballot. Stand with us, be part of the movement, and help restore our democracy.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraise_video_email_1r_1_nd&n=4)
[DONATE NOW >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraise_video_email_1r_1_nd&n=5)
Thank you for your generous support. We WILL make a difference.
Team Kennedy

clean_body: This is a crucial moment in our campaign. | | | | This is a crucial moment in our campaign. | Dear Peter, Authentic change in politics comes from just one place – the collective will of the people. Today, we invite you to step into a movement that is reshaping the political landscape. As RFK Jr. surges in the polls, he needs your support to cross a major threshold: inclusion on the ballot next November. “Your support” means you personally, because we are aspiring to 100% participation. This is a crucial moment in our campaign. Unlike the two party candidates, an independent must gather signatures in every state to get on the ballot. Now more than ever, your contribution holds the key to transforming mere hope into actual change. We don’t have the corporate dollars. That’s why we need you to support our 50-state all-out effort. We understand that not everyone can contribute the same amount. Like the diverse offerings in a church collection basket, every donation, regardless of size, builds solidarity. It says, “We take this mission seriously.” Thank you for your generous support. We WILL make a difference. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. **[Do you think Liz Cheney should run for President as a Republican?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president?source=FFR_20231210_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20494%2E4449941%2EBcyXHD)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president?source=FFR_20231210_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20494%2E4449941%2EBcyXHD) | **[YES, I DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president?source=FFR_20231210_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20494%2E4449941%2EBcyXHD)**

* * *
We don’t need to remind you how much is at stake next year.

Election experts predict that Cheney could even garner enough support from moderate Republicans to challenge Trump for the Republican nomination!

So we’re monitoring the situation closely and conducting an urgent poll to gauge local support for a Liz Cheney presidential run. **Complete your poll below:**
**[Do you think Liz Cheney should run for President as a Republican?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president?source=FFR_20231210_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=20494%2E4449941%2EBcyXHD)**
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president?source=FFR_20231210_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=14&akid=20494%2E4449941%2EBcyXHD)
**[YES, I DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president?source=FFR_20231210_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=15&akid=20494%2E4449941%2EBcyXHD)**
---
**[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president?source=FFR_20231210_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=16&akid=20494%2E4449941%2EBcyXHD)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president?source=FFR_20231210_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=17&akid=20494%2E4449941%2EBcyXHD)**
We look forward to reading your responses,

Fight for Reform

Fellow American, I'm coming to you as one of the most respected Patriots in your city.

December is the last chance we have this year to showcase our Party's strength heading into 2024. But I'll be honest with you, Fellow American. This is a notoriously difficult fundraising month, _and I 'm afraid we're already pacing behind our target goal._

Missing this goal could seriously complicate our efforts to take back the White House. If we come up short, we may not be able to stop Biden from securing another four-year term.

That's why I'm coming to you with an urgent personal request. **[My team tells me that we need just 76 patriots like you step up with a small contribution of $5 or $10 by our mid-month fundraising deadline, we'll get back on track to hitting our December fundraising target.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f7910141b19e4bfe9f6e913b8841a5da&_e=y9SKEm3FkOvL5Nk8XbijMz9PG1c41ktRy6kWt9mlkKiJXnec23_l5qCVm_qLP8zP4XoY4d7GpvC2QT6rIqijDbaGP2BkP_Kpwb-zNwfzQ7yXg6awTrAQgIndu3F0GvC4pgEsUkoRKkeQO1IdkYWDM0-HasPcEUlEIzNlK3IKRIC44xjo6rcql8WrM9xo91AHybF08py8uowZ2hnEmTfDiYHLBsbsegsc6t7_7dG0fyNNHuozDU49SBm3NXZllzJ_ng66MY3k5HKt3bZVgWMU0A9hB61uPVvDzmPb5CTXyYRJub9-MLI_5UohlZPbGZJi1vppR3iGsXm7o8d85iADaScveCU_GEHFmHWkz53eHEfI1TUGiqkZEZyQfWm6HNIcLmq2nPs_MKpHXkcuXo7NWGBAs7wDh6rqrPv4o0SxHKSrKcxl8pmoGnRGw5Bka1iBdraVs2LBwH07OIfHnu7uTIdptJ7yzUjZ1N49pRRGAqc%3D)**

**SUPPORTER: YOU

clean_body: We need your help to keep up. Fellow American, I'm coming to you as one of the most respected Patriots in your city. December is the last chance we have this year to showcase our Party's strength heading into 2024. But I'll be honest with you, Fellow American. This is a notoriously difficult fundraising month, and I 'm afraid we're already pacing behind our target goal. Missing this goal could seriously complicate our efforts to take back the White House. If we come up short, we may not be able to stop Biden from securing another four-year term. That's why I'm coming to you with an urgent personal request. The Republican Party is powered by grassroots Patriots like YOU, Fellow American. Thank you and God bless, Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman, Republican National Committee

name: Adam Schiff
subject: On the ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4714%2E5257348%2EAezyV3 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I have exciting news,
Derek:

I just filed my paperwork and will be on the ballot to be California’s
next United States Senator.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=4714%2E5257348%2EAezyV3 ]Now that it’s official, I could really use your help to give our
campaign the boost we need in the homestretch. Can you chip in
$3 or any
amount that feels right to you today?

This is a deeply exciting moment — and I am honored to be running for the
seat that the late Senator Dianne Feinstein once occupied. She was a
trailblazer, a mentor, and a dear friend.

I’m thinking of her today, as I run for U.S. Senate to continue her work
to ban assault weapons, protect the environment, champion reproductive
freedom, and make California a better place for us all. Here she is when I
first announced my campaign for Congress, many years ago:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4714%2E5257348%2EAezyV3 ]Adam Schiff during his first congressional campaign at an event with
Sen. Feinstein

Appearing on the ballot for the United States Senate is a culmination of
all of our hard work,
Derek. Our work to protect our
democracy, to make our economy work for every Californian, and to build
more affordable housing.

This campaign is about all of us — our strong, growing grassroots movement
to attack inflation and bring down the cost of living, to create
good-paying new jobs, and to protect our planet. To make a difference. To
see and feel real progress.

With less than three months to go in this campaign, I’m fired up and
excited to meet even more Californians across our great state.

We have limited time to reach voters and turn them out to the polls, and I
need your help to make it across the finish line.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4714%2E5257348%2EAezyV3 ]Derek, I’m
running this campaign the way it should be – by not taking a dime of
corporate PAC money. Help our campaign today by pitching in
$3 or any
amount so we can take this movement to the U.S. Senate.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231210_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=4714%2E5257348%2EAezyV3 ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

$10

Thank you very much for your support. My name would not be on the ballot

— Adam

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate I have exciting news, Derek: I just filed my paperwork and will be on the ballot to be California’s next United States Senator. [ ]Now that it’s official, I could really use your help to give our campaign the boost we need in the homestretch. Can you chip in $3 or any amount that feels right to you today? This is a deeply exciting moment — and I am honored to be running for the seat that the late Senator Dianne Feinstein once occupied. She was a trailblazer, a mentor, and a dear friend. I’m thinking of her today, as I run for U.S. Senate to continue her work to ban assault weapons, protect the environment, champion reproductive freedom, and make California a better place for us all. Here she is when I first announced my campaign for Congress, many years ago: [ ]Adam Schiff during his first congressional campaign at an event with Sen. Feinstein Appearing on the ballot for the United States Senate is a culmination of all of our hard work, Derek. Our work to protect our democracy, to make our economy work for every Californian, and to build more affordable housing. This campaign is about all of us — our strong, growing grassroots movement to attack inflation and bring down the cost of living, to create good-paying new jobs, and to protect our planet. To make a difference. To see and feel real progress. With less than three months to go in this campaign, I’m fired up and excited to meet even more Californians across our great state. We have limited time to reach voters and turn them out to the polls, and I need your help to make it across the finish line. [ ]Derek, I’m running this campaign the way it should be – by not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Help our campaign today by pitching in $3 or any amount so we can take this movement to the U.S. Senate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you very much for your support. My name would not be on the ballot without your help. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: American Update
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W2VocOIhD0eCxZ1FLZjsWA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686367%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U7rHtW%2bwf%2beDUOQAzCm9SA&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686368%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9DzgaB23OlCVP2xpP%2bZF6w&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xOfWOwoo4%2fs3IpCk8jg3lQ&sysid=1)
---

name: American Briefing
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq84ptvip3brknuunauic9mvbpfuc4tsecnbtmto_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie4ob2clh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zumhkcgq3jduso2a1663bm8lu702qfdkdh3d1a5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie4ob2clh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuc0492q9s11uq81f3l1aptuot7ajbqkd8cqh70g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie4ob2clh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj21e8a3ltoo6mn5147qbrg8jeg55i7kr644tjh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie4ob2clh2bs)

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8kngto3hok70jec2olvc53c6brbjlc5oe5dk62g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie2oj6cph2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze20pvenucdssqmh1skj4rnt8mr0fkhdjvgadn0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie2oj6cph2bs)
---
|
---
| It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the fit for you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0cefu69m79upptbdreeeec151rcpel1qqrt0uc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie2oj6cph2bs)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn’t usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjs5vlh69lell6qhbdivjjhrebb67cva51b9f0fo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie2oj6cph2bs)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you’re interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That’s why SmartAsset created a [free tool](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh5qu531gijvk0mdl04thb7v95hpr287vftd5f1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie2oj6cph2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.
### [See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo2nsp3nabefolgicbsoshjsqkbl9es2smcpm22g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9ie2oj6cph2bs)
---
|

Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services. However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds. Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn’t usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models. Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. How to Speak With a Financial Advisor If you’re interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: let’s hit the ground running!
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

_We still have plenty of time to get ready for 2024, right?_

Well, no actually . . . Not if you’re talking about passing as many pro-life laws – and saving as many babies’ lives – as possible in the New Year!

_Students for Life Action_ has been hard at work in December preparing for upcoming state legislative sessions – **but with no less than 17 Lobby Days scheduled for the very First Day of session in each state,_I could really use your help!_**

That’s right.

**17!**

This just may be the biggest state lobbying blitz EVER in the history of the pro-life movement.

And _Students for Life Action_ – with our massive network of students – is the only national pro-life organization who would even try it.

With our very first Lobby Day coming FAST (on January 2nd), **[would you please make your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $75, or $50 to _Students for Life Action_ to help our students start off the New Year with a BANG](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-stuujit-duchtdja-y/)?**

Your generosity will help us fund travel costs, meals, and materials for our students attending these **_CRUCIAL**_ Lobby Days coming up in just a few short weeks.

_And if you can make it to any of them, I hope you’ll try!_

We want as big of a turnout as possible to show legislators and the press we mean business!

Our mission for these **_HUGE**_ days will be to force our Senators and Representatives to acknowledge the cries of the preborn, to tell the **_TRUTH**_ about the violence of abortion, and save lives by passing pro-life laws – especially _Life at Conception_ and _Chemical Abortion Prevention Acts._

For example, _Students for Life Action_ is pulling out all the stops in:

***** South Carolina** – Where six “pro-life” state senators struck down the _Life at Conception Act_ last spring. State Senator Tom Davis and others are continuing to side with the Abortion Lobby, demanding loopholes on abortion you can drive a semi-truck through! _Students for Life Action_ is returning to the Palmetto State to demand that they finish the job by passing the _Life at Conception Act_ and ending abortion.

***** Nebraska** – As you may know, State Senator Merv Riepe (R-NE) was personally responsible for preventing the passage of the _Heartbeat Abortion Prevention Act,_ which would've prohibited abortion when a fetal heartbeat is detected. _Students for Life Action_ is continuing to pressure the Nebraska Unicameral Legislature to pass this law to save thousands of babies and demand Senator Riepe resign.

***** Kansas** – _Students for Life Action_ is working to pass SB 286 in 2024 which would protect life starting at conception. One of our students captains, Cheyenne Vaneventer, worked to introduce this bill last spring. We are working with Cheyenne to bring SB 286, which is a combination of our _Life at Conception_ and _End Chemical Abortion Acts,_ to a vote this spring.
Of course, I could go on and on!

I'll spare you the details, but we're also going to be in all of the following states for their first day of session as well!

| Ohio | Florida | Pennsylvania
---|---|---
Kentucky | Georgia | Oklahoma
New Hampshire | Indiana | Wyoming
Iowa | West Virginia | North Carolina
Idaho | Virginia

By pushing strong pro-life bills from DAY ONE, you and I can put the Abortion Lobby on the defensive.

**[>> Chip in to help _Students for Life Action_ fund these critical Lobby Days << ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-stuujit-duchtdja-j/)**
**Our students are planning on spending an entire day at several state capitals, so any help you could give would be much appreciated!**

Not only that, but _Students for Life Action_ is keeping the momentum going through 2024 with massive door-knocking campaigns across the country in February and March.

This could not be more important as this will be the most aggressive pro-life effort known to stop these Abortion Lobby puppets.

Our **Lobby Days** will be crucial to the future of pro-life legislation, because it doesn’t just put the pro-life movement on our elected officials’ radar, __it puts us right in their faces_!_

**[So, would you prayerfully consider a gift of $250, $100, $75, or $50 to _Students for Life Action_ to help us cover the costs of these Lobby Days](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-stuujit-duchtdja-i/)?**

**[Even a gift of $25 or $10 will help us with transportation costs, action materials, and meals for our volunteers traveling from all over the country](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-stuujit-duchtdja-d/).**

With the generous support of good folks like you, I know our **Lobby Days** are sure to have a big impact.

Thank you for everything you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. – Starting when state legislatures go back into session in January, _Students for Life Action_ will be hosting Lobby Days in 17 state capitals!

No one has ever been this aggressive before!

But after looking at our expenses on paper, I’ll need your help if we want to put the pressure we need to on these pro-abortion politicians.

**[So, could you please make your most generous contribution to help our student leaders and volunteers cover the cost of gas money, activism materials, or even lunch for the day](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-stuujit-duchtdja-h/)?**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-stuujit-026154D2-duchtdja-k) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-stuujit-duchtdja-u/)

**

**

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7c9cd23e3223480de411ec25fc35a5bf6ea6b41cf2ea8b789a7ca941d3c5316587d95ed3422e63b14e2200e67290851c97722284def13518d00c5417c377974a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7c9cd23e3223480de411ec25fc35a5bf6ea6b41cf2ea8b789a7ca941d3c5316587d95ed3422e63b14e2200e67290851c97722284def13518d00c5417c377974a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
What Foreign Policy?
| | | |
---
# Foreign Policy? What Foreign Policy?
By Rex Weddle, Volunteer, Robertson for Congress
---
Over three years in office, Democrats have created nothing but chaos with U.S. foreign policy. Look at the world scene. Is it better or worse since a feckless Biden took over? Dina Titus supports all of his failed policies, such as:
* Afghanistan: Upon assuming office, Biden instantly "withdrew" from Afghanistan, with all the finesse and strategic planning of a delinquent tenant fleeing a landlord in the middle of the night, except with tragic results.
* Ukraine: Russia, encouraged by our Afghan folly, quickly ignored international law. Using a page out of Nazi Germany's playbook, it invaded a sovereign Ukraine with impunity and gave the West a festering war, now going on for two years.
* Israel and the Middle East: Biden and his Congressional minions resurrected Obama's Middle East "leading from behind" foreign policy, which proved disastrous at every turn ten years ago. As soon as Joe got in, he withdrew Iran's sanctions and gave billions in aid and concessions to it and other sworn Middle East enemy countries. Result? That money financed a war of brutal terrorism against Israel.
* China: After Joe and his wayward son made friends with China, its threats against Taiwan escalated. China has infiltrated our universities and businesses, stealing trade secrets and intellectual property. Unchecked, China is the source of Mexican cartels' fentanyl distribution in our country.
* National Security: Biden ensured our military branches are more concerned with woke conduct and their use of "correct" pronouns than first-class defense. His catastrophic open border policy helps undermine our economy and puts all Americans at risk.

Mark Robertson's International Credentials

* Active military duty in 10 foreign countries, including NATO assignments and combat tours in Afghanistan, Iraq, and Kuwait
* Policy-making positions in the Pentagon
* Faculty member of the National Defense University
* U.S. delegate to the Global Coalition against ISIS
* Leader in Joint International Military Exercises around the world

You must ask yourself: Is US foreign policy stronger or weaker than three years ago? Our enemies must fear us! We need Mark and people like him to restore our credibility. The times demand it.
---
******
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: Mark, what is your position on the war in Israel? -Q.P. A. I fully support Israel's right to defend itself and to eliminate terrorists' ability to threaten and attack Israelis. The events of October 7th revealed to the world the evil nature of Hamas. The Palestinians living in Gaza should take immediate action to remove this terrorist cancer that has burrowed itself beneath their communities. Freedom-loving Palestinians should assist the Israeli Defense Forces by pointing out the locations of the hidden terrorists. I feel compassion for the children in Gaza. It is time for their parents to stand up to Hamas, which has brought so much pain and sorrow to their family and community. As your Representative in Congress, I will support Israel and all of our allies in their fight for freedom, family, and prosperity.

clean_body: What Foreign Policy? | | | | Foreign Policy? What Foreign Policy? By Rex Weddle, Volunteer, Robertson for Congress Over three years in office, Democrats have created nothing but chaos with U.S. foreign policy. Look at the world scene. Is it better or worse since a feckless Biden took over? Dina Titus supports all of his failed policies, such as: Afghanistan: Upon assuming office, Biden instantly "withdrew" from Afghanistan, with all the finesse and strategic planning of a delinquent tenant fleeing a landlord in the middle of the night, except with tragic results. Ukraine: Russia, encouraged by our Afghan folly, quickly ignored international law. Using a page out of Nazi Germany's playbook, it invaded a sovereign Ukraine with impunity and gave the West a festering war, now going on for two years. Israel and the Middle East: Biden and his Congressional minions resurrected Obama's Middle East "leading from behind" foreign policy, which proved disastrous at every turn ten years ago. As soon as Joe got in, he withdrew Iran's sanctions and gave billions in aid and concessions to it and other sworn Middle East enemy countries. Result? That money financed a war of brutal terrorism against Israel. China: After Joe and his wayward son made friends with China, its threats against Taiwan escalated. China has infiltrated our universities and businesses, stealing trade secrets and intellectual property. Unchecked, China is the source of Mexican cartels' fentanyl distribution in our country. National Security: Biden ensured our military branches are more concerned with woke conduct and their use of "correct" pronouns than first-class defense. His catastrophic open border policy helps undermine our economy and puts all Americans at risk. Mark Robertson's International Credentials Active military duty in 10 foreign countries, including NATO assignments and combat tours in Afghanistan, Iraq, and Kuwait Policy-making positions in the Pentagon Faculty member of the National Defense University U.S. delegate to the Global Coalition against ISIS Leader in Joint International Military Exercises around the world You must ask yourself: Is US foreign policy stronger or weaker than three years ago? Our enemies must fear us! We need Mark and people like him to restore our credibility. The times demand it. Your Questions--Mark's Answers Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently: Q: Mark, what is your position on the war in Israel? -Q.P. A. I fully support Israel's right to defend itself and to eliminate terrorists' ability to threaten and attack Israelis. The events of October 7th revealed to the world the evil nature of Hamas. The Palestinians living in Gaza should take immediate action to remove this terrorist cancer that has burrowed itself beneath their communities. Freedom-loving Palestinians should assist the Israeli Defense Forces by pointing out the locations of the hidden terrorists. I feel compassion for the children in Gaza. It is time for their parents to stand up to Hamas, which has brought so much pain and sorrow to their family and community. As your Representative in Congress, I will support Israel and all of our allies in their fight for freedom, family, and prosperity. Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question. | == | == | == Mark Robertson retired from the Army. | | | | | Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. Blue Amp Action asked me to reach out with an important message. **Big news!! Last week, I was officially nominated as the Democratic nominee to take back the seat formerly held by George Santos!** Now, we have a special election on February 13, 2024. That is only 68 days from now!! This will be a tough special election. National Republican groups will spend millions against me. With your help and the help of a grassroots team **we can win NY-03.** [**Your help has never been more important!! So, Peter, I’m humbly asking for your support. Can you rush a split donation between me and Blue Amp Action right now to help win this pivotal special election in NY-03 and elect Democrats around the country?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T244d5b0b-0dce-4c45-84a9-a1315f115fea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)****

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Call to Action
body:
Peter,

I recently visited Long Island to support Congressman Anthony D'Esposito at a fundraiser at The General in Eisenhower Park.

I'm reaching out to you, Anthony's committed supporters, to express my gratitude and to stress the importance of your continued support in a race that the Democrats highly target.

Help Anthony win. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson]

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson] Anthony's background is impressive and diverse. As a former NYPD detective with over 600 arrests, a Hempstead Town Councilman, and a dedicated firefighter, he has shown an unwavering commitment to public service and safety. These experiences uniquely position him to represent and address Long Island's challenges effectively. HELP ANTHONY WIN → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson]

The 2024 race for the CD3 seat is critical. Anthony's blend of law enforcement experience, local governance insight, and dedication to community service are precisely what we need in these competitive and challenging times.

Your support for Anthony is vital as we face a race that's a key focus for the Democrats.

Please continue supporting Anthony in any way you can. Whether through volunteering, spreading the word, or contributing to his campaign, every action makes a significant difference. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson]

CHIP IN $10 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson] CHIP IN $250 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?amount=250&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/speaker-johnson?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Call+To+Action+From+Speaker+Mike+Johnson]

Thank you for your steadfast support and dedication. Let's maintain our momentum and win significantly in the upcoming elections.

Sincerely,

Mike Johnson

Speaker of the House

Unsubscribe https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xjtajk-dytjdljkkt-t/

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Factory farms are wreaking havoc on animals, people, and the planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Help protect animals, people, and the planet from Big Ag’s abuses: Donate $27 and help us reach our $4,300 goal by midnight!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187727?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187728?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187729?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187730?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Hens crammed into tiny cages where they can’t spread their wings. Mother pigs kept in pens where they are barely able to move. The factory farming industry continues these awful practices in reckless pursuit of profit. Friend, Big Meat and Dairy don’t want you to know about these kinds of horrific abuses happening behind the scenes. [**Stop the expansion of this brutal industry and protect animals, people, and the planet: donate $27 today and help us reach our $4,300 goal before the clock strikes midnight!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187731?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Each moment from birth to slaughter, animals in factory farms are raised in filthy, cramped, and inhumane conditions. _**Many of them spend their entire lives without seeing the light of day or breathing fresh air.**_ What’s worse -- the mountains of pollution emitted from these operations poison the air and water of nearby communities, affecting their health and further driving the climate crisis.
Big Meat and Dairy companies are perpetuating this intolerable cruelty and climate disaster. Meanwhile, the USDA and EPA let them get away with it. The USDA actually supports some of the worst Big Meat and Dairy corporations with taxpayer-supported grants as well as government food purchases. **We cannot continue allowing the meat and dairy industry to inflict so much damage on animals, humans, and the planet.** That’s why Friends of the Earth is working so hard to stop government subsidies for this industry and put in place policies that will prevent mega meat corporations from destroying our only Earth and wreaking havoc on human health and animal welfare. **Will you stand with us, Friend?**
**Big corporations can't go on harming people, destroying our planet, and abusing animals. Donate $27 or more to help us reach our $4,300 goal today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187727?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187728?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187729?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187730?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Damage from factory farms extends past the animals they directly impact. Factory farms produce toxic pollutants that severely degrade the air and quality of life of the communities nearby -- _many of which are low-income, Black and brown communities._
In fact, mega-farms produce hundreds of **billions of pounds of manure per year.** When it seeps into the soil and reaches nearby water sources, it can pollute drinking water, kill fish, and render nearby waterways unsafe. Even more, the antibiotics in this waste can foster antibiotic-resistant bacteria that harm human health!
It doesn’t end there. Cramming genetically similar animals in overcrowded, dirty, inhumane, and stressful conditions makes the animals more susceptible to infection. That can result in _**a dangerously perfect breeding ground for diseases like swine flu and avian flu.**_ Yet, Big Meat continues to understate its environmental impacts, with almost no government oversight. And people are already paying the price.
Factory farming hurts the people employed in the industry, too. Farmers are trapped in exploitive contracts with massive corporations like Tyson Foods and JBS. And workers in meatpacking plants face dangerous working conditions -- from a lack of COVID protections to pressure to process meat at ever-faster speeds. That means higher likelihood of injuries like lacerations. **All in order to increase the companies’ profits.**
The entire business model of mega meat corporations is based on keeping their costs as low as possible through poor working conditions and unsustainable practices that drive us closer to climate catastrophe. And our government allows them to keep lining their pockets rather than protect the health of people, animals, and our planet. That’s why Friends of the Earth is working to stop government support for Big Meat companies and their horrendous factory farming practices.
**Mega meat corporations are harming animals, people, and the environment. Make your contribution of $27 or more today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187727?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187728?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187729?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187730?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Mega meat corporations continue to push the limits of how many animals they can pack into fewer farms. Between 1960 and 2002, the number of farms in the U.S. decreased by 50%. Meanwhile, the number of animals on these farms soared. And in 2020, _**1.6 billion animals were confined in just 25,000 factory farms.**_
We can’t allow greedy corporations like Big Meat and Dairy to continue wreaking havoc on communities and animals. Unless we challenge the hand-outs of public dollars and lax regulations that prop up factory farming, Big Meat corporations like Smithfield, Tyson, and JBS will never change their practices.
Friends of the Earth is working for a healthy, equitable, and sustainable food system that supports a just transition away from factory farms and protects our planet from Big Polluters. We’re taking the fight to Congress and the Biden administration, asking them to increase oversight and cut subsidies for factory farming. We are also pushing them to promote more plant-based meals in schools and use their $9 billion in food purchasing power for good -- to support diverse, smaller scale sustainable producers instead of big meat companies like Tyson Foods that routinely violate labor and environmental laws. Your membership support can help power our work and ensure a future for animals, people, and the planet.
These destructive, greedy practices must be stopped, Friend: for the sake of people, the planet, and animals. Until we rein in the power of Big Meat by changing policy and enacting stronger regulations, factory farms will continue to wreak havoc. **We must step up our efforts quickly before the damage becomes too great to reverse. Please, donate $27 or more before midnight tonight!**
**Factory farming is putting people and the planet at risk. Fight back for our planet by donating $27 and help us reach our $4,300 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187727?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187728?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187729?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2187730?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kari Hamerschlag
Deputy director of food and agriculture,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D277575&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

name: The Flyover
subject: Baseball’s $700 Million Player, ACLU Teams With NRA, and a Rare Betelgeuse Eclipse
body:
Negotiations to [free 50 of the hostages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DuunTAQANDVmG6Qbf4FRRq6lzYlGuwBT54_xPa96O4-Uurs4Oj8-tq_kD3H6ycGWuuZdjSV37QrDUqB7va-setJpKlraFWT1J3s5Swbt9I4nd20zFYNy6iGxZ7KDuMgl-mY7GCOhlctdae0UkpJ2at21ha1skZOhP1MWvSSLNeU29-JY3V0-k96U25NCo1fXa13Ed0PoTeht-d52jt5rmxSSy-hN8yVjSehtxT9BwLHlCEdpaLxVODwyXxzvIBLRvLgMGABS-jBpVLxogJ_sGKGO0BxxN8OQnIYAlk4OAIe9uUzuoAR0EN1GIXemrza-2HvuYyT6OUVkP0_cf1_4N8AAAD__6yPdWg) held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas.

## Penn President Resigns Over Testimony
University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill [resigned this weekend](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u6zAMRp_G3hSQlPyTwcNdsuWuHQ1Koh22shVYQoL06Yt07vjhwwEOzsd1vrIm3df_vMlUlzxzqPqQGckgGrKza-O0iJDYViYcgCw4GKG9TcBdwLBY9uyc-BB6gvOI0Xs3gA-21YmALBIiIoDD00iRCWOAQdiNQo0DiVrzcfrMutebLOmVH3KcQt7aNN1qvZfG_mvo0tCF77s8y_t6j6NqSNLQZZeneeXjy6xvcs-H4b1qkU2rls2EnJKsUoyWgyWZlb_ZsCCdXeyd89ZCF0KHMsaz9wN1NPR9e0zx_tSUtPRD42DdWNOvVP270U8AAAD__7-IaFY) in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. [Two mobile vans ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGzoyAURn8NdjhwIWgKim3ssu2WzlWukQ2CAxh2__2bvPp138zXnHP-POYH-uDj8zceZOuWZlyrf9MsgUvJQc26c3YjAlIdWTkIUEKLUXS7JX2_O1DjuJDU5mb0sDgz3IRRaBajts5bEKAkSCmlEFr2IzgE6VYxEOqRgGlBzteU-7_Jx7rTFv6nN-V-TUcX7F7rWZj6xWBiMLXW-i39i9TK52cwXYXBtGN-Y3a8NMwHOV7ztb744kNYEmZX-IrhI8jPTMU7ipV_xjPyhi_i10kx8g1DSFftsnVn8yH4YgamxfNAH75h6s9tvgIAAP__TQ5oUA)at Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said [House Rep. Elise Stefanik,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OpDAQBp_GZEZ2Yx9M4OASsrn0QuSxG-hd_yDcO2jefjUbb_ZJn1Qq1f_7cveUqGz_fEbHa118YHriokFqLWFYTBfdigg4dOj0qGBQRk2q252N0aMNPhqD9jGNdjDjzU5B36y1UfmOHCgYNGittVJG9xNEDzoGNaI3E4IwCiNxPfuPSoV3XNOrPvHsQ81dcjvz0cTwV8AsYL6uqw_lEd6ngPmNFjBrEDCrm4D568BS5HFio4iF5Xtspcm1plQvKpt8-PCZfNtlXWWoZTuxNarFJ-kLU8NMTC1LxsaUa3nJfuecutPF46KUqP0ZhVFb9pR-DPn3YN8BAAD__2p3bl0) who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses.
## Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers
Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed [the biggest free-agent deal in history](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6zAMheGnsTcZJK3EzqDhLtly146GYFEWC9kMJCFu375I524H-IYD_B-P5eEly7H99zu7FnXxa5MXL0gG0dC42D64yEw89uxwAhrBwgx9cni5zYxrnC6X6FcL11sM9hoI5ttIAFMvjoBGJEREAIvDTMEThhUm9nZm6ixwkKZl-FQ5WuKYv_XFZVh177NLrT1rN_7r6N7R_TzPIerXwWd9e0f3-tTS6nskTSxGU_OHmMKrlmBq8q1xkWMzE4DZJWfRwwT22QQNG5faFxee5xvqdeosbLuX_Hve_m7xEwAA__-d32Fc), agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher _and_ slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal [eclipses the previous record](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQRb_GdINmBt7CKyjS0G3alGiwB-zI2CtjLdq_jzZ16nt1dHS-7stdQgxp_5RDp7rlRWwNT12IgQi4W_rGTZsqa9foRANyhz2O2PjJyU3_4XAbOyQRHFBYrLieO7vyRkMTJkbuiImIEHtqR3bC5CwOKv2obHpUF2ou7XcOqXrd4is_tbQ2H02cfK2P03QfhmfD83VdrU2rfY-G5zfa8ExseMb_hudVTl0lRnh4TfnQlBOcPnsNkH2VFED2onpCzVDU5uJgQIQjxBhyAkJ4qRSwOdUitsIVqgeX3a7lbH09YlMm97je9_M2mB73Q0L8Va1_l_sJAAD__6YVb7U), held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract.
## EU Sets World's First Rules on AI
Europe has agreed to the [world's first set of rules](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGu4yAQheGnwR0WM5C1U1Bs4y7bbmlNYLDZYBPhSax9-6vc-tZH-nT0_73NN8ol78sf2thLqjMFyW-eATWARju7LvrEjGw79jAYtMaZ0XSrNxbw6hANwnUMHAMOd-vcxaXgrvbCXfZo0AICABjjoB8xEkIMZmByI6NyhmOW2vp_Ne-ycir_65tbH-rWFb-KPA9lfyucFE7nefZhv4fPqHD60AonQIWTGRVO_NK0NOZDS9WF9rhRe-j2Knzo5aPueV80ZU1JuOmwkixP0UIPPnRNqV9lK13z8XnmUvLxa1DOLBvl8n1Hfq7zFQAA__8MhWUC) regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, [target usage of AI against citizens](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuKyEQAL8GOqzdBT14BUUaOqdNeVrDnm8jbKwzdpS_j5w69Ugzmo_jcmTtej2_80XyXMfCdepTFiSH6Mgvwba8ipB4KxkjkIcACeyW6SQCXloLLKs_xVBpjS3-P6XYQuJoNROQR0JEBAh4SNSYsFWIwiEJmQDSdI798Dn0OjdZ-_d4yn6o42J73ua83Y1_M1QMlSl1q_vjWrcXNlReckMFyVCBZKjIw7E6rtPdRteplbtrwt1QsXtuty_tXe__oglwvrD238z8-_onAAD__0uOVt4) in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out.

clean_body: Negotiations to held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas. | | | | | | MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Don't forget to check out today's sponsor, . | Penn President Resigns Over Testimony University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses. Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed , agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher and slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal , held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract. EU Sets World's First Rules on AI Europe has agreed to the regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out.
