name: (1) Ron DeSantis, me
subject: Why should truck drivers have to pay for gender studies?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bf136cfa4c00f04f3d58fe352497fd84896b09cd024c55f4415b5f22aab30d5624bb7c935a147d72ba8406a5106ad55bb9f4b4ebdb05bc758626a1cbf29871a0dce4e8f442231137b68f5fc68dc2ca68

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531ea4137ae458614f6fa3bade1998fc34e646cff72a6248da2f61adacb59b924bd39d959baed0890f29d656f8575107b9571d596481f4624b

PLEASE GET BACK TO ME:

Do you support my plan?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f53ea8748b0e9ab619b87f5e1b647ab8843da89626c6e854c3e918bc686cdd95a78ad23ea9932c4d38953e39b57ec26d1d7d7f367aa81829f8b
YES

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531b38210ef7ceea7e8e0982a808068d76bd400a1d4a90edb1602f70e9d7338d4fc40911eb874f63b4f5a5610cb887d33e5c267a831b4fd484
NO

Friend,

I'm very straightforward about this:

I do not support forcing truck drivers to pay the student loans of someone that got a degree in gender studies. That is wrong.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531ea4137ae458614f6fa3bade1998fc34e646cff72a6248da2f61adacb59b924bd39d959baed0890f29d656f8575107b9571d596481f4624b

Please let me know if you agree with my plan by leaving me your opinion
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531ea4137ae458614f6fa3bade1998fc34e646cff72a6248da2f61adacb59b924bd39d959baed0890f29d656f8575107b9571d596481f4624b
here.

When I’m President, these student loans are not going to be another tax burden, they are going to be backed by the universities that are failing their students. Right now, they are wasting schooling on indoctrination and have no incentive to produce gainful employment.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f53ea8748b0e9ab619b87f5e1b647ab8843da89626c6e854c3e918bc686cdd95a78ad23ea9932c4d38953e39b57ec26d1d7d7f367aa81829f8b
I AGREE

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531b38210ef7ceea7e8e0982a808068d76bd400a1d4a90edb1602f70e9d7338d4fc40911eb874f63b4f5a5610cb887d33e5c267a831b4fd484
I DISAGREE

These liberal institutions have lost touch with what this country needs. We don't need experts indulging in ideological studies, we need to refocus some of these expenditures on vocational training and apprenticeships.

On this point, I am adamant: Don't let anybody tell you that the only way you can be successful is through a four-year brick and ivy degree. That is one way, but it is NOT the only way.

We're going to get the American Dream back in reach, hold universities accountable, and stop wasting the time and money of young Americans. I am fighting to right our priorities and get us back on track NOW.

Yours in Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531ea4137ae458614f6fa3bade1998fc34e646cff72a6248da2f61adacb59b924bd39d959baed0890f29d656f8575107b9571d596481f4624b

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531ea4137ae458614f6fa3bade1998fc34e646cff72a6248da2f61adacb59b924bd39d959baed0890f29d656f8575107b9571d596481f4624b

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f530741e3a724a194054ace46a36bdef256134d64fe4f7131071350f3a09aa9e531d503118ede37faf9157a03b14fa301c0ccc0041ada96fc17
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531ea4137ae458614f6fa3bade1998fc34e646cff72a6248da2f61adacb59b924bd39d959baed0890f29d656f8575107b9571d596481f4624b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a2d571b1c2de3f531ea4137ae458614f6fa3bade1998fc34e646cff72a6248da2f61adacb59b924bd39d959baed0890f29d656f8575107b9571d596481f4624b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nate?=
subject: Welcome to team Hudson!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Hudson for Congress]()
body:
Hello! If you're anything like me, you are worried about our country and displeased with the way our leadership is responding to the fight. | | | | | [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=0103e0cb0d&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
***|FNAME|*,** Welcome to Team Hudson, it’s a pleasure to have you. Our team is excited to do what it takes to earn your vote in 2024. To kick things off, we figured a brief introduction was due! So, let me introduce you to Paul Hudson;
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
# Early Years
**Paul is a homegrown Michigander** and longtime resident of West Michigan.Born in 1982, he grew up in Metro Detroit. His father worked for Chrysler while his mother worked nights as a doctor in the ER. He was one of five children, four brothers and one sister; two adopted from orphanages in Romania.
---
| [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=18b356a7f7&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
| [Learn More](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=f37a97f46a&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=cb89cc3a3c&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
|
# Michigan Roots
Paul is the grandson of Michigan State’s College Football Hall of Fame, **Duffy Daugherty** , who was a pioneer of racially integrating college football and won two national championships with the Spartans.
---
|
---
# Experience
After high school, Paul attended Cornell where he played catcher for the baseball team.Soon after, he graduated Cum Laude from Georgetown Law and then served as a law clerk for the **United States Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals**.Following his time in the Federal Court System, Paul went on to become a senior partner at Michigan’s oldest and most prominent law firm, Miller Canfield, and serves as the firm’s Chair of Appeals. He has argued hundreds of appeals in state and federal courts across the country, including cases defending law enforcement officers and upholding constitutional rights.
|
---
| | | | | | | | | In 2022, Paul was nominated by the Republican Party as a candidate for the Michigan Supreme Court, and received over 800,000 votes in a statewide nonpartisan race.
---
| [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=5b1d587696&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=bcc03d1fa8&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
|
# Family

clean_body: Hello! If you're anything like me, you are worried about our country and displeased with the way our leadership is responding to the fight. | | | | | *|FNAME|, Welcome to Team Hudson, it’s a pleasure to have you. Our team is excited to do what it takes to earn your vote in 2024. To kick things off, we figured a brief introduction was due! So, let me introduce you to Paul Hudson; | | | | | | | | | | Early Years Paul is a homegrown Michigander and longtime resident of West Michigan.Born in 1982, he grew up in Metro Detroit. His father worked for Chrysler while his mother worked nights as a doctor in the ER. He was one of five children, four brothers and one sister; two adopted from orphanages in Romania. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Michigan Roots Paul is the grandson of Michigan State’s College Football Hall of Fame, Duffy Daugherty , who was a pioneer of racially integrating college football and won two national championships with the Spartans. | Experience After high school, Paul attended Cornell where he played catcher for the baseball team.Soon after, he graduated Cum Laude from Georgetown Law and then served as a law clerk for the United States Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals.Following his time in the Federal Court System, Paul went on to become a senior partner at Michigan’s oldest and most prominent law firm, Miller Canfield, and serves as the firm’s Chair of Appeals. He has argued hundreds of appeals in state and federal courts across the country, including cases defending law enforcement officers and upholding constitutional rights. | | | | | | | | | | In 2022, Paul was nominated by the Republican Party as a candidate for the Michigan Supreme Court, and received over 800,000 votes in a statewide nonpartisan race. | | | | | | | | | | | | Family Paul resides in East Grand Rapids with his wife Jen and two children, Sarah, and John. Paul coaches his son’s baseball team and is an avid marathoner in his free time. | | | Thank you again for joining Team Hudson. Paul and our team are looking forward to spending time across the district getting to know each and every voter. \- Nate , Campaign Manager | | | | | mailto:teamhudson@paulhudsonforcongress.com| | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | PO Box 3243Grand Rapids, MI 49501 | | | | [Paid for by Paul Hudson for Congress]() | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Paul Hudson for Congress PO Box 3243 Grand Rapids, MI 49501 USA

body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7360d1e7fb0d4f0a985fb305ee87ea78&_e=lNjAD2qLUJaFpsAMhA1WbvxNOPV5xkA2TBKLi8rijDFEp9G3cmvfLC7hbXO8BMr_t7FG0VxLsDsbPdrJJTzTAGJNQbUGp3HN5bSqab2gt4CDri_CKnzmpshp5paLwRQ3wzuW7tkTspviEWQHCe8wHBIR1rudGGNlVqmNyLPosj4rbqejdlzeLvI_Aa1BhgjgdwcZ8-ivo6fl5956kJM2HcnYQ5_ZIzVosDr92WkAVW9bSOmr40Bcg5qTBLN58eaI6KtwZ4cxQSFTR6cLxy4vz7Am9UHukaa2kqKpnyDxkCB4jhEuSUiVRZesqtqTlpA6) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7360d1e7fb0d4f0a985fb305ee87ea78&_e=lNjAD2qLUJaFpsAMhA1WbvxNOPV5xkA2TBKLi8rijDFEp9G3cmvfLC7hbXO8BMr_t7FG0VxLsDsbPdrJJTzTAGJNQbUGp3HN5bSqab2gt4CDri_CKnzmpshp5paLwRQ3wzuW7tkTspviEWQHCe8wHODe8U3kiW-dFeAvJFhQnI2FKSNWQwfIRIJtatOP2Qks_fONTeLrQ8C5MEISZYYqjamRCmN-nJmQM5VqAcbFtX0iqWlQiA5l2s3W7LVNqShdwbZlsbEpfoFFwNvPX_Zqyx8vCUatxxri3vw-L1bCSg1178r2pvXaOjWkkWDhogZ4) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7360d1e7fb0d4f0a985fb305ee87ea78&_e=lNjAD2qLUJaFpsAMhA1WbvxNOPV5xkA2TBKLi8rijDFEp9G3cmvfLC7hbXO8BMr_t7FG0VxLsDsbPdrJJTzTAGJNQbUGp3HN5bSqab2gt4CDri_CKnzmpshp5paLwRQ3wzuW7tkTspviEWQHCe8wHMS07whmM7NlcnJJiB6_fDCdRfqt5va2K3EgvKWVqIca7ChUDk4roP_ShyjHdy1B1hc58TYAu1swRuymTPXbC_mMDr-eM7coZeIf4qPpOGfpH6V0CKLDhM0TR-nd4H-RVHJO7BjL3CK4_TvPqyCmuVitCx0NkSBiVJNhZPXSpGZv). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7360d1e7fb0d4f0a985fb305ee87ea78&_e=lNjAD2qLUJaFpsAMhA1WbvxNOPV5xkA2TBKLi8rijDFEp9G3cmvfLC7hbXO8BMr_t7FG0VxLsDsbPdrJJTzTAGJNQbUGp3HN5bSqab2gt4CDri_CKnzmpshp5paLwRQ3wzuW7tkTspviEWQHCe8wHM-3_I8_d_jHSa2xiRGWpmZY1aTSRvap3ghTfT4XrXsRExo22-mQMXJTl_kxEFT6UmurGGuyWK9XZeWVla-oQ_ZrkoTjkkwaitdyGXovEnvg2qXukRzyidfOGMmB24u7I4Zzz1Y2kK6_XXFblGQN2esZfHiXshAayYRTA-M5wPQ5)

On December 7, we honor and remember the 2,335 brave men and women in uniform plus many civilians killed during the attack on Pearl Harbor 80 years ago. We must never forget. I was asked by a much older veteran if our schools still remembered Pearl Harbor and if their American flag was at half mast on December 7. I was proud to inform him, when I drove by Rustburg High School in Campbell County, Virginia in the 5th Congrssional District they had the American Flag at half mast to honor and remember those brave souls.

| My friend and fellow legislator Delegate Scott Wyatt (Hanover), myself, and others spoke on ending anti-semitism, safety on school campuses, our support for Israel and the Jewish people, and legislative priorities at the Jewish Community Center.
My resolve for Israel has only hardened since Oct. 7th. Israel is our most important and reliable ally in the Middle East and its continued sovereignty is in the best interests of the United States and the world. The State of Israel has the fundamental right to defend itself by any means necessary against Hamas, Iran, Hezbollah, the Houthis, and all other enemies - and the only way Israel can continue to safely exist is with the total annihilation of Hamas. I firmly believe that it is the duty of all nations to respect and acknowledge the sovereignty of the State of Israel. If the situation was here in the US, there is no way another nation would ask us to stand down. Israel didn't start this fight, but Israel is going to end this fight. We love getting around the district and seeing you. Please reply to this email about any events going on in your area. We look forward to seeing you soon! | Our best days are still ahead of us. I'm running for Congress to help Trump Save America from radical Marxist policies that put America last. I've been all over the 5th district and unlike my opponent Congressman Bob Good, who abandoned our president Trump and endorsed a different candidate on the day Trump got indicted, I can tell you the people of the 5th love President Trump and his America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | | | | == | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA New Email: john@mcguireva.com New Website: www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

| It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the fit for you.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2cf400b8e4d45a683eb1bb090207662&_e=pFVv_dT9ScKvXMG9rOR1tYMXPdtaBMHtuHAAUdHdg8kBXwQSCnUNjw1hwtfDvgz71byxQPUZ3PWBVOLFyCp86MvUpSIEtZJorhJU5D87LVf6tNYfnJWUxqZ4Jqn-Ry999Hatfvh4pxCnDduVra3B9TikcrIsSde4593LQRDE9-P37YHmmmM52vJ6dlSSt6zeteToWHEKitot8mu6Ek7SzP3-ezc_LpkYt_mTTiUWN0G1DwsxPBIqGdpDM47Hfdox7eLO2lID2n4T-LlCmhaypM3aMtT42DpY91sZSEAn6kP_rhG1zz_W8uh5NyPMVjNOlNFC2KujpA8RaZUC_7TYFU5pQK9suzbZuU1yl2aZTIFj8QPRIQyGBhp6fJl_hgzQyv6lCm6JlfJ5MCSgLG7z5rVGfYbv8XxnyjKRH8XAqUV12YSQ6CcrjBm41PfGqsSluFgch34A-ODpCk0xH7fX_k60OASPz7QAYuTTp6r9oCw%3D)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn't usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2cf400b8e4d45a683eb1bb090207662&_e=pFVv_dT9ScKvXMG9rOR1tYMXPdtaBMHtuHAAUdHdg8kBXwQSCnUNjw1hwtfDvgz71byxQPUZ3PWBVOLFyCp86MvUpSIEtZJorhJU5D87LVf6tNYfnJWUxqZ4Jqn-Ry999Hatfvh4pxCnDduVra3B9TikcrIsSde4593LQRDE9-P37YHmmmM52vJ6dlSSt6zeteToWHEKitot8mu6Ek7SzP3-ezc_LpkYt_mTTiUWN0G1DwsxPBIqGdpDM47Hfdox7eLO2lID2n4T-LlCmhaypM3aMtT42DpY91sZSEAn6kP_rhG1zz_W8uh5NyPMVjNOlNFC2KujpA8RaZUC_7TYFSs_es8JqqUql5Ha8e11AeCQcIIIAXN97jlGezRgS75AjRse-9CPnQRz6ZjhVOm7QyoCXatlsocXIwGwMJlbZW29EpmU7XwcFUVTD4Wy4azmuXQj1YzV6ojfpG354x5hFHrlnW-l5Qn_mAhiYHtiX9Q%3D)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you're interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That's why SmartAsset created a [free tool](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2cf400b8e4d45a683eb1bb090207662&_e=pFVv_dT9ScKvXMG9rOR1tTKrR5ToRj30CFjHN2fVG0vFa8k909h-yASg2j_d60SgvS0DreYnuUQqAEkzztDxGrtPgZa-0yaN8UXWCJks6mIfGs5aq5oqzJpqLHjGmezZUCZt1_E9HCo4KBCD3BwmJMR7hIHirm89UAsrVBn3IPENDNOVVJaXXQySJ7UPyZHAjRqVd4TB1VWdVY2Zb3QDj1IaKO2qAGYr1l5VBMVkcttHZJ7uL8ySwiCtCAipndSQRZ8-6SU__kSaqh2V-M1uE8Dod9sCAnbpDO--XB71pTsrPmuMJ_1hcs_gCcK9Cp71hHr3y8y4CrGoMuJCC6EnxQeYfbpD1GVaCOyndz6WkmqQsHi5RUrJjaiKhOpvnDtkiI33EI5gGuKH32Dl7J_mKpnGc2TRN_K8sCxQbUM-Sp48p-SvfBHLXpTFlMga5GGinN9PnPdU3xBiR5IKcLUPAg%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.

# In Case You Missed It!

Peter, have you seen what a day in the life of a congressional candidate looks like? If you've missed it, don't worry! The video is still available on all social media platforms. **Don't hesitate to catch a glimpse and discover what it takes to campaign for change.**
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=fdc7c3d391&e=a2a46ff12c)
| [About Me ](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=bea602e947&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| [Support](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=9b321c8119&e=a2a46ff12c)

I'm not just a candidate; I'm an everyday working American, and I know firsthand the issues that affect all of us. From farm chores at dawn to discussing vital topics like affordable healthcare and veterans' support, it's a day of tireless dedication.
Support this historic movement by **supporting Laura Jones for Congress!**
Thank you.

\- Laura

subject: outspent by 300%
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 Peter, Despite how it may seem, writing and sending these emails is difficult. It’s not easy having to ask for more from the people who have made this campaign possible. I don’t enjoy asking you to spend your hard-earned money on me and this battleground race. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 But truthfully, I wouldn’t be asking for your help today if it wasn’t sincerely needed. I am running my campaign on principles grounded in grassroots support and pure transparency. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 I consider every donor to my campaign an integral part of my team. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 JOIN GEORGE’S GRASSROOTS TEAM Every donation, from emails just like this one, goes directly toward: - Funding our field program - Buying television, radio, and online advertising spots - Reaching out to newly registered + undecided voters There have been many races in the past where the candidate had a winning message, just not the money to spread their message far and wide. Just look at our 2022 race:Despite being outraised and outspent by 300%, we came SO close to flipping CT-05 from BLUE to RED - losing by just 0.6%, to be exact. But close only counts in horseshoes – a loss is still a loss. This time around, we are more determined than ever to win. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 If I can secure the investment of conservatives across the Nation starting TODAY, I know we can reach more voters and overcome the barriers that kept us from winning this race two years ago. https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 If every Patriot on my contact list, including you, donates even just $1, it really could make the difference! Will you step up right now? https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 JOIN GEORGE’S GRASSROOTS TEAM We will put https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 your donation to good and honest use, Peter. You have my word. Let's do this together, https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 George Logan P.S. Peter – I am committed to being completely transparent about my fundraising practices. I assure you that we are running a true grassroots campaign, and https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=4d1b15049d63add92101c3e9a501859d5b8cb581883d29f369399490d5bc22524ee4c40e541f9d8882b95324996c5086e4cc1216425772a1 every dollar goes towards winning this rematch and flipping this seat for Republicans. Dear Fellow Patriot,

Are you worried about the deep state’s corruption?

With Biden’s DOJ covering up for Hunter Biden’s crimes and the Department of Homeland Security secretly trafficking illegal immigrants, patriotic Americans cannot sit on the sidelines and let this abuse continue.

We must shed light on those in Washington that hide their misdeeds from the public.

Here at The Heritage Foundation, we created the Heritage Oversight Project to expose the government's corruption on exactly these issues.

We want your feedback on this crucial issue.

_**[This might be the most important email I've ever sent you so I'm humbly asking you to read it through carefully.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5mpstrchljicat1o6a8si80iqcqk0du2nh8rfb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi6eor1cth2bs "This might be the most important email I’ve ever sent you so I’m humbly asking you to read it through carefully.")**_

**House Republicans just announced an OFFICIAL IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY VOTE to authorize an investigation into high crimes and misdemeanors against President Joseph Robinette Biden.**

The SECOND the vote was put on the calendar, the Radical Left immediately launched a coordinated political strike to destroy our investigation once and for all. They immediately sprang into action:
- Adam Schiff (D-CA) crowed that there was no evidence of any wrongdoing
- Katherine Clarke (D-MA) claimed the inquiry was rooted in lies
- Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY) said we don't have a shred of evidence
- Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) called it hogwash
- Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) said it's a waste of time
- The White House tried telling you the claims have been debunked
Please listen carefully:

_**[Everything comes down to whether or not we have a Majority to expose the TRUTH to the American People.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpc4reo9j9bhlc0fem0q1g93mksj83d5lc7sc4j0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi6eor1cth2bs "Everything comes down to whether or not we have a Majority to expose the TRUTH to the American People.")**_

_The Democrats?_ They'll use any means necessary to undermine, discredit, and ultimately DESTROY our Majority, making it impossible to finish our investigation. _That means the ENTIRE scandal gets swept under the rug and Biden is let off the hook._
---

**And if my instincts are right, I'd bet you agree the allegations against Joe Biden stink to high heaven.**

That's where you can help.

We have a razor-thin Majority in the House and the Radical Left is plowing ahead in an effort to cover for Joe Biden and derail our investigative team. We need a NATIONWIDE grassroots response or we won't be able to see our investigation through to the end.

_**[I'm humbly asking you to DIG DEEP and help House Republicans gather the resources to defend our Majority before it's crushed by the Radical Left.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq04p6l1dtvu8ehk8epdf1end32prr36114n4cog_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi6eor1cth2bs "I'm humbly asking you to DIG DEEP and help House Republicans gather the resources to defend our Majority before it's crushed by the Radical Left.")**_

It's the only way Joe Biden is held to account. We really need you on this.

Thank you for standing with us,
Steve Scalise

Headed To The Supreme Court Again
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk67v4si8k0qc9l36mcjgeav3icibtps97mngtb8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr8dhheirr7ctl6tr779hnmmrq6d9k65qn4t9h6uh60oj6cui64pt4chjq8dd66jpr9dhk66qqcsbiegonadpkumgradjmemgn1d1jmmgnettlkjqj8cjmemi36cbl69qq2dti68r7b91i6up72t5nmeqq9djlk2qj8c9l64qq2ttlk5obadd6elo74t9lmkqqcdtle9onb91n6gqb7dt246h22sh2s8i6eo32cpi6eor6cth2bs

Supreme Court Justice Elana Kagan will decide any day now on an
emergency petition for an abortion case from Idaho, just under two
years after the landmark decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, and legal
and policy experts who spoke with the Daily Caller News Foundation

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: OFFICIAL IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY VOTE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be the most important email I've ever sent you so I'm humbly asking you to read it through carefully.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Steve Scalise.

_**[This might be the most important email I've ever sent you so I'm humbly asking you to read it through carefully.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqgevs3c26e64p38em0h8d04jblru6nrjfcf6i0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4cdh2bs "This might be the most important email I’ve ever sent you so I’m humbly asking you to read it through carefully.")**_

**House Republicans just announced an OFFICIAL IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY VOTE to authorize an investigation into high crimes and misdemeanors against President Joseph Robinette Biden.**

The SECOND the vote was put on the calendar, the Radical Left immediately launched a coordinated political strike to destroy our investigation once and for all. They immediately sprang into action:
- Adam Schiff (D-CA) crowed that there was no evidence of any wrongdoing
- Katherine Clarke (D-MA) claimed the inquiry was rooted in lies
- Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY) said we don't have a shred of evidence
- Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) called it hogwash
- Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) said it's a waste of time
- The White House tried telling you the claims have been debunked
Please listen carefully:

_**[Everything comes down to whether or not we have a Majority to expose the TRUTH to the American People.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9rflb1nrbl5tc5b2egujaqs3jggrgjfi1vndhag_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4cdh2bs "Everything comes down to whether or not we have a Majority to expose the TRUTH to the American People.")**_

_The Democrats?_ They'll use any means necessary to undermine, discredit, and ultimately DESTROY our Majority, making it impossible to finish our investigation. _That means the ENTIRE scandal gets swept under the rug and Biden is let off the hook._
---

**And if my instincts are right, I'd bet you agree the allegations against Joe Biden stink to high heaven.**

That's where you can help.

We have a razor-thin Majority in the House and the Radical Left is plowing ahead in an effort to cover for Joe Biden and derail our investigative team. We need a NATIONWIDE grassroots response or we won't be able to see our investigation through to the end.

_**[I'm humbly asking you to DIG DEEP and help House Republicans gather the resources to defend our Majority before it's crushed by the Radical Left.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za4eui0fre0sh5vk0977aa5g0vmod07q1h33or0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4cdh2bs "I'm humbly asking you to DIG DEEP and help House Republicans gather the resources to defend our Majority before it's crushed by the Radical Left.")**_

It's the only way Joe Biden is held to account. We really need you on this.

Thank you for standing with us,
Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjh2t4dq29dhvd4np8moch50kioaapdn5rfq8lkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4cdh2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6m9n7bv82bs6fjra89qlhd9v87dholj59lk434g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4cdh2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_
---
| | | [BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z35nc4fk5kq1jel6f9escb238muono0smfnn39ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4cdh2bs "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY")

Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ayLZpbc_XMHO754dGR3wKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWcAkP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMjExVwNzcGNCCmVz-RJ3ZUkX3edSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ayLZpbc_XMHO754dGR3wKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWcAkP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMjExVwNzcGNCCmVz-RJ3ZUkX3edSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ayLZpbc_XMHO754dGR3wKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWcAkP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMjExVwNzcGNCCmVz-RJ3ZUkX3edSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ayLZpbc_XMHO754dGR3wKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWcAkP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fUk9OXzIwMjMxMjExVwNzcGNCCmVz-RJ3ZUkX3edSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

body:
and I took him to the border

---
It’s Elon Musk.
Earlier this year I took him to the border to show him the disastrous state that Biden has left it in.

And in his words: “This sounds like complete madness”.

He couldn't be any closer to the truth.

This is Representative Tony Gonzales.

Since 2022, over 7,000,000 illegal immigrants have entered our country, and Democrats would LOVE to see it continue.

They’d love it so much that they’ve raised over $71 MILLION to crush Republicans' chances of maintaining the house in 2024.

With such a slim majority in the House, we CANNOT afford to fall behind.

It’s hard of me to ask, but can you chip in just $5 to help Republicans maintain our house majority?

---
Our southern border is just another prime example of Democrat incompetence, and if they have their way our entire COUNTRY will be look just like the border.

Please don’t let that happen, John.

Can I count on you?

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: OFFICIAL IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY VOTE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be the most important email I've ever sent you so I'm humbly asking you to read it through carefully.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Steve Scalise.

_**[This might be the most important email I've ever sent you so I'm humbly asking you to read it through carefully.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmf1b94fpg9bfuv2j5imb2q06a8ei96ol328lnmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4c3h2bs "This might be the most important email I’ve ever sent you so I’m humbly asking you to read it through carefully.")**_

**House Republicans just announced an OFFICIAL IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY VOTE to authorize an investigation into high crimes and misdemeanors against President Joseph Robinette Biden.**

The SECOND the vote was put on the calendar, the Radical Left immediately launched a coordinated political strike to destroy our investigation once and for all. They immediately sprang into action:
- Adam Schiff (D-CA) crowed that there was no evidence of any wrongdoing
- Katherine Clarke (D-MA) claimed the inquiry was rooted in lies
- Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY) said we don't have a shred of evidence
- Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) called it hogwash
- Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) said it's a waste of time
- The White House tried telling you the claims have been debunked
Please listen carefully:

_**[Everything comes down to whether or not we have a Majority to expose the TRUTH to the American People.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5pstm84h90int81n6r815stmuq8rpi607tsudg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4c3h2bs "Everything comes down to whether or not we have a Majority to expose the TRUTH to the American People.")**_

_The Democrats?_ They'll use any means necessary to undermine, discredit, and ultimately DESTROY our Majority, making it impossible to finish our investigation. _That means the ENTIRE scandal gets swept under the rug and Biden is let off the hook._
---

**And if my instincts are right, I'd bet you agree the allegations against Joe Biden stink to high heaven.**

That's where you can help.

We have a razor-thin Majority in the House and the Radical Left is plowing ahead in an effort to cover for Joe Biden and derail our investigative team. We need a NATIONWIDE grassroots response or we won't be able to see our investigation through to the end.

_**[I'm humbly asking you to DIG DEEP and help House Republicans gather the resources to defend our Majority before it's crushed by the Radical Left.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhgdjhpi1lp6tasgabf1q77jh6i1mo0tdrb10a18_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4c3h2bs "I'm humbly asking you to DIG DEEP and help House Republicans gather the resources to defend our Majority before it's crushed by the Radical Left.")**_

It's the only way Joe Biden is held to account. We really need you on this.

Thank you for standing with us,
Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeobte36qlb0hp1ar8kvc4mb53n0t89rn87pth0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4c3h2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5s7c0h3b30iccmpdmo0o2gom30r7bk5d252l9do_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4c3h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_
---
| | | [BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlblop3j8f0hju1mfp4o1fml8t72a9tlkuk9usso_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69ob4c3h2bs "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY")

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: My life story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm a Christian, husband, father, attorney and conservative fighter. Let's get to work.

|
---
| | |
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0sq8dt02v9t3uapeg5j3aqr80880a3fpq628cb8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69p71clh2bs)
---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcm7gtvk553vlj85c4d17u01sdq1df6lb1r1d5pg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69p71clh2bs "Generic Button")
---

But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly and father to our four amazing children.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqstatessn84rnd8ht6g1c6t8ohl1ncknd8b2l2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69p71clh2bs)
---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zopeeupro7cmpkpos6hr7se4bs190tj81guhnubg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69p71clh2bs "Generic Button")
---

I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor.

**I set a goal of activating 40,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running.

[Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0rnmb1csq07ivhajkaa7j0evfh0tq7nb51nchg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69p71clh2bs "Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024?")**

---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zff4oto1h6moa7pnurn4re69e9uflfjgv6o96emo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpi69p71clh2bs "Generic Button")
---

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our conservative movement.

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

---

body:
The political hatchet job against Speaker Johnson ENRAGES me to no end.

| |

---
| | | Even as a former CIA Director...

Even as a former Secretary of State...

Even as a former Member of Congress...

Washington DC never ceases to amaze me - I can't believe what I'm seeing right now. _I 'm sorry but __I need to vent for a minute:_

**The SECOND Mike Johnson was named the new House Speaker, the Liberal Mob sprang into action. They IMMEDIATELY initiated a pre-planned, coordinated political hatchet job against him for being: 1) a strong Conservative and 2) a God-fearing Christian.**

The Liberal Mob eviscerated him in the press. They called him a Cristo-fascist. They said he's too Conservative and too Christian for the top job. They even rushed out hit pieces about his wife.

It's a disgrace. Unfortunately, we've been forced to play on defense because the Liberal Mob keeps crushing us in fundraising...

_But that 's finished. Now we're going on offense! _

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise an UNPRECEDENTED one million dollars in the next 48 hours. I know, I know - it's ambitious. But bullies only back down with a show of force. If that's what it takes to win, I'll do everything in my power to get there.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlj7fm4njqn0pfisphhfpo1d5js1er55m65lhiog_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph60o30clh2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise an UNPRECEDENTED one million dollars in the next 48 hours. name: Pat Harrigan
subject: It all started with a trailer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=3349dfc9225b4979bc2b83961dca9597&_e=9y8S5vXspr43E-XlEKP5rbNNe_jvUWUJ98aCj29HLD-qRYnqg-FTXmb3wtO-OwjZOLPR2r0fFCxWFwua39d0Lo3HGrc9oCIIFH5maOtKYlGRL-wK5qYC9ZBIzHLZzJ4a4tGBPhJGMIbfDJflWdDsREYJjj6TW3wan6KzcqKCp9o9yq2e4-fo-EunEVz-QkkpMi9lCV90-5cepnLvJVxlLGHWQYFVWPkPayEZs71kxhjmqE78vu2Ae5naQHk5kDzDY-4GWPVWVa2apWp7tPyMpLRwixsE_fIkN9usl_Ka9dbPZtS4V4dYkS-ZfqeUxl19jJFgf3PXEhJbJq-6qQLBHRsBwoBNpxdMID48gyjvlTZ-jfm1tHs9qf3qtz6j62nKG_9OlbrtKlvUNBSheDoaEQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,
---
When my wife Rocky and I started our firearms business, we ran it out of a small trailer in our North Carolina hometown. I was still serving as a Green Beret, but whenever I had any time away from the battlefield, I was coordinating with my wife from across the world to make our American Dream come true. **Today, our business is run out of a 40,000 square foot warehouse, and we’re proud to employee patriots from across North Carolina.** It took lots of hard work and faith, but we made it. **But our success isn’t enough. I want to share it with the rest of the country and help YOU live your American Dream.** **I’m running for Congress because Joe Biden wants to stop success stories like ours from happening in America, and I’m not about to let him get away with it.** **[Will you join me today to STOP Biden’s build back broke agenda and preserve the American Dream my fellow Green Berets and I fought for?](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=3349dfc9225b4979bc2b83961dca9597&_e=9y8S5vXspr43E-XlEKP5rbNNe_jvUWUJ98aCj29HLD-qRYnqg-FTXmb3wtO-OwjZOLPR2r0fFCxWFwua39d0Lo3HGrc9oCIIFH5maOtKYlGRL-wK5qYC9ZBIzHLZzJ4a4tGBPhJGMIbfDJflWdDsREYJjj6TW3wan6KzcqKCp9o9yq2e4-fo-EunEVz-QkkpMi9lCV90-5cepnLvJVxlLGHWQYFVWPkPayEZs71kxhjmqE78vu2Ae5naQHk5kDzDHaIM-JmX8hvZ_8JB1nrbjjdAUY6lCKmRk2q1Ajsz_1H1uY9HPVFG-5SSLa_wM_mmvB29viCy1Sp7lLXO9Ge-FKt20XHLqd2ALvIMQttakGOgQa1p-pNg_54u5ejfoH1fdUCi3H4KIFNNvDo9JydwtQ%3D%3D)**
---
[**PITCH IN NOW **](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=3349dfc9225b4979bc2b83961dca9597&_e=9y8S5vXspr43E-XlEKP5rbNNe_jvUWUJ98aCj29HLD-qRYnqg-FTXmb3wtO-OwjZOLPR2r0fFCxWFwua39d0Lo3HGrc9oCIIFH5maOtKYlGRL-wK5qYC9ZBIzHLZzJ4a4tGBPhJGMIbfDJflWdDsREYJjj6TW3wan6KzcqKCp9o9yq2e4-fo-EunEVz-QkkpMi9lCV90-5cepnLvJVxlLGHWQYFVWPkPayEZs71kxhjmqE78vu2Ae5naQHk5kDzDV_vrHnJM34QVenhsDL6zF1vDB0pIEfMDsc2WTjixiModUDFtpT0gGbGwkU5yZfRsuXfZSybfGRLxWCjYx9y_brlwoIgtYUWkU9NU2AbqUBNoXllBCCd5N6Tvmz34IcbH-mB2ll6CBej7Kw7WbGpAgA%3D%3D)
---
Whether you’re running a business or fighting on the front lines of a war zone, the success of your mission depends on the quality of your team. Right now, I’m building the best team in the world to take back our country from the socialist Left, and I want YOU to be a part of it. Together, we can build an operation that will face off against the mainstream media, the Hollywood socialists, and the Silicon Valley billionaires and WIN. _But we need to start right now._ **[Join our team today to keep the American Dream ALIVE!](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=3349dfc9225b4979bc2b83961dca9597&_e=9y8S5vXspr43E-XlEKP5rbNNe_jvUWUJ98aCj29HLD-qRYnqg-FTXmb3wtO-OwjZOLPR2r0fFCxWFwua39d0Lo3HGrc9oCIIFH5maOtKYlGRL-wK5qYC9ZBIzHLZzJ4a4tGBPhJGMIbfDJflWdDsREYJjj6TW3wan6KzcqKCp9o9yq2e4-fo-EunEVz-QkkpMi9lCV90-5cepnLvJVxlLGHWQYFVWPkPayEZs71kxhjmqE78vu2Ae5naQHk5kDzDeXWXWgQ_aQJmSaMpmMHwmN1vsLbsLZdDenQc_Jj45y1ZVjExuSTPecldXotwPPj5Z-5vBDQbWc9h8JzNrua6YjP9NvUcqcTD7ZIAP1N-M4fTiXC4r_jzpua1-LgMDmDbBuzUkoyPDLb1AqOFsJVONA%3D%3D)**

Whether you’re running a business or fighting on the front lines of a war zone, the success of your mission depends on the quality of your team. Right now, I’m building the best team in the world to take back our country from the socialist Left, and I want YOU to be a part of it. Together, we can build an operation that will face off against the mainstream media, the Hollywood socialists, and the Silicon Valley billionaires and WIN. But we need to start right now. Thank you, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Breaking News [via Team Haley]
subject: NEW POLL: Nikki defeats Biden by 17 POINTS!
body:
Momentum is high but time is short.

| |
---
| | | **BREAKING: NIKKI HALEY DEFEATS BIDEN BY 17 POINTS**
Friend,

You read that right.

A new WSJ poll shows **Nikki Haley DEMOLISHING Biden by a whopping 17 POINTS!**

We can win this! **[But we need your help NOW.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8959a0eb15mebri5v9h143liggvhvvbkt0ddm40_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs "But we need your help NOW.")**
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z77bigsqoe597hol53svp8atm8s5dhlctjqjg5s8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs)
---

We can elect Nikki Haley our next president.

Momentum is surging, her message is resonating, and Americans are rallying behind her in droves.

But we must first win the primary in order to CRUSH Biden in the general and get our country back on track. **[Are you with us? Please rush a donation right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z893omu9mftb7985p7cmpirlos45l7sslabq76j0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs "Are you with us? Please rush a donation right away.")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaajm004sbisil81rk3oo8totonj6cs34knk5bgg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs)
---

**5 weeks.**

That's all the time we have left until the first votes take place in this critical election.

We cannot afford to waste a single moment.

Our campaign is on the cusp of making history, but we need your immediate support to keep the momentum surging and get us one step closer to victory. **[Will you please pitch in a contribution today to help fund our campaign and elect Nikki Haley our next president?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmnkufqebmk8dl6ped2snkjm5iisgvsupko9okmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs "Will you please pitch in a contribution today to help fund our campaign and elect Nikki Haley our next president?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv77ifastm2lf7r0jv4mofmfqa3fcdajosmsstkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs)
---

We've already come this far. We have an incredible team and a powerful message. But there is so much more work to be done before voting begins next month.

That's why we need **YOU. **

**YOU** can fuel our fight.

**YOU** can amplify Nikki's message.

**YOU** can help Nikki continue to SURGE in the polls and WIN.

It's clear the tide is rolling Nikki's way. But time is slipping away, and we're in a race against the clock.

**[We need you, and we need you now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zopnd623eehoutg9d5h8lu3c8entlfiahn60bnqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs "We need you, and we need you now.")**

Remember, the countdown has begun, and we can't slow down now. Let's make every moment count!

Thank you for being a part of this journey. Together, we can save our country.

-Team Haley

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z872qac4q3hvrbjaatu2smcanempit4c98728qdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcq61rij6n7lfebhaovfc20i36k1qjbfqoij0bk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR WRAPPING PAPER](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z23nkcq7uq2auo6dep5hqdm9o7eifnangpf06pt0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7o3niu9sk4ta8fp7da96fdgbtej4149hiau1750_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47hgiokdh2al1s1346s28v6pp94s3ksoao8a1r0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cph6co31chh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---

---

Together, we can save our country. -Team Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Securing America's Border > Ukraine's Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We must secure our wide open southern border to stop the invasion of our country. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2fd90089c8&e=1050d051da)
---
| Patriot,

It's Jake LaTurner here.

The Biden administration is hellbent on controlling our lives and taking away our freedom through regulations and executive orders. House Republicans are the last line of defense to stopping it.

Last week we blocked the EPA's new regulation to mandate EVs by 2032 and stopped Biden from forcing Americans to repay student loan debt that doesn't belong to them.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **SECURING AMERICA'S BORDER > UKRAINE'S BORDER**
---
|
---
| **No, this is not a joke. Joe Biden really believes that securing the border is an "extreme partisan policy."**
_Here's the truth: Joe Biden could not be more out of touch with everyday Americans._
House Republicans are proposing real solutions to secure the southern border and stop the invasion of our country.

Joe Biden thinks these proposals are radical. I think they are **VITAL** to protecting America:

**→ **Building the wall
**→ **Ending Catch-and-Release
**→ **Hiring more Border Patrol Agents
**→ **Reinstating Title 42
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=916e393bab&e=1050d051da)
---
| It is entirely **UNACCEPTABLE** for the corrupt left in Washington to care more about Ukraine's border than they do about securing our own southern border.

Under Biden and Mayorkas, **8** **MILLION** illegal immigrants have attempted to cross our border. **2** **MILLION** migrants evaded law enforcement and entered our country undetected.

Fentanyl, weapons, and terrorists are coming over the border in record numbers and wreaking havoc on our communities.

A country without secure borders is not a country at all. We have to put America **FIRST** and secure our border.
---
|
---
| **HALTING BIDENS GREEN NEW DEAL AGENDA**
---
|
---
| _**Remember AOC's Green New Deal?**__****_ Well, even after years of failure, Joe Biden is still trying to force these reckless policies on hardworking Americans.

>From what car you drive to what stove you cook on, Democrats are trying to control every facet of our lives and take away any freedom we have as consumers.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=563b634401&e=1050d051da)
---
| Most recently, Biden's EPA put out a rule that would put extreme standards on emissions and make all new vehicles electric by 2032.

This would force Americans to switch to costly and inefficient EVs—not to mention the dangerous amount of power this would give the CCP over America's supply chains.

Last week, House Republicans passed legislation to **BLOCK** this ridiculous proposal and ensure Americans can choose what car is best for them.
---
|
---
| **STOPPING BIDEN'S STUDENT LOAN BAILOUT**
---
|
---
| Let's get one thing straight. Biden's **$400+ BILLION **student loan bailout does not magically make the debt go away. It simply shifts the burden from liberal arts college grads onto hardworking taxpayers.

I get this question a lot when I'm traveling across the district: _Why should Kansans who have paid back their loans or didn't take one out in the first place be forced to pay for someone else's loans?_

**THEY SHOULDN'T. Plain and simple.**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5134bdcb46&e=1050d051da)
---
| I voted to pass legislation last week that would stop the Biden bureaucrats at the Department of Labor from forcing Americans to repay student loan debt that doesn't belong to them.
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4a5d7b4f9f&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Kansans for LaTurner, All rights reserved._

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=e278953a05) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=e278953a05).
---
|
---

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. The charge alleges Menendez accepted hundreds of thousands of dollars of bribes from Egyptian officials in exchange for Menendez's agreement to use his Senate position to benefit the Government of Egypt. Thirty-one Senators, dozens of New Jersey leaders, and more than a thousand people like you have called on Senator Mendez to resign. **When we learned of his new foreign agent charges I called for Menendez's expulsion from the US Senate.** But Senator Menendez pushed back, again insinuating that _he's not going anywhere._ [**It's time New Jersey had trustworthy leadership in this Senate seat. The bribes reportedly included gold bars, a luxury convertible car, home mortgage payments, and more. _It was recently reported that these gold bars were linked to a 2013 robbery._ **I do not have confidence that the Senator can properly focus on our state and its people while responding to the allegations. clean_body: Senator Menendez was accused of accepting hundreds of thousands of dollars in bribes from three businessmen. | | | | Take a look at this headline: = This is troubling news considering Menendez's recent corruption charge. Senator Menendez was charged with a corruption charge — conspiracy to act as a foreign agent. The charge alleges Menendez accepted hundreds of thousands of dollars of bribes from Egyptian officials in exchange for Menendez's agreement to use his Senate position to benefit the Government of Egypt. Thirty-one Senators, dozens of New Jersey leaders, and more than a thousand people like you have called on Senator Mendez to resign. When we learned of his new foreign agent charges I called for Menendez's expulsion from the US Senate. But Senator Menendez pushed back, again insinuating that he's not going anywhere. = = Senator Menendez was accused of accepting hundreds of thousands of dollars in bribes from three businessmen. The bribes reportedly included gold bars, a luxury convertible car, home mortgage payments, and more. It was recently reported that these gold bars were linked to a 2013 robbery. I do not have confidence that the Senator can properly focus on our state and its people while responding to the allegations. That's why I stepped up to run for Senate. = More soon, Andy ** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by .** Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. **_BREAKING NEWS:_ The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! **
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. **But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here is the truth:
#

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Senate. Please give me a chance to explain why these requests — this month especially — are so important.
Here is the truth:
This is an FEC deadline month. You may have already heard me mention that. I’m going to keep bringing it up, because this is one of the most important months of the campaign.
When an FEC deadline ends we're legally required to report not just how much money we've raised, but how many donations we've received. And this is the last FEC deadline of the year.
That's why we asking you to contribute $6 or whatever you can afford:
$6 because everyone will be watching to see what we report when this deadline ends.
$6 because a bad report could trigger attacks we can't afford to repel from Sinema and her Republican billionaires, or Kari Lake and her army of MAGA loyalists.
$6 because a good report could trigger a number of important endorsements from potential supporters who are waiting to see if our campaign has what it takes. We need those endorsements to unite the party and scale this campaign.
We need December to be our biggest month of the year, because this is our last chance to shore up our campaign before we head into the Election Year. And we're going to need you if that's gonna happen. So please:
[**Can I count on you to use this link and contribute $6 to my Arizona Senate campaign today? It will add up to a great end to the year if everyone does their part.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231211-1&t=1&akid=1540%2E734936%2EN7mAeV)
If $6 doesn't feel right today, or if you can do more, just choose an amount below.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-dec23.c3Kc7n&refcode=em231211-1&t=20&akid=1540%2E734936%2EN7mAeV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-dec23.Iu3tBv&refcode=em231211-1&t=21&akid=1540%2E734936%2EN7mAeV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-dec23.WRb_0j&refcode=em231211-1&t=22&akid=1540%2E734936%2EN7mAeV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-dec23.1eV3wB&refcode=em231211-1&t=23&akid=1540%2E734936%2EN7mAeV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-dec23.77-ptL&refcode=em231211-1&t=24&akid=1540%2E734936%2EN7mAeV)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-dec23.THMJwK&refcode=em231211-1&t=25&akid=1540%2E734936%2EN7mAeV)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in. This means a lot — not just to me, not just to this campaign, but to our ultimate goal of beating Kari Lake and holding the Senate.
\- Ruben

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

Peter, leaders like Senator Jon Ossoff and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez have been calling for a ban on members of Congress for being allowed to trade stock.
Why? Because they are given timely information about industries, updates from agencies, and much more before the average person, giving them the advantage to make decisions that lead to profit.
And now that there are a few Republicans on board with Democrats, we have a real chance to get this bill through.
That’s why we’re calling on 10,000 supporters to sign our petition to tell Congress to ban congressional stock trading! [https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_231211_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]

Thank you in advance for signing on!
– DR
