name: Team DeSantis
subject: Official Survey Request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Where do you stand? Do you believe the US has strong leadership? We need your response today.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96f27e2e828dc09288d3249bf862d5a3518676bd3ddb0498550589359ebb6f70115f55465673ba67fc8e1426ebaff65928fc2a5fde181346)
---
Friend, The strength of our leadership is being tested against -
* The invasion of our country across our southern border.

* The rise of the Chinese Communist Party and Russia.

* The woke mind virus spreading from social media to elementary schools, to businesses.

It's never been more critical that we have strong leadership at the helm. Do you think we do, friend? **Do you believe our current federal leaders have what it takes to defend this country?**
---
| | | | | [YES](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96f27e2e828dc09288d3249bf862d5a3518676bd3ddb0498550589359ebb6f70115f55465673ba67fc8e1426ebaff65928fc2a5fde181346)
---
| | | [NO](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96f27e2e828dc09288d3249bf862d5a3518676bd3ddb0498550589359ebb6f70115f55465673ba67fc8e1426ebaff65928fc2a5fde181346)
---
Our team is taking a national pulse to see where you stand. If you're ready for a change--or even if you believe Biden and Congress are strong enough to keep our country moving in the right direction--we need to know about it. Will you respond to our survey?
---
| | [SUBMIT YOUR VOTE](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96f27e2e828dc09288d3249bf862d5a3518676bd3ddb0498550589359ebb6f70115f55465673ba67fc8e1426ebaff65928fc2a5fde181346)
---
Thanks for staying in touch, Team DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96f27e2e828dc09288d3249bf862d5a3518676bd3ddb0498550589359ebb6f70115f55465673ba67fc8e1426ebaff65928fc2a5fde181346)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.
---

**Volunteer!** We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96f27e2e828dc09226c9fefd5e4f77ddba116cc37b12ccff287622147bf27d7c2dcc6eee87963025d627d304e076a0dc04821301213ab88b)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96f27e2e828dc09288d3249bf862d5a3518676bd3ddb0498550589359ebb6f70115f55465673ba67fc8e1426ebaff65928fc2a5fde181346)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96f27e2e828dc09288d3249bf862d5a3518676bd3ddb0498550589359ebb6f70115f55465673ba67fc8e1426ebaff65928fc2a5fde181346)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

|

Dear Peter,
Authentic change in politics comes from just one place – the collective will of the people. Today, we invite you to step into a movement that is reshaping the political landscape.
As RFK Jr. surges in the polls, he needs your support to cross a major threshold: inclusion on the ballot next November. “Your support” means you personally, because we are aspiring to 100% participation.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRY0vlZPDYmnNnFtCCf1wfHw&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraise_video_email_2r_1_nd&n=2)
This is a crucial moment in our campaign.
Unlike the two party candidates, an independent must gather signatures in every state to get on the ballot. Now more than ever, your contribution holds the key to transforming mere hope into actual change. We don’t have the corporate dollars. That’s why we need you to support our 50-state all-out effort.
We understand that not everyone can contribute the same amount. Like the diverse offerings in a church collection basket, every donation, regardless of size, builds solidarity. It says, “We take this mission seriously.” [Even $5 signals the strength of our movement.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraise_video_email_2r_1_nd&n=3)
[As we strive for 100% participation, any amount you can give helps our grassroots efforts to put RFK Jr. on the ballot. Stand with us, be part of the movement, and help restore our democracy.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraise_video_email_2r_1_nd&n=4)

Thank you for your generous support. We WILL make a difference.
Team Kennedy

In the midst of a presidential election, the LEADING contender to win back the White House has been _**GAGGED**_ and _**CENSORED**_ by the ruling party’s Department of “Justice.”
Let me add that every single judge on the D.C. Circuit panel that upheld this tyrannical gag order against me was appointed by a Democrat President.
Make no mistake: this isn’t just about _my_ free speech...
...This is about protecting the integrity of the entire First Amendment against a power-drunk political machine that will stop at nothing to silence and censor anyone who stands in its way.
_As I said in my speech last weekend, the single greatest threat to American democracy is the man who occupies the White House – Crooked Joe Biden._
**And now, he’s attempting to take away my First Amendment right to speak out against his attacks on our democracy.**
**Biden’s Democrats are allowed to viciously attack me, but my right to respond has been ripped from my hands.**
**We are quickly becoming a country where telling the TRUTH is a _CRIME_.**
That’s why I’m now asking YOU to sign my Official Petition to restore my First Amendment Rights – and, ultimately, protect YOURS as well.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I need Tom Barrett in Congress
body:
Michigan’s 7th Congressional District is the top open seat in the country | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1%26ss_email_id%3D65772b3bba937f30e001db71%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%2Bneed%2BTom%2BBarrett%2Bin%2BCongress%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-12-11T15%253A31%253A57Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=u1BU-8UqeJDAlx4N_-Ed9t50cd8%3D)
---
| Peter Willis,When I became Speaker of the House, the first thing I did was sit down with the leadership of the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) to discuss the path to growing our majority.NRCC Chairman Richard Hudson told me that **the top open seat in the country is Michigan’s 7th District** , **and that our top recruit nationally is Tom Barrett** , a 22-year U.S. Army veteran, who served in the Iraq War, and logged more than 1,000 hours as a helicopter pilot.When I read Tom’s background, I knew they were right. He is exactly the kind of common-sense conservative we need in Congress to fight for our traditional values, protect our nation from foreign threats, and focus on the issues that matter to Michigan families. I can’t wait to have him join us and turn this country around from the disastrous policies of Joe Biden and his allies in Congress.
---
[_ _ Protect Our Majority _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fspeaker-johnson-copy-6b10b89ef70e68ae&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=YfBgkbKeQUunjt-y0Sl6xjJ2lYY%3D)
---
Our majority is down to just three seats and we risk losing it if we don’t win Michigan’s 7th District. Donald Trump won the 7th by 4 percent and new polling shows him [leading Joe Biden in Michigan by 5 points](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.freep.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2Felections%2F2023%2F11%2F18%2Felection-2024-biden-trump-poll-michigan%2F71619518007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=EWxw58uqPuS_E5XhqgHtEBT35E4%3D)._**But the fact is, Tom can’t win without you. And I can’t grow our majority without you.**_ Tom’s opponent has already raised 50 percent more than Tom, thanks to Gretchen Whitmer and the Lansing lobbyists, who are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into his campaign.Tom doesn’t have lobbyists and special interest groups funding him, he has solid conservative Americans like you who care about our country and want to save it from the woke progressives tearing it apart.
---
[_ _ Support Tom Barrett _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fspeaker-johnson-copy-6b10b89ef70e68ae&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=YfBgkbKeQUunjt-y0Sl6xjJ2lYY%3D)
---
**December 31st is a critical deadline, and it is important that Tom raise another $300,000 before the end of the year.** I’m writing you because I need you to rush Tom a donation today so that we can save our Republican majority. [Can you send a donation of $25, $50, $100, $500 or even the maximum $3,300 today?](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fspeaker-johnson-copy-6b10b89ef70e68ae&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=YfBgkbKeQUunjt-y0Sl6xjJ2lYY%3D)I don’t make this ask lightly – I know how tight family finances can be right now. Bidenomics has given us record inflation, record gas prices, record grocery costs, and family take-home pay is at a historic low.But we can change that by defeating Joe Biden and electing solid conservatives like Tom Barrett. That’s starts with your support, and I want you to know how much it means to me and the future of our country.Thank you for all you do, and God bless.
---
|
---
Mike JohnsonSpeaker of the House
---
[_ _ Donate Before Dec. 31 _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fspeaker-johnson-copy-6b10b89ef70e68ae&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=YfBgkbKeQUunjt-y0Sl6xjJ2lYY%3D)
---
|
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1%26ss_email_id%3D65772b3bba937f30e001db71%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%2Bneed%2BTom%2BBarrett%2Bin%2BCongress%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-12-11T15%253A31%253A57Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=u1BU-8UqeJDAlx4N_-Ed9t50cd8%3D) | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2FtombarrettMI7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=0dzj-PNNN28EMvSmjN0TtOSNPbg%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Ftombarrettmi7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=iZ7KPJ3jmiJlMm6RKUgFRnmeB2U%3D) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Ftombarrettmi7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=hUHsNDlfxkn6M2kqsQcNtuAUro4%3D) | | [ ](mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com) | | [ ](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65772b3bba937f30e001db71&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fin%2Ftombarrettmi7%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65739ba6cde73b6497ca9dc1&l=en-US&s=Lw7uE35DkPOpic9-8ECJ6l5E2Vc%3D)

body:
As we press forward on the campaign trail, I want to take a moment to share some exciting highlights from the past week!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

I️ hope you enjoyed a phenomenal weekend and that this message finds you in good spirits! As we press forward on the campaign trail, I want to take a moment to share some exciting highlights from the past week and provide insights into my vision for Indiana's future.

Read on for last week's highlights!

** IN THE NEWS: Lt. Governor shares experiences she believes make her fit to be the next governor (https://www.greenfieldreporter.com/2023/12/05/ready-in-red-lt-governor-shares-experiences-which-she-believes-make-her-fit-to-be-the-next-governor/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

I'm the candidate who will get things done, who's committed to tackling the challenges Hoosier families face head-on, and who's leading the fight to #AxeTheTax.

Thank you to the Daily Reporter for sharing my bold vision for our great state.

** SEEN ON SOCIAL: Highlighting Journal Gazette Article (https://www.journalgazette.net/local/local-government/political-notebook/political-notebook-lt-gov-crouch-states-differences-between-her-other-governor-candidates/article_7aa9df60-737e-11ee-a45d-d7767b930843.html?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Hoosiers are suffering under Bidenomics, living paycheck to paycheck. I'm committed to leading the fight to #AxeTheTax (https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/axethetax?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZV5nL8yweMFyBrcyfFBHGdQkmsKaKm8hmObJyMBKnIt1ljs_2ZjepjdnEf8KyoVVs39fgrEZKUFbtJifelgXMgbqZV-7jkmWGlQmGpHz9pzuMv_5ROwBNFUer51P41T_5ILcktIvusygNr3A_OIF2dlO-_SvSh372V65-fc4gQxKS07KwDpA_vemWVOfoxeQqA&__tn__=*NK-R&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , ensuring YOUR financial success. It's time for bold leadership.
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid02XYDXib8BUFtbAJpYR6p6YXJ475JmZ4hfw7vAF1SyJdKZrMXUESw3VgkDo47zZGxTl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ARTICLE (https://www.journalgazette.net/local/local-government/political-notebook/political-notebook-lt-gov-crouch-states-differences-between-her-other-governor-candidates/article_7aa9df60-737e-11ee-a45d-d7767b930843.html?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Celebrating a Major Milestone for Life
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

At the Indiana Right to Life Christmas Gala, we marked a significant milestone for our state – the first Christmas since 1972 with ZERO abortion facilities operating in Indiana!

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I am honored to stand alongside those advocating for the sanctity of life and grateful for the progress we've made.

** Randolph County Candidate Forum
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

At last week's Randolph County GOP Candidate Forum, I shared what makes me stand out – my experience and dedication. We talked about my plan to eliminate the individual income tax, boost mental health resources, and back our law enforcement. It was a great discussion, and I'm excited about the positive changes that are on the horizon!

** Columbus Candidate Forum
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I️ was in Columbus on Friday for a candidate forum focusing on crucial economic development issues.

As someone committed to fostering economic growth, I shared insights on initiatives that will drive progress, create jobs, and ensure Indiana remains a hub for opportunity and innovation.

Thank you to the Greater Columbus Economic Development Corporation for organizing!

** Spreading Holiday Cheer
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Rockport Christmas Parade brought joy and holiday spirit to the community.

It's wonderful to see Hoosiers come together to celebrate the festive season, and I appreciate the warm reception from all those who joined the festivities.

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne is a connector, a strategist, and a visionary. She truly knows and loves Indiana and its people, and her career has been one of exemplary public service. I’ve worked alongside her in the Statehouse and have seen firsthand her tireless work ethic, her deep commitment to Hoosiers, and her determination to find the best ways to keep Indiana growing in strength and opportunities."
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Suzanne is the type of conservative leader who has been fighting for Hoosiers while serving with distinction in various county and state elected roles vital to the growth and prosperity of Indiana. She is an honest, hardworking, dedicated servant to the people of Indiana who has earned our support to serve as our next Governor. I am proud to endorse my friend, Suzanne Couch, as the next Governor of the great state of Indiana."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Suzanne Crouch is the governor we need to fight against the deadly fentanyl that is killing so many Hoosiers. I join other law enforcement officials in endorsing Suzanne for governor, and know she will provide the courage and leadership we need while also supporting our law enforcement personnel and their families."
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I served with Suzanne when she was Vanderburgh County Auditor and am supporting her for governor because she understands the importance of local and state government working together. As Lt. Governor, Suzanne works to deliver results for Hoosier families and businesses."

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you, thank you, thank you for your support. It means the world to me, and it continues to propel us forward.

For those of you who may still be getting to know me, let me share a bit about my roots—I'm a proud product of southern Indiana, raised with core values centered on hard work, education, integrity, and kindness. It's these values that I️ am committed to upholding as we work together to build a stronger and more prosperous Indiana.

Together, we will make a positive difference for Hoosiers.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=0217e8867b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_04_04_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0217e8867b-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

body:
| | | **BREAKING via _The Hill_ : "Biden's approval rating increased," but we still haven't heard from _you!_ **
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/16581?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&akid=12852%2E9716520%2EWG-06o)
**WE'RE MISSING YOUR RESPONSE:**
**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/16581?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&akid=12852%2E9716520%2EWG-06o)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/16581?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&akid=12852%2E9716520%2EWG-06o)
---

This is great news, team: President Biden's approval rating continues to increase as polls show him _statistically tied_ with Donald Trump!

President Biden is moving the country in the right direction by strengthening our economy, creating 14 MILLION jobs, and reducing inflation -- _and**Americans are taking notice.**_

But to defend our incredible progress under the Biden-Harris administration, we need to confirm that Democrats are supporting President Biden and REJECTING a Trump comeback! **_So please, let us know your response before the midnight deadline:_**

**Supporter:[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/16581?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&akid=12852%2E9716520%2EWG-06o)**
---
**Response: _Missing!_**
**Deadline:_11:59 P.M._**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/16581?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&akid=12852%2E9716520%2EWG-06o)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/16581?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231211-BidenApprovalAlert-BidenApprovalScrollingGIF-Pros-sl1&akid=12852%2E9716520%2EWG-06o)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q4-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=12852_9716520_WG-06o&akid=12852%2E9716520%2EWG-06o)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: can I tell you a story about doughnuts? 🍩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Rick Scott and I don't have much in common...
| | |
---
Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my grassroots campaign to defeat Rick Scott here in Florida. But first, I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts.
[**(If you're short on time and ready to chip in, you can click here to help me flip Florida blue! My race is neck and neck, so every gift makes a difference.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74967025/443191350/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk406-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQ2M2I5ODYtM2I5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5RIBACUI6zaT9sR_u3LrlFhnUOONoGb6TCbzIZ5Cubs=)
Rick Scott and I don't have much in common. He wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare; I spent my time in Congress fighting to defend these lifesaving programs. He made a massive fortune as the CEO of a company convicted of the largest Medicare fraud in history; I've spent my life working for nonprofits and serving my community. He's used his time in public office to push a far-right agenda and get richer; I've used my time in office to fight for working families like mine.
But there's one thing that we do share: **We both got our start in the doughnut business.**
For Rick Scott, that looked like buying two doughnut shops as a business investment when he was a young man. Owning these shops was his first foray into corporate America.
But for me, a teenager back then and an immigrant, the doughnut business offered a minimum wage job that I could work before homeroom. **It was hard work, but my small paychecks helped make up the gap each month so that my mom could pay the bills.**
**To me, doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. ****To Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of the private corporate career that made him a mega-millionaire.**
If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear.
**I know we can win — and new polling data shows this race is already tied! But Rick Scott spent $64 of his own money million to buy this seat in 2018, and he's already shelled out $3 MILLION to pay for new attack ads.** **[I can't win this race without your help. So please, if you have anything to spare, will you rush $5 now to defeat Rick Scott and give Floridians the leadership they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74967027/443191351/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk406-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQ2M2I5ODYtM2I5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5RIBACUI6zaT9sR_u3LrlFhnUOONoGb6TCbzIZ5Cubs=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: 🚨 Inside ABQ's Crime Wave: A Must-See Exposé 🚨
body:
NEW for dpwillis67@gmail.com - No Doubt About It Podcast Episode 59 | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=313ecfcd7a&e=567664f14c)

We're excited to share the latest episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, and it's a conversation you won't want to miss!

**→**[**STREAM NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f7f2d7c5fa&e=567664f14c)**
**
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=221c3370bc&e=567664f14c)
In this episode, we sat down with Mark Aragon and Nick Layman, the creators of Albuquerque Raw, a fiercely independent platform shedding light on crime across the Albuquerque Metro area. Join us as we unravel their journey, exploring the shift from covering local events to diving into the gritty world of crime reporting. We tackle the challenging task of deciphering accurate crime statistics and the intriguing disparities between their data and that of the Albuquerque Police Department.
| [STREAM EPISODE 59 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a06179d475&e=567664f14c)
---
This conversation takes us deep into the intricacies of homicide reporting, the evolving role of public information officers (PIOs), and the fundamental change in their approach to disseminating information. Our guests emphasize the vital role alternative media outlets like ABQ Raw play in providing accurate and timely information.
| [STREAM EPISODE 59 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6a11b7471a&e=567664f14c)
---
As the discussion unfolds, we dissect fluctuating crime numbers, speculate on the links between crime, open borders, and property crime, and scrutinize the Department of Justice's intervention in the Albuquerque Police Department. Chief Harold Medina and his leadership are also put under the microscope as we evaluate their impact on the current crime situation.
→ [**STREAM NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=140dffde37&e=567664f14c)**

But that's not all – we also delve into the hurdles that media outlets face in crime reporting, emphasizing the need for transparency and direct communication with the public.**
|
---
If you find this episode as insightful as we do, please consider supporting us by liking, subscribing, and leaving a review on your favorite podcast platform. Don't forget to subscribe to our YouTube channel for more engaging content.

For those looking to offer financial support or grab some exclusive podcast gear, visit [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d8712c93ca&e=567664f14c).

Thank you for being a part of our community, and we can't wait for you to join the conversation!
Best regards,

Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0d106c80a5&e=567664f14c)
|
---

Our mailing address is:
8100 Wyoming Blvd NESTE M4, #171Albuquerque, NM 87113

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=7f56d6befe) or [unsubscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=7f56d6befe)
---

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: When you woke up today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You probably didn’t wake up today thinking you’d make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC
#

Friends -
When you woke up this morning, you probably didn’t think you’d be making your first contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
But today we’re asking you if you can do just that.
[**If you already know that you’re able to give today, please use this link to make a contribution.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=1&akid=7019%2E3935704%2EGdeCa3)
Allow us to explain:
At the end of this month, we’ll be facing our end of year FEC deadline. All of our fundraising deadlines are crucial, but this deadline is undoubtedly the most important one of the year. Our gun lobby adversaries will be scouring our report to see what we raised in 2023, and they’ll use our numbers to gauge our ability to help support gun safety champions in the 2024 elections.
This means there’s simply no room to fall short.
Our preparations to hold our gun safety Senate majority and elect gun safety champions at all levels of government in 2024 are well underway. We have to raise a lot to help elect new leaders and beat the NRA’s hold on our Congress.
So while you may not have woken up today thinking you’d contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC, we hope we’ve now convinced you that today is the perfect day to do so.
[**So please, use this link to make a contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=2&akid=7019%2E3935704%2EGdeCa3)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-dec23.eB6WxE&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=21&akid=7019%2E3935704%2EGdeCa3)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec23.xM0yow&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=22&akid=7019%2E3935704%2EGdeCa3)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-dec23.4nQm2O&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=23&akid=7019%2E3935704%2EGdeCa3)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec23.sy2DIk&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=24&akid=7019%2E3935704%2EGdeCa3)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-dec23.H_9s2_&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=25&akid=7019%2E3935704%2EGdeCa3)**

Thank you,

The GIFFORDS Team

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7019%2E3935704%2EGdeCa3) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: NRSC Polling Division
subject: December Battleground Assessment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We’re updating our battleground polling data for 2024 and need your feedback.

Friend,

With less than one month until the most important election year in American history, we’re fielding our **[December Battleground Assessment](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686321%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BmojeF%2bQ3jlzbHotsgnqxw&sysid=1) **now to gauge the GOP’s support in critical swing states for next year.

_****[< < TAKE THE DECEMBER BATTLEGROUND ASSESSMENT >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686322%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NUNNrkmpo9dD5dPBD8Yzog&sysid=1)****_
Crooked Joe Biden and the socialist Senate Democrats have proven time and time again that they are unfit to lead America forward.
_****[Soaring inflation, a wide open southern border, loss of energy independence, two new wars, and an economy in ruins.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686323%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gkiq4XqiTTM55uAHtpt5gA&sysid=1)** **_
These are just some of the radical left’s accomplishments after years of controlling both the White House and the Senate majority.
_It’s safe to say the American people deserve much better leadership than what Biden and his liberal cronies in the Senate like Chuck Schumer are capable of offering them._

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A note I recently received
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=901%2E135344%2EW-VpQ8)

Today, I wanted to put some names and faces to a huge part of our fundraising: the small dollar donor. When I talk about building a team of grassroots supporters, this is what I mean:
**Rohn in Lansing gave $5 this month.** I’ve been his Member of Congress for four years. It has been such an honor to represent Lansing in the U.S. House of Representatives, and I am so grateful for the support of this community in my race for statewide office.
**Ann in Benton Harbor contributed $35 back in August.** I had just visited Benton Harbor. I’ve met voters there in a rented restaurant, and people are fired up about 2024. Thank you for your support!
**Gerald from Detroit donated $100 last week.** I don’t know him and don’t believe we’ve met, but I have loved getting to know voters in Detroit and spending so much time in the city.
It’s people like Rohn, Ann, Gerald, and you who make up the critical foundation of this campaign. At the risk of sounding like a broken record, it really is these $5, $35, $100 donations that make up the building blocks of our team – and help set the course for how early we can hire more staff, go up on TV, and do the critical work of reaching voters.
[**I’m so thankful to everyone who has given so far, and if you’re able, I would love to earn your support today so we can continue building the strongest damn Senate campaign Michigan has ever seen!](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231211-1-tt&t=2&akid=901%2E135344%2EW-VpQ8)**

Elissa

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Never Surrender
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5029a7eb191e45329a2773f6eb052572&_e=AUA-oFFhv6rGE2YRDTDLzmB_gWduplTehPe2gRC3BdOhyqsOT083l5B_HEhzSlMeVjU8EFa9YiH-M8jX-cZ6QkEobP7I7a3oiWB_jkITyOl9xPmoBviLPcIc2nCJgILZgSwCRdBEyY1dc3WeiumRXyqVfNStoDLBJNLxxn18FljywUF_dzwfGoeXV0Mq32wiGeoXQ77LMb5lMX_bTdUxxwL6hoBWlWEXSNKdk-UyXo2GD2GFvb0OYkvGPTZhh7RsnbRSdFPtnT-i8QyGvlRt5g%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Hoisting the flag of surrender. My name is CAPT Hung Cao - in 1975 my family and I fled Vietnam the month the Viet Cong captured Saigon. The American Dream saved my family's lives, and ever since, I have made it my mission to serve this great nation and pay our debt off in FULL. After graduating from the US Naval Academy, I became a Navy Special Operations Officer serving in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia, defusing roadside bombs. After 25 years of service, I decided to hang up my uniform and return home to my wife and kids. Upon my return, I realized we were facing a battle right here, in our own backyard. Fellow Patriot, despite their political talking points, we are being put LAST. As we all get poorer, the politicians in Washington are only getting richer. I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring the radical left's self-serving and FAILED agenda to a screeching halt. Chuck Schumer, Tim Kaine & Joe Biden aren't taking my declaration of war lightly. Every day Americans deserve a voice, and unlike the 2-faced phonies in DC who're tied down to the will of special interest groups, NO ONE is pulling my strings. **[I've never backed down from a fight, and I still owe America for gifting me the chance to thrive. clean_body: | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Hoisting the flag of surrender. My name is CAPT Hung Cao - in 1975 my family and I fled Vietnam the month the Viet Cong captured Saigon. The American Dream saved my family's lives, and ever since, I have made it my mission to serve this great nation and pay our debt off in FULL. After graduating from the US Naval Academy, I became a Navy Special Operations Officer serving in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia, defusing roadside bombs. After 25 years of service, I decided to hang up my uniform and return home to my wife and kids. Upon my return, I realized we were facing a battle right here, in our own backyard. Fellow Patriot, despite their political talking points, we are being put LAST. As we all get poorer, the politicians in Washington are only getting richer. I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring the radical left's self-serving and FAILED agenda to a screeching halt. Chuck Schumer, Tim Kaine & Joe Biden aren't taking my declaration of war lightly. Every day Americans deserve a voice, and unlike the 2-faced phonies in DC who're tied down to the will of special interest groups, NO ONE is pulling my strings. Your support will be the make-or-break moment for my race. Thank you! In Liberty CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Team Hung Cao NEW Merchandise | I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back. But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I'm running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything.The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Greedflation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Tax cuts for the ultra-rich don't spur economic growth. Trickle down economics is a myth. Prosperity begins with the American workforce. When hardworking families have more spending power, it stimulates the economy and drives demand for businesses and jobs.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Greedflation2.png]
My opponent voted for tax cuts for wealthy corporations and billionaires that caused the third largest deficit in US history. Zero billionaires live in our district, so who the hell in is Rep. Bergman fighting for?
CONTRIBUTE TO CHANGE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/1629770877521_regional_screenshot.png]
Friend,
America is on the path to a Corporatocracy. Large corporations made record profits on the backs of American families during the pandemic. Let's start calling it what it was — greedflation.
From July 2020 through July 2022, inflation rose by 14%, but corporate profits rose by 75%, five times as fast. Price inflation has many causes, but this one is especially unacceptable.
When corporations are large enough to control entire markets, they reduce competition and harm customers and workers. This needs to stop, and the first step is to recognize the facts.
The 2017 Republican tax bill lowered the corporate tax rate from 35% to 21%. The wealthiest Americans received huge tax cuts. Republicans added $1.8 trillion to the national debt — the most in US history.
Rep. Jack Bergman and other proponents claimed that the corporate tax cuts would trickle down to a $4,000 raise for the average family, but that benefit never materialized.
Trickle-down economics doesn't work, has never worked and will never work.
- Help me replace this antiquated way of thinking that only benefits the big cats in Washington. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] Help me empower everyday hardworking Americans.
Together, we can create a more equitable, financially sustainable economy that improves the lives of many, not just a selected few. Your contribution helps us extend our message of labor reform and family-sustaining wages across the country.
Thank you.
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
DONATE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
shop.votedrbob.com [shop.votedrbob.com]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

---
This is absolutely disgusting behavior from Eli Crane (AZ-2). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74970810/443205212/1907298925?amount=2&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20231211_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE5OWNmNmMtNDA5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RkFQRHgG-Hp7egMsUU4YikEsScC6umjaVQLHg7vVg_w=) Somehow Crane and his staff managed to make Christmas racist, with Border Patrol Elves and a sign that reads, “Have Documents Ready.” [**If you’re sick of Eli’s antics, pitch in $2 or more to help us flip AZ-2 next November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74970811/443205213/1907298925?amount=2&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20231211_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE5OWNmNmMtNDA5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RkFQRHgG-Hp7egMsUU4YikEsScC6umjaVQLHg7vVg_w=) This kind of racist rhetoric has no place anywhere in our government. We should be working together to find sensible solutions to address immigration, not using the situation as the butt of a bad joke for a Christmas decorating competition. body:
Did you hear that applause? You just got a standing ovation at State GOP HQ for three reasons.

| |
---
| | | **You Knocked Our Socks Off, Friend! **

Did you hear that applause? You just got a standing ovation at State GOP HQ for three reasons:

Your Patriotism is STUNNING...

Your support for the America First Agenda is AMAZING...

State Republicans wouldn't be where we are today without your incredible support!

**So, in honor of YOU, our leaders have activated a rare offer to[1000% match any gift you give, but for TODAY ONLY.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq6g5m1fsh9r9nea06nntajlmo0nnirlq6spd67g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj60oj2cjh2bs "1000% match any gift you give, but for TODAY ONLY.")**

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdqmacdegt0sljsf313sqjilm61sistl271urjjg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj60oj2cjh2bs)
---
Thanks to patriots like you, Friend, we continue to protect and expand our Red State Legislative majorities month after month. But these majorities are under unprecedented attacks from the Left. Far-Left groups have already outspent Conservatives by TENS OF MILLIONS in key states this year alone. And they've pledged to spend even MORE in 2024 to chip away at GOP majorities. If we don't step up to the plate, we'll lose elections up and down the ballot.
---
| | [10X MATCH NOW!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zikchpds3pvp9kps70sv2dp0j1v8g3lp77gcj52o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj60oj2cjh2bs "10X MATCH NOW!")
---
That's why we're turning to trusted Patriots like you, Friend, who share the same strong Conservative vision for America. _This 1000% match isn 't available to everyone, and we don't want it to go to waste_! **[Will you kindly utilize this gift before it expires at 11:59 PM tonight?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zff559jnv31k5g07b7togfh4lel7u509726nn0p0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj60oj2cjh2bs "Will you kindly utilize this gift before it expires at 11:59 PM tonight?")**

Thank you,

Sophia, State GOP HQ

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Busy Philipps
subject: I got my hands on the Congressional Burn Book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
You NEED to see Schweikert’s entry.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74972953/443212157/141055548?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.11_b1_bp_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmIxMGQ3YzItNDQ5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UuUoVmHXJBVTLjOxj4HYHeu-NVQvJroc3WcQ6KOIQ0s=) Peter – it’s Busy Philipps. You might know me from _Freaks and Geeks_ , _Cougar Town_ , _Girls5eva_ , or the very exciting upcoming _Mean Girls_ movie. But today, I’m reaching out as Andrei Cherny’s friend.

Andrei is so totally fetch (yes, _I’m making it happen_), and I’ve been proud to call him and his wife, Stephanie, friends for over 20 years. I grew up, and my family still lives, in Scottsdale in the district Andrei’s running to represent in Congress, and I’m doing everything I can to help him get elected and defeat right-wing David Schweikert. [**I hope you’ll let me show you his Congressional “Burn Book” entry, but if you’re already with me, will you join me in supporting Andrei and make a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74972954/443212176/141055548?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.11_b1_bp_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmIxMGQ3YzItNDQ5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UuUoVmHXJBVTLjOxj4HYHeu-NVQvJroc3WcQ6KOIQ0s=) | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74972956/443212178/141055548?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.11_b1_bp_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmIxMGQ3YzItNDQ5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UuUoVmHXJBVTLjOxj4HYHeu-NVQvJroc3WcQ6KOIQ0s=)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Whatever it takes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Pennsylvania is shaping up to be one of the most competitive races on the map, and I need your support.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1350%2E552475%2E_IAK1H)
Hi, Bob Casey here.
I’m up for re-election in one of the most competitive battlegrounds of 2024. The Democratic Senate majority is on the line, and I’m number four on Mitch McConnell’s target list as part of his strategy to flip the Senate.
They are willing to spend an unprecedented amount of money, alongside my mega-millionaire opponent, to turn Pennsylvania red.
**[This is going to be the toughest race of my career, and I need your help to counter the attacks and build a campaign that can win. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help us prepare for the road ahead?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231211-1?refcode=em20231211-1&refcode2=1350_552475__IAK1H&akid=1350%2E552475%2E_IAK1H)**

Bob Casey

More than 8,394 donations were made to my campaign in October with **an average gift of $10**. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 88% since October 2021.**

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $10](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=36656f048f74414b8d37eb66b36f0b0a&_e=aGCPbRSRU6oG8FAWWnkjC3ifPolMdjspTLYElkHWL4puZizkV5pyDcgECI31KFYATVwpQxjt0LsZae87jHvAX-dnBnEGS_xQ-UekJVx_m8nD_ftTqQLs0fMP-47BxjuQuMrioxMBKN4pCObu4c7YeTCSVBob5dToq8ud3J1WvqWBKDFtPDFB9eLaB1DQpFEyrvvwjKBlncSj1BOWy0JP8iJCVWgbk4_GvqyhygI0-mnJ0a_RpwI1SMpFHU_rgVmlgBGgfEkkhhjGQKQxqUo0zN5OydZWBlortmUskagpeoPBQY9zVvF73WlJBHxDv6hkeXqbtqdQH-X7mgUbrzRvcMohyGS2m0wSE_LPtAd5yKPSSsyG8tcpjqNSwQGDXdsq5V0on6TUCOb84IM2Iwx-fpqB9SqArDeS-Qy46CqPWPc%3D)** , our average October donation, to help us get a head start on our December fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $10
**](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=36656f048f74414b8d37eb66b36f0b0a&_e=aGCPbRSRU6oG8FAWWnkjC3ifPolMdjspTLYElkHWL4puZizkV5pyDcgECI31KFYATVwpQxjt0LsZae87jHvAX-dnBnEGS_xQ-UekJVx_m8nD_ftTqQLs0fMP-47BxjuQuMrioxMBKN4pCObu4c7YeTCSVBob5dToq8ud3J1WvqWBKDFtPDFB9eLaB1DQpFEyrvvwjKBlncSj1BOWy0JP8iJCVWgbk4_GvqyhygI0-mnJ0a_RpwI1SMpFHU_rgVmlgBGgfEkkhhjGQKQxqUo0zDCtvBPgOwmNdrdKtwKXTzx-SoE3KkWyNamQLGq_paotDmFROdusS9RiCR03ZUExgA5cIRfJI_ZO_3-of20bzfTl-VcvvEwmDvhMs7Tx4qecOgLBM-Tlbk-B8EkkMzMri6McSVd3bn4Mf63ssYy7V-E%3D)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in 2021, **[yet 88% of our supporters who gave then aren’t giving now](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=36656f048f74414b8d37eb66b36f0b0a&_e=aGCPbRSRU6oG8FAWWnkjC3ifPolMdjspTLYElkHWL4puZizkV5pyDcgECI31KFYATVwpQxjt0LsZae87jHvAX-dnBnEGS_xQ-UekJVx_m8nD_ftTqQLs0fMP-47BxjuQuMrioxMBKN4pCObu4c7YeTCSVBob5dToq8ud3J1WvqWBKDFtPDFB9eLaB1DQpFEyrvvwjKBlncSj1BOWy0JP8iJCVWgbk4_GvqyhygI0-mnJ0a_RpwI1SMpFHU_rgVmlgBGgfEkkhhjGQKQxqUo0zPt3pRSPS3lGUWjeDWfK3Q8ReazRXLZEvXd_wDRp3hOZvY82E413WagWxtA0uDM3G5IigTKiqphm5SViALdQURLSaJd0PeFUnFUIyKQQOXKfR94Spv096LXCFk9EBIP1WKLggNX0FCGeZrMaVNdffkI%3D)**. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by **[chipping in $10](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=36656f048f74414b8d37eb66b36f0b0a&_e=aGCPbRSRU6oG8FAWWnkjC3ifPolMdjspTLYElkHWL4puZizkV5pyDcgECI31KFYATVwpQxjt0LsZae87jHvAX-dnBnEGS_xQ-UekJVx_m8nD_ftTqQLs0fMP-47BxjuQuMrioxMBKN4pCObu4c7YeTCSVBob5dToq8ud3J1WvqWBKDFtPDFB9eLaB1DQpFEyrvvwjKBlncSj1BOWy0JP8iJCVWgbk4_GvqyhygI0-mnJ0a_RpwI1SMpFHU_rgVmlgBGgfEkkhhjGQKQxqUo0zMg47_Shc_aNlW0zq_A5O49HIXK9c8ZHPri_ruqoPxA-XWCqQVLCibxzTqTEbO6hfWB3JoKQVQlVA2QPG7QAb9jGGg0B1-4ywldds-wjceT8hBm0KMEZ7Robf5Rdc1xjic5elCsO7BYlIH6D1bSklFE%3D)** or another amount today?

[**CHIP IN $10
**](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=36656f048f74414b8d37eb66b36f0b0a&_e=aGCPbRSRU6oG8FAWWnkjC3ifPolMdjspTLYElkHWL4puZizkV5pyDcgECI31KFYATVwpQxjt0LsZae87jHvAX-dnBnEGS_xQ-UekJVx_m8nD_ftTqQLs0fMP-47BxjuQuMrioxMBKN4pCObu4c7YeTCSVBob5dToq8ud3J1WvqWBKDFtPDFB9eLaB1DQpFEyrvvwjKBlncSj1BOWy0JP8iJCVWgbk4_GvqyhygI0-mnJ0a_RpwI1SMpFHU_rgVmlgBGgfEkkhhjGQKQxqUo0zDgZ-qJXRXl3RoiO4JDP307WsXY-fdXHgY2ahym2RPDiXy9Hki4iidEUVBjI3xrTWpktkHCQVWEdIPqJgCktCriZ1rAdaySmLJmJjC1gjJbhyujdO-W1EhqET_3I7CBNbkkXqiLsCOR6aqItgb5YxCo%3D)
When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _**Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it**_.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, **putting a damper on our efforts to keep our extremely slim House majority**. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consifder my request for a donation today? **[Whether it’s $5, $15, or the October average of $10, every contribution counts](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=36656f048f74414b8d37eb66b36f0b0a&_e=aGCPbRSRU6oG8FAWWnkjC3ifPolMdjspTLYElkHWL4puZizkV5pyDcgECI31KFYATVwpQxjt0LsZae87jHvAX-dnBnEGS_xQ-UekJVx_m8nD_ftTqQLs0fMP-47BxjuQuMrioxMBKN4pCObu4c7YeTCSVBob5dToq8ud3J1WvqWBKDFtPDFB9eLaB1DQpFEyrvvwjKBlncSj1BOWy0JP8iJCVWgbk4_GvqyhygI0-mnJ0a_RpwI1SMpFHU_rgVmlgBGgfEkkhhjGQKQxqUo0zJrgcJar9sgMUALWfItxQGAcLuqYePSDcuk0hH5KqaOLHyvKbftXZDe56h5H2HK3viJgMXjuanEx25g7UnSndJicWVaqKJ34p-KOKinfXIRHe52vHFq6ASxV6ELPO1xRO-kek0IbVVUtpoBAHs9LdwI%3D)** - every single contribution matters.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. | | $10 More than 8,394 donations were made to my campaign in October with an average gift of $10. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 88% since October 2021. This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, , our average October donation, to help us get a head start on our December fundraising? Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to. Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. Not me. Not now, not ever. I know a couple of things to be true: We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1 That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in 2021, . If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by or another amount today? When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it. With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, putting a damper on our efforts to keep our extremely slim House majority. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consifder my request for a donation today? - every single contribution matters. For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful executive within the gun industry. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms and rigging the system for the rich.
**Ryan is running as an advocate for ALL Montanans and as a champion for our Montana way of life.**

clean_body: We reached out to tell you about the devastating effects Gianforte’s tax hikes are having on everyday Montanans Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey Peter, it’s the team here at Busse for Montana HQ. We reached out to tell you about the devastating effects Gianforte’s tax hikes are having on everyday Montanans — and judging by your responses, you’re just as fed up as we are with Greedy Greg. So we came up with a little surprise we think you’ll like: | | (And if you want to help us fire this guy for good,= and read on for his original message.) Begin Forwarded Message from Ryan Busse: It’s safe to say that Montanans are fed up with Greg Gianforte’s antics, and for good reason. His recent property tax hike is already having devastating effects on decent, hardworking people. Here’s a recent headline I saw that really jerked my chain: SOURCE: KTVQ When retirees are going back to work to cover the cost of their property taxes, that’s a HUGE problem — but Gianforte couldn’t care less about taxpayers (you know, the people who sign his paychecks). = And did you know that Gianforte just won a property tax lawsuit to hit Montanans with even more property taxes? Happy Holidays...your new bill will be in the mail. That lawsuit puts another $80 MILLION into Gianforte’s slush fund with no plans for using those dollars for the benefit of everyday Montanans. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = It’s time for a new brand for Montana, one that stands up for folks who actually live and work here, who rely on strong public education and a government that works FOR them, not against them. Are you in? LFG, — Ryan | | | ---|---|--- = For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful executive within the gun industry. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms and rigging the system for the rich. Ryan is running as an advocate for ALL Montanans and as a champion for our Montana way of life.** | = = Paid for by Busse for Montana Busse for Montana PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | Our invitation-only, Team Cassidy Strategy Call is back... Our invitation-only,****Team Cassidy Strategy Call** is back, Friend! Typically, access to these calls is only available to Senator Cassidy’s Top Supporters, but we’re excited to offer you special access**TODAY** if you join his**2024 Senate Rescue Team! Don’t miss out on this incredible offer! | | We’re looking forward to seeing****YOUR** name at the top of the list of our Senate Rescue Team Members on our next call! As always, thank you so much for your continued support. Until next time, Team Cassidy | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate?** Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Team Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 == \-

subject: Are you part of the 71%?
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98b308113e3f468ab785f6db995f99c4&_e=G7ka_y0LlivySmzs2Us1aqbWnLIHqdCk_7n7-GvFrMPs0ceVVXtlQKA1bFi3ul3wp0N_j6Kgb2PzGb6Bb6XAQ41eQrFoMXFYggoqznyFAUOOveZwtCKFAapGdibt1lJrABaBuqmj32AglP5JRCD3o2xOyoadzY98pyIxp2KNJ_9XG_p7dE-IS4zjE803naWOgUwEnAvB0QUY9kCXkTYDN9b4tTRsryZYDpdd4JGsilGAEgtCpA-IIpZfCPjKrR2T3I7GipYwus8K58xa-lyCMYSU6deSuT0ywLatrIhoZMRjtJFKkyDT6tQRdeOWmPwCzMxTvXcKeat1wzej4xWVBnC9pfSbtWwj9Cc_0LBtcyf68XAYLdh6PDsW6qHmaAT_)
---
Hi, friend. Ted Cruz here. _Far too many_ career politicians in D.C. are desperate to cling onto their power by any means necessary. And left unchecked, they hold their power for **DECADES!__[THIS IS WRONG>>](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98b308113e3f468ab785f6db995f99c4&_e=G7ka_y0LlivySmzs2Us1aqbWnLIHqdCk_7n7-GvFrMPs0ceVVXtlQKA1bFi3ul3wp0N_j6Kgb2PzGb6Bb6XAQ41eQrFoMXFYggoqznyFAUOOveZwtCKFAapGdibt1lJrABaBuqmj32AglP5JRCD3o2xOyoadzY98pyIxp2KNJ_9XG_p7dE-IS4zjE803naWOgUwEnAvB0QUY9kCXkTYDN9b4tTRsryZYDpdd4JGsilG0baftXPGqEU0iSYsLj86FgIYLh5pjI7ejCstCevqyeupY9r7XzAyaI1yGk_USXnOuEYmFJD9yUiIXuico13gL7uqsYohz9tre9tZCXWFx4_nQWzDsGZ7gWKce6DokM5n9qBe42KKaG78KpCYibK0L)__** That's why I am sponsoring legislation to _**[add a Term Limits Amendment to the U.S. Constitution](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98b308113e3f468ab785f6db995f99c4&_e=G7ka_y0LlivySmzs2Us1aqbWnLIHqdCk_7n7-GvFrMPs0ceVVXtlQKA1bFi3ul3wp0N_j6Kgb2PzGb6Bb6XAQ41eQrFoMXFYggoqznyFAUOOveZwtCKFAapGdibt1lJrABaBuqmj32AglP5JRCD3o2xOyoadzY98pyIxp2KNJ_9XG_p7dE-IS4zjE803naWOgUwEnAvB0QUY9kCXkTYDN9b4tTRsryZYDpdd4JGsilGjw5W8JIceC4ACWjzlhC0bpMJQgl4omIjahKvTStnQ0_7kn3s5KJl_gPQaFToze2i2dGomms3W0kJcQkKnQLPlrspg1ii0V2BjOcItGdYNHijU6Fxa9Ja9hqWv6VhLCOo599gH-Lkx80vPc0ExgAky)**_ and why I am hopeful you will support this effort with your own voice today. Under my Term Limits Amendment, lawmakers in D.C. would:
* Serve a **MAXIMUM** of three terms in the House or just two terms in the Senate
* Focus on their constituents, **NOT** the lobbyists who fund their campaigns
* **LEAVE OFFICE** after they reach their term limit, returning to their home states and letting their voters elect a new "citizen-legislator" to represent them

---
[**SUPPORT TERM LIMITS**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98b308113e3f468ab785f6db995f99c4&_e=G7ka_y0LlivySmzs2Us1aqbWnLIHqdCk_7n7-GvFrMPs0ceVVXtlQKA1bFi3ul3wp0N_j6Kgb2PzGb6Bb6XAQ41eQrFoMXFYggoqznyFAUOOveZwtCKFAapGdibt1lJrABaBuqmj32AglP5JRCD3o2xOyoadzY98pyIxp2KNJ_9XG_p7dE-IS4zjE803naWOgUwEnAvB0QUY9kCXkTYDN9b4tTRsryZYDpdd4JGsilF5uJWaOHwUocbW-6k_FDE4RTpfKDNeuCkqWMC4toDqPiSM_WXNuhf3mfuzDRXTZF-veNCoKglT9Al6-3GtVYYKbs2CnEhA5osz3xNmoiTt_KD9XgeV-hMZrFt7BAEfe5xnpPvT-gwy37k7gj_7kAcv)
---
| | This would be a huge, lasting change for government in America, returning us to the vision our Founders had when they created our republic. No kings, no entrenched ruling elite, just free-born citizens managing our own affairs. It's also hugely popular. Every survey conducted recently shows **at least 70% of the American people support putting term limits on Congress. ** That's why career politicians like Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and President Biden _(with their_ __88 combined years__ _ "serving" the American people)_ want to shut my Term Limits Amendment down before it builds any momentum. _**[And that's why I am so anxious to know that you support our fight FOR TERM LIMITS.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98b308113e3f468ab785f6db995f99c4&_e=G7ka_y0LlivySmzs2Us1aqbWnLIHqdCk_7n7-GvFrMPs0ceVVXtlQKA1bFi3ul3wp0N_j6Kgb2PzGb6Bb6XAQ41eQrFoMXFYggoqznyFAUOOveZwtCKFAapGdibt1lJrABaBuqmj32AglP5JRCD3o2xOyoadzY98pyIxp2KNJ_9XG_p7dE-IS4zjE803naWOgUwEnAvB0QUY9kCXkTYDN9b4tTRsryZYDpdd4JGsilHbRH45nTttZ4cTPPLf8jLHkUILXg3nEFt1jAGb1oCNPpeR9P1eGMa_bFXmRUPpC-v4SRF9wr4blxzrugtCTfdcQgd9-6u5VXLVAgpy4wPDTq0Bnh8nwUrZLPxKKWKkxGWUUxs0w8PFH28h62Pvpfoj)**_
---
[**RUSH IN NOW**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98b308113e3f468ab785f6db995f99c4&_e=G7ka_y0LlivySmzs2Us1aqbWnLIHqdCk_7n7-GvFrMPs0ceVVXtlQKA1bFi3ul3wp0N_j6Kgb2PzGb6Bb6XAQ41eQrFoMXFYggoqznyFAUOOveZwtCKFAapGdibt1lJrABaBuqmj32AglP5JRCD3o2xOyoadzY98pyIxp2KNJ_9XG_p7dE-IS4zjE803naWOgUwEnAvB0QUY9kCXkTYDN9b4tTRsryZYDpdd4JGsilGpU_Y6tYM82Jf7iuriymTRDlpkWaxKhBcXmthSccDBBAcBfLkDR2Ih428zjBGNSv1luzoFtF1jIPOllskJmw5H_Vcvk9xWpyo53hbmgiMjFef5oqirwCJTKhE9suqow1mfdF8u8kjMz0HcpEh768uu)
---
Because while I am not a career politician myself, I've been in D.C. long enough to know that **nothing moves here unless it is pushed - HARD - by grassroots citizens **writing, calling, and emailing their lawmakers in numbers so huge they can't be ignored. My friends at Club for Growth have already done a lot of the work here, _**[typing up petitions](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98b308113e3f468ab785f6db995f99c4&_e=G7ka_y0LlivySmzs2Us1aqbWnLIHqdCk_7n7-GvFrMPs0ceVVXtlQKA1bFi3ul3wp0N_j6Kgb2PzGb6Bb6XAQ41eQrFoMXFYggoqznyFAUOOveZwtCKFAapGdibt1lJrABaBuqmj32AglP5JRCD3o2xOyoadzY98pyIxp2KNJ_9XG_p7dE-IS4zjE803naWOgUwEnAvB0QUY9kCXkTYDN9b4tTRsryZYDpdd4JGsilFi6Pzhv8C23XrTS7FcS7C3PayUxNgtFBzmgd66fb3b1n1BZ65yAycyjpntrsm7Syf9ycmmTOLO9Dbt8evN4l97P3YUTLG9UwcK5TcQ2FqmlfyMrVtnw5dUyiiJxZ0thGC-LaQ-pHvgotWoWhVaaiHh)**_ and gathering signatures in support. Club employees will combine them, with thousands more being mailed in by concerned citizens in your state, and deliver them all to Capitol Hill at a moment of maximum impact as I fight on the Senate floor to drive my term limits bill forward. **There needs to be a HUGE stack of PETITIONS on every lawmaker 's desk!** And if you agree, I urge you to give a voluntary contribution of _**[$25, $35, $50, $100, or more](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=98b308113e3f468ab785f6db995f99c4&_e=G7ka_y0LlivySmzs2Us1aqbWnLIHqdCk_7n7-GvFrMPs0ceVVXtlQKA1bFi3ul3wp0N_j6Kgb2PzGb6Bb6XAQ41eQrFoMXFYggoqznyFAUOOveZwtCKFAapGdibt1lJrABaBuqmj32AglP5JRCD3o2xOyoadzY98pyIxp2KNJ_9XG_p7dE-IS4zjE803naWOgUwEnAvB0QUY9kCXkTYDN9b4tTRsryZYDpdd4JGsilE6rPQ4GDPlBqhPZevuUp50dvnEFgSRCoE-wx1GAKXdR9hworuvHb_m0MHnv5-9HWaEG4a2x5h2FtOi4Cmz_tEkzJEK5yrnhTKj5GHmsAFo_oo-B2SWg-NooXVohiYM2Vl3ScaqaZ4m7SXGSZwEDWef)**_ to Club for Growth, helping them expand this nationwide petition drive before the career politicians bury this effort in big-government liberalism.
