clean_body: | | | Hi, friend. Ted Cruz here. Far too many career politicians in D.C. are desperate to cling onto their power by any means necessary. And left unchecked, they hold their power for DECADES! That's why I am sponsoring legislation to and why I am hopeful you will support this effort with your own voice today. Under my Term Limits Amendment, lawmakers in D.C. would: Serve a MAXIMUM of three terms in the House or just two terms in the Senate Focus on their constituents, NOT the lobbyists who fund their campaigns LEAVE OFFICE after they reach their term limit, returning to their home states and letting their voters elect a new "citizen-legislator" to represent them | | This would be a huge, lasting change for government in America, returning us to the vision our Founders had when they created our republic. No kings, no entrenched ruling elite, just free-born citizens managing our own affairs. It's also hugely popular. Every survey conducted recently shows at least 70% of the American people support putting term limits on Congress. That's why career politicians like Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and President Biden (with their 88 combined years "serving" the American people) want to shut my Term Limits Amendment down before it builds any momentum. Because while I am not a career politician myself, I've been in D.C. long enough to know that nothing moves here unless it is pushed - HARD - by grassroots citizens writing, calling, and emailing their lawmakers in numbers so huge they can't be ignored. My friends at Club for Growth have already done a lot of the work here, and gathering signatures in support. Club employees will combine them, with thousands more being mailed in by concerned citizens in your state, and deliver them all to Capitol Hill at a moment of maximum impact as I fight on the Senate floor to drive my term limits bill forward. There needs to be a HUGE stack of PETITIONS on every lawmaker 's desk! And if you agree, I urge you to give a voluntary contribution of to Club for Growth, helping them expand this nationwide petition drive before the career politicians bury this effort in big-government liberalism. For Liberty, Ted Cruz United States Senator (R - Texas) | | Club for Growth** 2001 L St. NW, Ste 600 Washington, DC 20036 ph 202.955.5500

name: Tina Smith
subject: Serious concerns over mail delivery in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The USPS is a vital service, and I’ll fight for it with everything I’ve got. |
#
Team, I recently emailed you about concerns I have over poor working conditions for mail carriers and slow delivery times for folks in Minnesota. **Since then, I’ve heard even more heart-breaking stories from USPS staff facing the worst working conditions they’ve dealt with in _decades_.** I’m not letting up on the pressure. Louis DeJoy must respond to my serious concerns over the postal service in Minnesota — **[and I’m hoping you’ll add your name to increase pressure in demanding accountability.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74975554/443217442/373077784?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20231211_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA2ZWUxZC00Nzk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAEfiro7VnxH5E5aPbVaCf9niYYDCr2KTTfXoBGjLX0=&emci=b288bc17-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=3506ee1d-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74975557/443217452/373077784?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20231211_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA2ZWUxZC00Nzk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAEfiro7VnxH5E5aPbVaCf9niYYDCr2KTTfXoBGjLX0=&emci=b288bc17-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=3506ee1d-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6227932)

The USPS is a vital service, and I’ll fight for it with everything I’ve got.
— Tina
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tina Smith
Date: Friday, December 1, 2023
Subject: Delayed mail, overworked mail carriers, and more_
Team — I have not held back when it comes to calling on Postmaster General Louis DeJoy to improve the United States Postal Service.
**[Today, I’m calling on DeJoy to answer for stories of delayed mail delivery in rural parts of Minnesota and terrible working conditions for mail carriers. Please join me in demanding DeJoy address these concerns right away, before a busy holiday season.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74975560/443217461/373077784?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20231211_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA2ZWUxZC00Nzk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAEfiro7VnxH5E5aPbVaCf9niYYDCr2KTTfXoBGjLX0=&emci=b288bc17-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=3506ee1d-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6227932)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74975563/443217470/373077784?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20231211_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA2ZWUxZC00Nzk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAEfiro7VnxH5E5aPbVaCf9niYYDCr2KTTfXoBGjLX0=&emci=b288bc17-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=3506ee1d-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6227932)
---
The USPS is a vital lifeline for millions of Minnesotans — delivering medicine, Social Security checks, and important documents and packages. And the mail carriers who provide this service are superheroes who deserve to be treated as such.
Recently, I heard from USPS mail carriers in Bemidji and Brainerd who are struggling to keep up with the heavy volume of mail and pressure from DeJoy to deliver Amazon packages. Carriers are working overtime and not allowed to take their sick days in some instances — _which is unacceptable._
**I’m calling on Louis DeJoy to answer to the difficult working conditions for mail carriers in Minnesota and across the country.**
The American people deserve mail that is delivered on time, and the carriers who provide this service deserve better working conditions.
**[If you agree, please join me in holding Louis DeJoy accountable for the troubling reports of delayed service and overworked mail carriers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74975565/443217478/373077784?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20231211_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA2ZWUxZC00Nzk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAEfiro7VnxH5E5aPbVaCf9niYYDCr2KTTfXoBGjLX0=&emci=b288bc17-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=3506ee1d-4798-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6227932)**
Thank you for raising your voice. The USPS is a national treasure, and I’m not going to let Trump-appointed Louis DeJoy run it into the ground.
— Tina

name: Team Kennedy
subject: A holiday party with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. & friends
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
An afternoon of conversations with Mr. Kennedy and special surprise guests.

|
---
| | | **Join us for holiday cheer****with Mr. Kennedy and special guests.

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Sign the Pledge: Stand with this Courageous Student
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzQ1LTM5YjRjYTJjOWNhMDQwN2Y4YTI0N2UwNDE3N2JmNTQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkFMUjQ0ODQxIn0/rtTvtYlwth6OQ-Gf5hToHg)
---
Fellow American: A Massachusetts school has censored a seventh grader for wearing a shirt that expresses biological truth. Throughout the entire nation, a debate is raging on the very nature of what it means to be human. What makes a person a man? A woman? Our Constitution guarantees freedom of thought—the freedom to share your beliefs. **Twelve-year-old Liam Morrison’s school has decided that debate is out—and government orthodoxy is in.** Liam, a 12-year-old student at Nichols Middle School in Middleborough, Massachusetts, quietly observed how the school proclaimed loudly that a person’s feelings, not their biology, determines their sex and gender. Liam holds different beliefs. Informed by a scientific understanding of biology (and backed by millennia of human history), he believes that there only two sexes (male and female) and that a person’s gender is inseparable from their sex. **So, one day Liam wore a shirt to school that says, “There are only two genders.”** The principal of the school, along with a school counselor, pulled Liam out of class and ordered him to remove his shirt or go home. Liam politely declined and was sent home. **Public school officials cannot censor a 7th grader’s speech by forcing him to remove a shirt that states scientific fact. This is a gross violation of the First Amendment.** **[Please stand with this brave 7th grader as he challenges his school’s violation of free speech. Sign our pledge to show that Liam isn’t the only one who is standing up for these truths.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzQ1LTM5YjRjYTJjOWNhMDQwN2Y4YTI0N2UwNDE3N2JmNTQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkFMUjQ0ODQxIn0/9um_1G8-OmwlNzsViOAOPA)**
---
| | [**Sign the Pledge**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzQ1LTM5YjRjYTJjOWNhMDQwN2Y4YTI0N2UwNDE3N2JmNTQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkFMUjQ0ODQxIn0/KbHsK-E641_XtpfGJ_YKAA)
---
**“They completely took away my ability to have a different opinion than they wanted me to have,” Liam says.** This case isn’t just about a shirt.
* **It’s about a public school telling Liam** —and thereby all other students—that he can’t wear a shirt with a message that’s important to him unless it’s the same opinion as the government’s.
* **It’s about a public school trying to force a student** to forfeit his free speech when he walks into the school building.
* **It’s about a public school imposing its view on students** —and censoring students who disagree.

“The school is talking about this issue all the time,” ADF Senior Counsel Tyson Langhofer, who is defending Liam, says, “and all Liam wanted to do was express his opinion, which is actually shared by a lot of his classmates.” After the school punished Liam for wearing the shirt, he wore another shirt to protest the school’s censorship that said: “There are censored genders.” Again, the school told him to take off the shirt. That’s when Liam and his family decided to ask Alliance Defending Freedom and the Massachusetts Family Institute to take legal action.
---
[**Sign the Pledge**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzQ1LTM5YjRjYTJjOWNhMDQwN2Y4YTI0N2UwNDE3N2JmNTQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkFMUjQ0ODQxIn0/dEyGQuPdGLBZtxV39-XaOw)
---
“I don’t complain when I see pride flags and diversity posters hung throughout the school,” Liam told a meeting of the Middleboro School Committee in April, after he was punished the first time. “Others have a right to their beliefs just like I do.” **The First Amendment protects people of all beliefs, especially people that disagree with the government. If you only have freedom to agree with those in power, you don’t have freedom at all.** Across the nation, government officials are trying to silence views that differ from radical gender ideology. And it’s falling to brave 12-year-olds like Liam to stand in opposition and not affirm lies when school officials, who should be modeling adulthood, have failed students. **[Will you join Liam today?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzQ1LTM5YjRjYTJjOWNhMDQwN2Y4YTI0N2UwNDE3N2JmNTQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkFMUjQ0ODQxIn0/Qd5fZ3iG_nZpBHeCPRv0Zw)**
---
[**Sign the Pledge**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzQ1LTM5YjRjYTJjOWNhMDQwN2Y4YTI0N2UwNDE3N2JmNTQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkFMUjQ0ODQxIn0/yq6KrKCcav4OwaZcSCf8pA)
---
—Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Liam isn’t the first student to be censored—and he won’t be the last. **[Stand with him today and send a message that government censorship cannot be allowed.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzQ1LTM5YjRjYTJjOWNhMDQwN2Y4YTI0N2UwNDE3N2JmNTQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkFMUjQ0ODQxIn0/s9tWb6PaDzHJOlEAXiRJkA)**
---
15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260
All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA.
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzQ1LTM5YjRjYTJjOWNhMDQwN2Y4YTI0N2UwNDE3N2JmNTQ4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/SeGiFB1Cwc0YiLcBxz2-1A) to unsubscribe.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Wall Street’s real estate grab is destroying the housing market
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

We have an affordable housing crisis in America, and corporate greed is making it worse.

Wall Street enables private equity firms to snap up single-family residential homes nationwide, allowing corporations to charge excessive rents and change the dynamics of the housing market. These buyouts block the road to homeownership, making the American Dream harder than ever to reach for working- and middle-class families.

The latest example is a Bezos-owned investment company that invested $500 million in a venture fund to purchase single-family homes.

Sign if you agree: We need to protect the American Dream and stop Wall St Landlords . [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=ji+77UwEYt5Ax4uojrDZ4N7b6hXwl8V/p/sFDkcPyMdnFhyMd4R/IiID38+QEt8UB7NViRXM/QnIjbtl5WPhkVTvxHb6/Nt42Up9cHMsBSMmWS4+7+3O1HLM3FerBmejbMTvc7ltzPL7Sv62xVSVhw==]

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1730689734475645281 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1730689734475645281]

It’s time for Congress to put an end to Wall Street’s real estate grab by passing my Stop Wall Street Landlords Act. This legislation would ban private equity firms from obtaining loans backed by the Federal Housing Finance Agency and related government entities for the purchase of single-family residential homes. With these tax savings, the federal government would then establish tax credits to offset the cost of constructing or rehabilitating owner-occupied homes for state and local governments.

Whether they seek to rent or to own, every American deserves access to affordable housing. Let’s tell Congress to pass the Stop Wall Street Landlords Act and stamp out housing inequality . [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=ji+77UwEYt5Ax4uojrDZ4N7b6hXwl8V/p/sFDkcPyMdnFhyMd4R/IiID38+QEt8UB7NViRXM/QnIjbtl5WPhkVTvxHb6/Nt42Up9cHMsBSMmWS4+7+3O1HLM3FerBmejbMTvc7ltzPL7Sv62xVSVhw==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=ji+77UwEYt5Ax4uojrDZ4N7b6hXwl8V/p/sFDkcPyMdnFhyMd4R/IiID38+QEt8UB7NViRXM/QnIjbtl5WPhkVTvxHb6/Nt42Up9cHMsBSMmWS4+7+3O1HLM3FerBmejbMTvc7ltzPL7Sv62xVSVhw==]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

name: Christian
subject: We don't need more politicians.
body:
Peter,

I am going to get right to the point.

I am not a politician. I'm tired of politicians. Politicians want headlines, clicks, likes, the next higher office, or a fancy lapel pin. I want results. I want a prosperous and safe America.

**Please make a contribution today of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $35. Send a leader, not a politician to Congress.**

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)
I am a retired U.S. Army Lieutenant Colonel, Green Beret, and combat soldier. I love my country. And I'm worried about the direction we are headed.

I spent more than two decades in [14 hostile zones and 6 combat tours](https://castellifornc.com/about/). I was a senior Advisor to the Secretary of Defense, White House, Congress, and intelligence community.

_I have been endorsed by SEAL PAC, Green Beret PAC, Members of Congress, local elected officials, military officers, and more._

My training has equipped me to solve challenges. My next mission: Solve the challenges American families face.

Republicans are in jeopardy of losing the House of Representatives.

My seat is one of the most important in the country to keeping a Republican majority.

**Send a Green Beret to Congress, not a politician. Please make a contribution today of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $35. Send a leader, not a politician to Congress.**
[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

Joe Biden and Democrats are robbing our children and grandchildren of the American Dream. Inflation is through the roof. Groceries, gas, and rent are more expensive. Our southern border is exposed and vulnerable. More than 10,000 illegal entries occur every day. And the world is on fire, Islamist terrorists and authoritarian regimes are challenging America abroad.

We need a conservative leader with real world experience to change the direction we're on and restore the American Dream. We have sent politicians, they failed.

Send a Green Beret to Congress.

My priorities:
* Defend America abroad and at home
* Eliminate Bidenomics and inflation
* Close and secure the border
* Restore the American Dream

**Please make a contribution today for $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or whatever you can afford. This is critical to a Republican majority!**

---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90304ceb7cf6464184ccc213a16cb885&_e=Vb_q5fKohatv7zIdc4lHmWmHr8Azb3NP33EMBQ_6DD9D6KwsTbyst2N5uNMS214_HtU1EtMa0tmco8hqYW0tYEAuxKuK6CVrW3ODklzsgzDlHJLdABvc0oybVl8HHO3ZfOqkTzBYyXCQI0EBx-E9ARIqDWN7k26P_U51UZOBnIDGoJsYAu1lohBscmmXptu_b4Q1oSQYTSb1K-f4wmbix7P3y7eBrn8IuElFbGBswoBdxeqR7EFtoi6OjRLogMMHlfcXNLOF2j_gqhcKNGv9oMKJnxYuHMxSEP7UnzgtBtTJqPKYuskylfhykJoDLX0fkXRD7k49nVh189dvlNQMTn0uPBlpeWSeqKQyQAzLwKuieSmDXtBNRjfqo0zyeTS-rg6-T0i67FGh9Hpg8NC36BREbDMi8c50fVuFtIgESjFFLv5ilLTlU_erBMHRan4n)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

OVER 100,000 lunatic liberals signed on to the Official Petition to REMOVE Clarence Thomas from the Supreme Court. He 's been OUR FIREWALL against the radical left on everything. They wanted to take away all of our guns. They wanted to turn every city into a crack den. And now they want to take away your right to vote for President Trump. The only man standing in their way is Clarence Thomas. What the left wants most is for you to feel demoralized. But your defiance is the single scariest thing to the far-Left. | | PAID FOR BY JASON SMITH FOR CONGRESS Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1OwzAQhJ9mc0vkXcd_Bx8KVRBC4s4JOXZM3cZK6qRUfXuUgDjuzKedz-V5TPFhQT0B0SmFBYiAH4Do-nHP5XbOby81f5zrq3zPYivpGYjWxzz8k39PmiG7NG6pOlbB8hhYWw0WFSOOwnCsTlZTCEhBhF7J4KTG2JMwzAcjo3NRVsnShhMiKo5CNH1vqPeSaW20aiODlu07jctDSd7hst5dKdOUGz_larSndZ2XXawD6tp5LRfCrQPq_Jj8BXi3lu8UgB-RDDNA8tC9HreTGQEkXYyfy63fAs1Z_SvETL2gER61qYoN8z2NY1qkgpZ97T5-yj8BAAD__-fbYGo). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1OwzAQhJ9mc0vkXcd_Bx8KVRBC4s4JOXZM3cZK6qRUfXuUgDjuzKedz-V5TPFhQT0B0SmFBYiAH4Do-nHP5XbOby81f5zrq3zPYivpGYjWxzz8k39PmiG7NG6pOlbB8hhYWw0WFSOOwnCsTlZTCEhBhF7J4KTG2JMwzAcjo3NRVsnShhMiKo5CNH1vqPeSaW20aiODlu07jctDSd7hst5dKdOUGz_larSndZ2XXawD6tp5LRfCrQPq_Jj8BXi3lu8UgB-RDDNA8tC9HreTGQEkXYyfy63fAs1Z_SvETL2gER61qYoN8z2NY1qkgpZ97T5-yj8BAAD__-fbYGo) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1OwzAQhJ9mc0vkXcd_Bx8KVRBC4s4JOXZM3cZK6qRUfXuUgDjuzKedz-V5TPFhQT0B0SmFBYiAH4Do-nHP5XbOby81f5zrq3zPYivpGYjWxzz8k39PmiG7NG6pOlbB8hhYWw0WFSOOwnCsTlZTCEhBhF7J4KTG2JMwzAcjo3NRVsnShhMiKo5CNH1vqPeSaW20aiODlu07jctDSd7hst5dKdOUGz_larSndZ2XXawD6tp5LRfCrQPq_Jj8BXi3lu8UgB-RDDNA8tC9HreTGQEkXYyfy63fAs1Z_SvETL2gER61qYoN8z2NY1qkgpZ97T5-yj8BAAD__-fbYGo) on these survival food kits while you can.

subject: The days are dark — but the future of South Texasdoesn’t have to be

body:
I have a plan for our district that will keep our future bright. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dc8pAgul-ObpxVWkQ-QuISRh383qT3t_cPHsxQ_wgavzvPXwYEqzcBaaiywe1qUABlqOh0qFQ8BSEb-YiQEEfRnY7Lxezruxb85D3H-EcDMu4VIsfg8djUoLvd2WyZDS3KP0woULhTJzTYWgOVhwpHEfGd5x_I5Qf-D3vbFR9m1BE5pOomVgwlszVMgqfgrHmOnfYITHxpY9UoCCF67jKDHvJMGjecSMg9Hzyd7TtTSPYdCY6994c9Kryzx1ZGTqH/421/QO-gtur3Ru6uEZ2G5inhwg/h0/UFpB5VkyNd_DAu84glJgbalPd0OnvSCMTOQ3_1u0Ddc)

Peter, this time of year, the days are only getting shorter. I don’t know about you, but it’s always tough for me to lose that sunlight as the night comes earlier. **But here’s the good news: the days are dark, but the future of South Texas doesn’t have to be.** I have a plan for our district that will keep our future bright by protecting every woman’s right to choose, expanding access to affordable, high-quality healthcare and cheaper prescriptions, and providing good paying jobs and a thriving economy. **[But in order to get to Congress where I can fight for the future TX-15 deserves, my team and I need resources to reach voters ahead of the primary election in less than three months. I’ll be honest, Peter, I’m worried about our district’s future if Monica De La Cruz remains in power. She’s made her priorities clear: enacting a national abortion ban, jeopardizing Social Security and Medicare, and providing more tax cuts for billionaires while our hard-working families continue to struggle.
Monica De La Cruz’s extremist MAGA agenda is bad for South Texas. We need change, and we need it now.
But the kind of change South Texas needs won’t come just because we wish for it.
Here’s how change will happen: it’s going to come because we put in the hard work on the ground to make sure people know what Monica truly stands for and that there’s an alternative who will actually fight for them in Congress.
It’s going to happen because we do the work to turn out thousands of voters in 2024 to elect real leadership to Congress.
**[My team and I are hard at work on the ground and digitally to fight for a brighter future for TX-15. But we need your help to make sure we have the resources to be as effective as possible. Will you make a donation of $13 or whatever you can afford to ensure that we can continue our fight?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_mk63bvXRxIzZgti2j8mJ3Muc0P5yq5rG4-bLKlXxJz-fDWRjHSeoHoimH2_CBSCmtM10MzfGx63yuW28WK2RLE6p39sarItMLIv4XF4TLZrVR0BGWuUAGNry5f5UjQPEJsaHbhitvqBZByDJSCxJOyF7XFB6Hjjf0SfbSFObtXf2lBytAuTqYZsP96xwHzCv2vqzxb-qTqji839HpDFMvXFf14m5ik-AxpNRMAey1m2ne4BwqCJmsWKOYZVz8RSFw5DVc7q2OMIsYhp0Vm8_V88TSut_4OkobOTIYsT17pQVGnN9R0PirawegH5xInKrPBUZyYWy3w2VYivO5aKo1_6x6Z7nI2_w6mrhbTa8T2MLBqpchtReAPsOYtwBkNtokUYtR6RVyYgiUr4vdMDSvw/421/QO-gtur3Ru6uEZ2G5inhwg/h8/cdUgm8QL-DUJuev-AweNOGWLIm-Qia2KsQYt0KlWiuo)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: My Journey, My Story, My Vision
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L4t_HF6n1KO7RhdkX-e0Ug~~/AARclAA~-S3dlg1cGBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L4t_HF6n1KO7RhdkX-e0Ug~~/AARclAA~-S3dlg1cGBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L4t_HF6n1KO7RhdkX-e0Ug~~/AARclAA~-S3dlg1cGBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L4t_HF6n1KO7RhdkX-e0Ug~~/AARclAA~-S3dlg1cGBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L4t_HF6n1KO7RhdkX-e0Ug~~/AARclAA~-S3dlg1cGBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L4t_HF6n1KO7RhdkX-e0Ug~~/AARclAA~-S3dlg1cGBFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>")**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X2T1NnQBVTmBmCz-a0hohA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWfhGP4RtAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support 188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb | | | | | | ~ Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. ~ "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | ~ | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | ~ It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | ~ Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. ~ "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. ~ "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?" | | ~ Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, ~ "I need your help – starting right now. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. Hey Peter,
Yesterday I filed my candidate statement with the Secretary of State — a huge step forward in our race to represent California's 30th.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74983937/443227491/1183499175?refcode=2023-12-08-filing&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6eda576d-4d98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVkYTU3NmQtNGQ5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-CopzDVcQCgt9U9loZaQ12Mqi_9bs7mXUG5NXE_hp7I=)
As I started drafting my statement, I reflected on the road that led me here. Looking back at my time as LAUSD teacher, then — because of the impact of those very students — a civil rights advocate, attorney, nonprofit director, and school board member.
As a teacher in Watts, I saw how poor leadership and structural inequity were holding back my students — and I knew I needed to fight back. I took on the school district and state on their behalf and won more funding for under-resourced schools. But there was still so much more to be done, so I ran for the school board, and fought to improve transparency, accountability, and budgets to help families and students.
**Now, I am running for Congress to bring a new generation of leadership that will take on the failed status quo and deliver for our communities.**[**Can you pitch in $3 toward our filing day goal of $5,000 to support our GOTV efforts? Your support will help us get this message out and win on March 5th.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74983938/443227492/1183499175?refcode=2023-12-08-filing&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6eda576d-4d98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVkYTU3NmQtNGQ5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-CopzDVcQCgt9U9loZaQ12Mqi_9bs7mXUG5NXE_hp7I=)

Right now, people nationwide are facing an affordability crisis — and our district is no exception. These struggles are _political_ problems and they can be resolved with the right leadership.
During the peak of the COVID-19 pandemic, I oversaw the distribution of over 140 million meals through the largest school-based food bank program in the country, and the expansion of childcare for working families.
I've delivered real progress as a school board member — including championing the country's highest minimum wage for workers at schools, helping students and families find housing by building thousands of new homes for those who work at local schools, and adding vocational programs that open the door to middle-class jobs. Now, I'm ready to bring that same energy to Congress.
Too many families are struggling and our communities cannot afford to wait on the empty promises of politicians who have been in office for _decades_. **I am ready to work with leaders of different viewpoints and across the aisle to expand affordable housing, lower prescription costs, establish universal preschool, and end big money in politics.**[**Will you help me get there with a contribution of $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74983944/443227498/1183499175?refcode=2023-12-08-filing&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6eda576d-4d98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVkYTU3NmQtNGQ5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-CopzDVcQCgt9U9loZaQ12Mqi_9bs7mXUG5NXE_hp7I=)

Thanks for standing with us,
_Nick_

clean_body: Another step towards victory on March 5th. | | | | Hey Peter, Did you catch this message from Nick? This last we made things ✨official ✨. Nick's candidate statement is off to print and we're mobilizing to get his work experience and mission in front of as many voters as possible in the next three months. We have set a fundraising goal of $5,000 to amplify his message — and we're just a few hundred dollars away from having the resources we need to succeed.= Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Mark Hatton Team Nick \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Nick Melvoin [info@nickmelvoin.com] Date: Wed, December 6, 2023 at 3:57 PM Subject: Well, it's official: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hey Peter, Yesterday I filed my candidate statement with the Secretary of State — a huge step forward in our race to represent California's 30th. = As I started drafting my statement, I reflected on the road that led me here. Looking back at my time as LAUSD teacher, then — because of the impact of those very students — a civil rights advocate, attorney, nonprofit director, and school board member. As a teacher in Watts, I saw how poor leadership and structural inequity were holding back my students — and I knew I needed to fight back. I took on the school district and state on their behalf and won more funding for under-resourced schools. But there was still so much more to be done, so I ran for the school board, and fought to improve transparency, accountability, and budgets to help families and students. Now, I am running for Congress to bring a new generation of leadership that will take on the failed status quo and deliver for our communities.= Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = | = ---|--- = | = = Right now, people nationwide are facing an affordability crisis — and our district is no exception. These struggles are political problems and they can be resolved with the right leadership. During the peak of the COVID-19 pandemic, I oversaw the distribution of over 140 million meals through the largest school-based food bank program in the country, and the expansion of childcare for working families. I've delivered real progress as a school board member — including championing the country's highest minimum wage for workers at schools, helping students and families find housing by building thousands of new homes for those who work at local schools, and adding vocational programs that open the door to middle-class jobs. Now, I'm ready to bring that same energy to Congress. Too many families are struggling and our communities cannot afford to wait on the empty promises of politicians who have been in office for decades. I am ready to work with leaders of different viewpoints and across the aisle to expand affordable housing, lower prescription costs, establish universal preschool, and end big money in politics.= Our movement is part of a new, bold generation of leadership that voters want to see in Congress. Leadership that is ready to get to work and get things done. Thanks for standing with us, Nick = | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

**FIRST:** Donald Trump said he would “terminate” the Affordable Care Act if he won in 2024. **THEN:** Ron DeSantis followed suit -- saying he’d pass a bill to ‘supercede’ the ACA. (Not to forget, Nikki Haley has spent years attacking the ACA and calling to defund it.) **NOW:** It’s clear -- no matter who the Republicans nominate -- they all would be a dire threat to Americans’ health care. We need to mobilize grassroots Democrats across the country to defend our health care. **John - he called it a high-tech lynching three decades ago.**
We don't know what to call it now but the left's attack on Clarence Thomas is DISGUSTING.
OVER 100,000 lunatic liberals signed on to the Official Petition to REMOVE Clarence Thomas from the Supreme Court.
**He 's been _OUR FIREWALL_ against the radical left on everything.**
_They wanted to take away all of our guns._
_They wanted to turn every city into a crack den._
_And now they want to take away your right to vote for President Trump._
**The only man standing in their way is Clarence Thomas.**

name: Jess
subject: Finally news for US!
body:
Negotiations to [free 50 of the hostages](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg81euq92trmbjlt0e28csblek0k8khs55hfj6a0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs) held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas.

| | Hey Friend, Have you heard about The Flyover? Unlike many news sources out there that put their own spin on every news story, they just deliver the facts and let us draw our own conclusions! It's easy to read and only takes a couple of minutes to get caught up on all the news for the day. But the best part is that this newsletter is 100% **FREE**! Check out the newsletter I got from them today below, if you don't believe me. Trust me you don't want to put this off. **[Click here for a one click sign up](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbb9art3tqasp7scdm75nlu1un1a6fkf8dtu5u4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuhbfd5jm5obacphmjrr6t9ieej3fddnkma3ed5m66ab7dlnkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp5e5qrbpgm28iv0)**! It's time to break free from the biased news that has infected our world. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvqid4hri2mamgmgjblvmam1beho9jbcnea4n7o0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs) \-- Jess
* * *
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjhr7j9311rga1ubephu3i3r3b9fscamiaa3ema8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs)
---
| | |
# MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. ([Hear Speech](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z46kifb6s3vfta8e78op44ippio168aacnahnvg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm9cr42jemkjerbnvm4v2h39ih540m8i39lb59a0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t2muqb7cbgmkpj3d7nmdqj4st66uqrf9ck6sqbccckmerbf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpiasblmnj1c4h1k8gn48n24hjm0oj6cpim6pj7c8iv0).
|
---
## Penn President Resigns Over Testimony
University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill [resigned this weekend](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhkl4i71gb0oql64mqvnlr4vhb19o4r8d7r5i6ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs) in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. [Two mobile vans](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zla79jr13qbaevqbncvksf1vom7h2mifohfmuf6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs)at Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said [House Rep. Elise Stefanik,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb16ftslfooc47qodd1dg51g1hsj0gphs0bvtpgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs) who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses.
## Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers
Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed [the biggest free-agent deal in history](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr4rfkie74oc4ugp2oq36eqphtdpmabvthdr8u4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs), agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher _and_ slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal [eclipses the previous record](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z312s96e7b45oeul6v9sue4ick33geovif08056g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs), held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract.
## EU Sets World's First Rules on AI
Europe has agreed to the [world's first set of rules](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za7t8ebu4oe9a8ll3ss1q1h2in3tmddh2578o240_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs) regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, [target usage of AI against citizens](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg5udh8at85agkim2ois2gitisch51lh43fd6ipg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs) in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out.
* * *

|

([More](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2jmk4d24lk6aec0p82dgkiidjpie9f2lmrhi050_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs)) ➤******The State Department** bypassed Congress to approve the sale of $100 million worth of tank ammunition to Israel. The decision is possible because of emergency authorization rules in use since 1979. ([More](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z08hacgbckv9lu3d1g34emk3tegne8o4ckvl6h2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs))
➤******The Biden administration** told lawmakers that an average of 5,000 illegal immigrants are being released into the U.S. every day. The total could reach 1.8 million for the year if the current pace continues. ([More](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zabr4jd8e6mg3o5d935v7diid43ipd9pksmoc8ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs)) ➤ **Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee** lost a runoff election to be Houston mayor to Texas state Sen. John Whitmire, who promised to make the city safer with increased policing. ([More](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkar3qjqmvaura0prhqgkt66ekf9f7v8kd4dd78g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs))

**➤ LSU quarterback **Jayden Daniels won the 2023 Heisman Trophy, college football's most prestigious player of the year award. Washington QB Michael Penix was the runner-up. ([See Season Highlights](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv54vdvbl3i189rhcot1b5ra0jqoj64mhbuuboq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs)) **➤ The Los Angeles Lakers, **led by the shooting of Anthony Davis, won the first NBA Cup, beating the Indiana Pacers 123-109 in the NBA's inaugural in-season tournament. ([More](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpe1einl1c9mho85cd94i17789k5nt9n9poh74no_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs)) **➤****Army beat Navy **17-9 in a game that ended with a huge scrum at the 1-foot line, stopping a potential game-tying 4th down for Navy. ([See Video](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfcm2dfa947q5483o2lu1l63j42tobhcg4pjm2do_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs))

([See Image](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z79vpsgpmqmgdgtn76npfmr06rh0gr7tqc8qel28_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cpj6aor6cth2bs)) **➤ ****A SpaceX** Falcon Heavy rocket is scheduled to launch a space plane for the U.S. Space Force this evening around 8 p.m. ET. clean_body: Negotiations to held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas. | | Hey Friend, Have you heard about The Flyover? Unlike many news sources out there that put their own spin on every news story, they just deliver the facts and let us draw our own conclusions! It's easy to read and only takes a couple of minutes to get caught up on all the news for the day. But the best part is that this newsletter is 100% FREE! Check out the newsletter I got from them today below, if you don't believe me. Trust me you don't want to put this off. ! It's time to break free from the biased news that has infected our world. \-- Jess | | | | MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . | Penn President Resigns Over Testimony University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses. Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed , agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher and slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal , held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract. EU Sets World's First Rules on AI Europe has agreed to the regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out. | | | | Greetings from Connecticut! My name is Amy and like you, I'm tired of high prices, rising crime, and the left's push for electric vehicles. Every election I do my research and try to help out candidates who are strong, conservative leaders and can win. Selfishly, I'd like to see more Republican women in Congress, so I donated to Nancy Dahlstrom because we need someone who knows what it's like to raise a family in a rough economy and believes in the rule of law.
---
| |
---
| She's a true conservative who can bring commonsense values to Washington and fight for American energy, safety, and our economy. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Greetings from Connecticut! My name is Amy and like you, I'm tired of high prices, rising crime, and the left's push for electric vehicles. Every election I do my research and try to help out candidates who are strong, conservative leaders and can win. Selfishly, I'd like to see more Republican women in Congress, so I donated to Nancy Dahlstrom because we need someone who knows what it's like to raise a family in a rough economy and believes in the rule of law. | | | She's a true conservative who can bring commonsense values to Washington and fight for American energy, safety, and our economy. I can't afford hundreds, but I sent her $10 to show her that I believe in her message and conservative solutions to our country's challenges. Amy S. Dahlstrom Supporter | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | No longer want to receive these emails? .

Dear Friend,
---
Twenty days until will we gather together in Phoenix!! New Year's Eve is the perfect time to worship—end the year with praise and worship, and launch the new year in His presence! Testimonies from Let Us Worship's past New Year's Eve revivals in San Diego, Miami, and Los Angeles still pour in today!! We want you to join us—admission is FREE, but space is LIMITED!! RSVP below to reserve your spot and don't miss out! __

name: JuanJo at United We Dream Action
subject: I’m tired of instability and uncertainty
body:
DACA recipients like me are demanding action now. | | | Peter, I’m tired of the instability that comes with temporary protections. DACA recipients like myself find ourselves in a constant state of uncertainty. Our work permits and protections from deportation have always been a temporary solution, vulnerable to attacks by conservative courts or anti-immigrant politicians. While Congress and President Biden wait to act, millions of immigrant youth like myself watch in disbelief, knowing that our lives depend on them passing legislation. There’s an urgent need for permanent solutions, Peter: **Judge Hanen ruled against DACA**** _again_****— and now the case may head to the Supreme Court.** Attacks against immigrant youth and all undocumented people are nothing new — _my own home state was one of the nine Republican-led states that moved to shut down DACA earlier this year._ Along with millions of ineligible undocumented people, hundreds of thousands of DACA recipients could be left without work permits or protections from deportation if we don’t act now. DACA was won through relentless organizing from undocumented youth and allies across the country demanding basic protections — and it’s going to require even more organizing to demand more. **Now, we need to pick up the fight. Will you donate $10 or any amount today to help UWDA secure permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people before it’s too late?** ****___Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8CyraxqLLfAsc7Mu4MEH22nEZGSLCSm9HgCsMIZhMTf7e_xxvUszCzSHeJOLHsggYeGtF7z1qofGCPku37FOwCnG1Cd4JDjZAdAlPPIIh_m1SMGJxNljqA7TpCxAdT9eQsA3Pl4wm5JqvecHueyfgkaiIEhUyItsN22Gaf7G5t0YBR12pxqpMWmNF13HGodQrItdeCpF_kk_mjNJwLiA7K-Gg962FEuumWM8me2AvAjaEO9g2DR8F3Rqbf4QJ81EQdwiWgbKi7sua2WwGUPMdgtP2LdFFXk-0Jp_ZVJ0dl7j2bZ8o4875ZpO9UIC9r6Cu5RFek_4MOoMGJX1AvUOD2zxbir2b3d_NfDu4-cvI7SOAPqj938p2frX7sVclSvEhWIQsRZbZz-noMtOgQM2flTLTs-7x6Ah4zSd3ApQtvkITdqFjGefT8YDwp2uMyGbN/421/mZu3Isj8QIKAxg0XLmScQA/h0/fc-ZON5sme7HxkF0t_a1C1X-CtP3qsAkaxZbYY19bO4)

clean_body: DACA recipients like me are demanding action now. | | | Peter, I’m tired of the instability that comes with temporary protections. DACA recipients like myself find ourselves in a constant state of uncertainty. Our work permits and protections from deportation have always been a temporary solution, vulnerable to attacks by conservative courts or anti-immigrant politicians. While Congress and President Biden wait to act, millions of immigrant youth like myself watch in disbelief, knowing that our lives depend on them passing legislation. There’s an urgent need for permanent solutions, Peter: Judge Hanen ruled against DACA again— and now the case may head to the Supreme Court. Attacks against immigrant youth and all undocumented people are nothing new — my own home state was one of the nine Republican-led states that moved to shut down DACA earlier this year. Along with millions of ineligible undocumented people, hundreds of thousands of DACA recipients could be left without work permits or protections from deportation if we don’t act now. DACA was won through relentless organizing from undocumented youth and allies across the country demanding basic protections — and it’s going to require even more organizing to demand more. Now, we need to pick up the fight. Will you donate $10 or any amount today to help UWDA secure permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people before it’s too late? **_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. | | | | | | | | | | ** This most recent court decision is just a reminder that our goals for permanent protections remain unfulfilled. We deserve a future where everyone can not just survive, but thrive. Thank you for being a part of our movement. JuanJo, United We Dream Action
