name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Bernie on Israel Aid, Barbara Lee on Economic Justice, Prof. Richard Wolff on Democracy, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Bernie vs Blank Check for Israel | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13010?t=1011&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]Economic Justice Town
Hall w/ Barbara Lee, Ro Khanna | Prof. Richard Wolff on Wealth Gap &
Democracy | Preparing for 2024 | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1012&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]Our movement is crucial in the call for peace abroad and the fight for
justice here at home. If you’re not already a grassroots supporter, please
consider a monthly donation to power the work of Our Revolution organizers
as we head into 2024.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1013&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

THE PUSH FOR PEACE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12984?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1014&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

Thanks to your surge of support, Bernie Sanders was successful at blocking
$10 billion of unconditional aid to Israel’s extreme right-wing
government!

The aid vote failed 49-51 on Thursday, and there is no doubt that your
thousands of signatures and donations made a big difference.

However, allies of Netanyahu’s regime, like AIPAC, are going to use their
near-unlimited resources to punish progressives for daring to call for an
end to the civilian bombing in Gaza.

Bernie was the only non-Republican Senator to vote against unconditional
aid and will now be the target of enormous pressure to reverse course.

As Bernie said, we cannot be complicit. Hamas is a terrorist group, but
bombing innocent people only causes more death and danger.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12984?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1015&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]Sign now to stand with Bernie and call on Israel to stop violating
international law by bombing civilians.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1016&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

Tens of thousands tuned in this week to Our Revolution’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13010?t=1017&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]Economic
Justice Town Hall with Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna, Professor Richard
Wolff, and worker activists like Sergio Valderrama from around the
country.

We dug into the issues that cut to the core of our shared economic
struggle, including jobs, wages, housing, labor power, healthcare costs,
student debt, greed-flation, and more.

A rigged economic system is crushing people and creating a wealth gap that
has enabled the ultra-wealthy to hijack democracy in America.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1018&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

Rep. Barbara Lee lived the struggle as a single mother and knows the tough
decisions families face when wages are too low, and the rent is too damn
high.

She has spent her life and career waging the fight for economic justice,
and now we have a chance to send her to partner with Bernie Sanders and
speak for our movement in the Senate.

“I know what economic injustice is. I know how people are struggling,”
Barbara said on the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13012?t=1019&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]Town Hall. “We can’t have people just hanging on
the edge in the wealthiest, most powerful country in the world.”

Barbara and Bernie recently teamed up together on the new OLIGARCH Act to
tax the ultra-wealthy. They’re also pushing for a Wall Street speculation
tax, a bill to close the CEO-worker pay gap, an audit of the Pentagon, and
more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13013?source=revreport%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1020&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13013?source=revreport%3Fsource%3DEM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]CALL YOUR REPS

“Senator Sanders and I have worked on this daily,” Barbara said. “People
cannot wait. Billionaires are scamming the system, and regular folks are
paying excessive taxes to fuel the Pentagon budget. This is money that
should be invested in healthcare, housing, and lifting people out of
poverty.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1022&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

Rep. Ro Khanna is chairing Barbara Lee’s campaign for the U.S. Senate
because he knows her passion and record and these crucial issues.

“I’ve often said Barbara Lee is the antiwar voice we need, but I could
never have predicted we’d need that voice so urgently in the moment we’re
in,” Ro said on our Town Hall. “If you care about peace, if you care about
a ceasefire in the Middle East, Barbara Lee is the only candidate in this
race to come out for a permanent ceasefire.”

“As is often the case, she is a bit ahead of all of us. She showed the
way, and we’ve got to rally around her. She’s going to win because people
are going to find out California is a progressive, pro-peace state.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12373?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]HELP US ELECT BARBARA LEE TO THE SENATE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12991?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

When 1% of America controls nearly a third of the wealth and the bottom
half can claim less than 3%, we’re in trouble, and so is our democracy, Ro
told us.

“For 50 years, there’s been a war on the working and middle class in this
country, and people feel that,” Ro said. “Wages aren’t keeping up, and
folks can’t afford medical debt, student debt, credit card debt. They say,
‘I can’t afford to live in America.’”

“That is the central challenge that the Democratic Party has to tackle,”
he explained, “to create economic opportunity and wealth generation in
every district in America. There are many parts of this country where
there’s no economic opportunities, no job creation, no sense of the
American Dream. This country cannot stand that divided. “

“It’s why I co-chaired Bernie’s campaign and why I’m chairing Barbara
Lee’s campaign. We need to prioritize the working class. That means
Medicare for All, universal childcare, forgiving student loans, free
public college, a living wage, paid family leave, power for labor unions,
and more. We know what needs to be done in this country, and it also means
taxing the ultra-rich.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12991?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]ADD YOUR NAME — TAX THE RICH

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1026&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

We were excited to have Economist Professor Richard Wolff also join the
Town Hall on Monday!

“The problem for people is an unequal distribution of wealth, which is
used to corrupt our politics,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13014?t=1027&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]Professor Wolff told us. “The rich
understand you can’t have democracy because the mass of people might use
it to change the distribution of wealth, and for that reason, they aim to
stop that process.

“If you want a political democracy, you have no choice but to advocate for
an economic democracy because, without that, you’ll never get the
political democracy either,” he explained.

Wolff said he takes great encouragement from seeing the surge of
unionization and labor strikes — from Starbucks to UAW to graduate
students organizing on campus.

“There is a movement already underway of people saying they don’t need to
live in a world as unequal as this one,” Professor Wolff said. “We can do
better than this, and it’s our job just as the working people who
struggled before us — to stop slavery, to stop feudalism. Now, it’s our
turn to make a better world.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1028&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

Sergio Valderrama is doing just that and making a difference as a worker
activist with Fight for $15 and a Union.

He joined our Town Hall Monday night from his car between DoorDash
deliveries. A McDonald’s worker for 10 years, Sergio has always had to
work two or three jobs to support his wife and children.

Last year, Our Revolution joined Sergio in the fight to win AB257, which
set a $20 minimum wage for fast food workers and gave them a seat at the
negotiating table in California — a form of sectoral bargaining we want to
export around the country.

“Winning this bill was important. It helped a lot with expenses and rent,
but the cost of living keeps going up, and we must keep fighting,” he
said. “And I don’t have insurance, so I can’t actually afford to go see
the doctor.”

Sergio speaks for so many of us, and we’re proud to be with him in this
working-class movement to demand real change and elect progressive leaders
who fight alongside us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1029&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]CHIP IN TO POWER THIS MOVEMENT

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1030&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

On Tuesday, federal call center workers are traveling to DC to demand
action from the Biden administration to turn their “low-wage, dead-end
jobs” into good jobs that support their families and communities — just
like the president promised.

Our Revolution proudly stands with call center workers like Tonya Jackson,
who told us on our live show that she and her coworkers help folks
navigate healthcare but can’t afford to use their own plans. She works a
second job as a home health aide.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13015?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1031&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]RSVP TO JOIN WORKERS IN DC!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1032&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1033&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

This year, Our Revolution elected 77 new progressive allies to offices up
and down the ballot, thanks to our grassroots supporters and activists!

Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green now leads a progressive majority
in St. Louis, where they passed a universal income program, raised wages,
and took on corporate developers. They’re now working on tenants’ rights
and giving city residents a direct say over spending decisions. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13016?t=1034&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]Read
more here about Megan Green and the power of progressives in St. Louis.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1035&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

Together, we also helped elect Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson, a former
teacher and labor organizer, who has already delivered on his promise to
raise the wage — and not leave tipped workers behind.

And Our Revolution ally Sara Innamorato now joins a progressive trifecta
in Pittsburgh, winning the powerful Allegheny County Executive seat with
the power to help protect abortion care, push for county-wide housing, and
address human rights violations in the county jail.

That’s not all — all of our candidates swept the NYC Council, and we now
have a progressive majority in Minneapolis. We even had a progressive
takeover of the city council in Hilliard, Ohio, and we’re one seat away
from getting control of the council in Duluth, Minnesota!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13017?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1036&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024
to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for
the crucial battles to come.

Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to
take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the
Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship
around.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13017?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1037&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up for the big
elections ahead in 2024 — there’s no time to waste!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13018?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1038&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

AIPAC lobbyists are getting ready to spend over $100 MILLION to try to
replace pro-peace members of Congress like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Ayanna
Pressley — at a time when 66% of Americans want our government to work
toward a ceasefire.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13018?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1039&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]SIGN NOW to protect our progressive caucus from cynical dark money and
rightwing attacks. The working class can't afford to lose the power of
these seats.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1040&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

In September of 2001, Barbara Lee cast the lone “No” vote in Congress
against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She endured death threats,
hate mail, and media slander for years. But history vindicated her.

Today, Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California
calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Check out this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12238?t=1041&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]LA Times article on
why Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents,
Katie Porter and Adam Schiff.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1042&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

Last week, Our Revolution leaders joined Barbara Lee at the CA Democratic
Convention, where we helped organize delegates to endorse her for Senate!
She got the most votes at 42% — beating out opponents Adam Schiff and
Katie Porter!

This is HUGE. And, with the powerful endorsements of national progressive
leaders like Reps. Pramila Jayapal, Cori Bush, Ayanna Pressley, and many
others, Barbara is the clear progressive choice for the U.S. Senate seat
in California.

“Our momentum is picking up speed. The people want a tried and tested
progressive with the record to prove it. I’m ready to deliver,” Barbara
said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12373?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1043&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]JOIN PROGRESSIVES FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1044&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1045&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]FRESH NEW MERCH!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1046&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ][IMG]

We know what we’re fighting for, but we need to share the message far and
wide. Get your new Our Revolution T-shirt and advocate for our progressive
values everywhere you go!

We are proud to stand up for Education for All, Racial Justice,
Reproductive Rights, Medicare for All, Economic Justice, Labor Rights,
Housing for All, Environmental Justice, LGBT+ Rights, and so much more. In

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1047&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]GET YOUR NEW SHIRTS TODAY!

You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making
calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but
this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a
powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12528?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1049&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA

★ ★ ★

organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re
already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231211_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1051&akid=5001%2E5885482%2EEgqiFN ]official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly
donation today!

If you’re not already a grassroots supporter, please consider a monthly donation to power the work of Our Revolution organizers as we head into 2024. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ THE PUSH FOR PEACE [ ][IMG] Thanks to your surge of support, Bernie Sanders was successful at blocking $10 billion of unconditional aid to Israel’s extreme right-wing government! The aid vote failed 49-51 on Thursday, and there is no doubt that your thousands of signatures and donations made a big difference. However, allies of Netanyahu’s regime, like AIPAC, are going to use their near-unlimited resources to punish progressives for daring to call for an end to the civilian bombing in Gaza. Bernie was the only non-Republican Senator to vote against unconditional aid and will now be the target of enormous pressure to reverse course. As Bernie said, we cannot be complicit. Hamas is a terrorist group, but bombing innocent people only causes more death and danger. [ ]Sign now to stand with Bernie and call on Israel to stop violating international law by bombing civilians. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tens of thousands tuned in this week to Our Revolution’s [ ]Economic Justice Town Hall with Reps. Barbara Lee and Ro Khanna, Professor Richard Wolff, and worker activists like Sergio Valderrama from around the country. We dug into the issues that cut to the core of our shared economic struggle, including jobs, wages, housing, labor power, healthcare costs, student debt, greed-flation, and more. A rigged economic system is crushing people and creating a wealth gap that has enabled the ultra-wealthy to hijack democracy in America. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Rep. Barbara Lee lived the struggle as a single mother and knows the tough decisions families face when wages are too low, and the rent is too damn high. She has spent her life and career waging the fight for economic justice, and now we have a chance to send her to partner with Bernie Sanders and speak for our movement in the Senate. “I know what economic injustice is. I know how people are struggling,” Barbara said on the [ ]Town Hall. “We can’t have people just hanging on the edge in the wealthiest, most powerful country in the world.” Barbara and Bernie recently teamed up together on the new OLIGARCH Act to tax the ultra-wealthy. They’re also pushing for a Wall Street speculation tax, a bill to close the CEO-worker pay gap, an audit of the Pentagon, and more. [ ][IMG] [ ]CALL YOUR REPS “Senator Sanders and I have worked on this daily,” Barbara said. “People cannot wait. Billionaires are scamming the system, and regular folks are paying excessive taxes to fuel the Pentagon budget. This is money that should be invested in healthcare, housing, and lifting people out of poverty.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Rep. Ro Khanna is chairing Barbara Lee’s campaign for the U.S. Senate because he knows her passion and record and these crucial issues. “I’ve often said Barbara Lee is the antiwar voice we need, but I could never have predicted we’d need that voice so urgently in the moment we’re in,” Ro said on our Town Hall. “If you care about peace, if you care about a ceasefire in the Middle East, Barbara Lee is the only candidate in this race to come out for a permanent ceasefire.” “As is often the case, she is a bit ahead of all of us. She showed the way, and we’ve got to rally around her. She’s going to win because people are going to find out California is a progressive, pro-peace state.” [ ]HELP US ELECT BARBARA LEE TO THE SENATE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] When 1% of America controls nearly a third of the wealth and the bottom half can claim less than 3%, we’re in trouble, and so is our democracy, Ro told us. “For 50 years, there’s been a war on the working and middle class in this country, and people feel that,” Ro said. “Wages aren’t keeping up, and folks can’t afford medical debt, student debt, credit card debt. They say, ‘I can’t afford to live in America.’” “That is the central challenge that the Democratic Party has to tackle,” he explained, “to create economic opportunity and wealth generation in every district in America. There are many parts of this country where there’s no economic opportunities, no job creation, no sense of the American Dream. This country cannot stand that divided. “ “It’s why I co-chaired Bernie’s campaign and why I’m chairing Barbara Lee’s campaign. We need to prioritize the working class. That means Medicare for All, universal childcare, forgiving student loans, free public college, a living wage, paid family leave, power for labor unions, and more. We know what needs to be done in this country, and it also means taxing the ultra-rich.” [ ]ADD YOUR NAME — TAX THE RICH ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] We were excited to have Economist Professor Richard Wolff also join the Town Hall on Monday! “The problem for people is an unequal distribution of wealth, which is used to corrupt our politics,” [ ]Professor Wolff told us. “The rich understand you can’t have democracy because the mass of people might use it to change the distribution of wealth, and for that reason, they aim to stop that process. “If you want a political democracy, you have no choice but to advocate for an economic democracy because, without that, you’ll never get the political democracy either,” he explained. Wolff said he takes great encouragement from seeing the surge of unionization and labor strikes — from Starbucks to UAW to graduate students organizing on campus. “There is a movement already underway of people saying they don’t need to live in a world as unequal as this one,” Professor Wolff said. “We can do better than this, and it’s our job just as the working people who struggled before us — to stop slavery, to stop feudalism. Now, it’s our turn to make a better world.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Sergio Valderrama is doing just that and making a difference as a worker activist with Fight for $15 and a Union. He joined our Town Hall Monday night from his car between DoorDash deliveries. A McDonald’s worker for 10 years, Sergio has always had to work two or three jobs to support his wife and children. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed78SWrgp4UfCCZvNCFKE2gsrJcinLiaGVbWF21PP7b6ZF9yV9A7mVSQXQ2G5dmp1iw0Y31CN6oyLe09_Aeqg3iRH_dmOcUOlSgNsOPE_0Opy3T10V8HEzVGv5oFEuYfvTf-H31JBlnJSNF7iFOL7F_EqtNgh-P9kXG97pJknd7CjS0dFfef8T0Uyjun2heB7OnVShJDvHdQnfs8yjFCuVlmjsD-U-EqsCASFz2AMhh5nPmSDjETFoW4ERTf4oFzTmlUJGKnEi9YVGbPz89xncH9H4UXdz-IZuZ0U4W9Pq_hHwYy1GoolyWaK9yav4yefQPLBnsRjB2KncBWWu5UT_Ov2IPsezR1PUkIWtxLZBJg7UyIZjOsetFYDeTEokDA8bQQ%3D%3D)
**TRUTH: The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.**
Fellow American,

My two parents who brought me into this world and my wife, Apoorva, and our two sons, are the most important people in my life. Family is a grounding institution, one that matters and is worth preserving.

I have talked about how America is losing its sense of national identity and losing our ability to believe in God — we absolutely cannot lose and degrade the importance of family. The fabric of our country is built on the love and care we give to future generations and in making sure our country continues to thrive with each passing year, not just election cycles.

| [** FOR OUR FUTURE GENERATIONS **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed78SWrgp4UfCCZvNCFKE2gsrJcinLiaGVbWF21PP7b6ZF9yV9A7mVSQXQ2G5dmp1iw0Y31CN6oyLe09_Aeqg3iRH_dmOcUOlSgNsOPE_0Opy3T10V8HEzVGv5oFEuYfvTf-H31JBlnJSNF7iFOL7F_EqtNgh-P9kXG97pJknd7CjS0dFfef8T0Uyjun2heB7OnVShJDvHdQnfs8yjFCuVlmjsD-U-EqsCASFz2AMhh5nP3gxsan6AsFjpTjaFqj2UTu5ZBj7D-dwK0MzShXHJ8e3ViA4aQNO1hfrW2tZawizXsLuaeZTe5TThwymSt9wFCB215j2YewqcDMDjMsyBikqVFwoyLtBHYyKdfOd1-Tk7WyTAMGp0WDvxVOAMyyyrEQ%3D%3D)
---

We’ve gotten lazy just being against the other side, forgetting what we actually stand for. The nuclear family is the foundation of a flourishing nation. I have loved meeting the families who come in droves to our campaign events. We all want a better opportunity for our future generations and children.

[**I refuse to continue letting my sons grow up in a country where many people cannot even answer what it means to be an American. Our family’s top mission in the White House: revive our national character and the importance of the family institution. Apoorva and I are ready for the challenge.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed78SWrgp4UfCCZvNCFKE2gsrJcinLiaGVbWF21PP7b6ZF9yV9A7mVSQXQ2G5dmp1iw0Y31CN6oyLe09_Aeqg3iRH_dmOcUOlSgNsOPE_0Opy3T10V8HEzVGv5oFEuYfvTf-H31JBlnJSNF7iFOL7F_EqtNgh-P9kXG97pJknd7CjS0dFfef8T0Uyjun2heB7OnVShJDvHdQnfs8yjFCuVlmjsD-U-EqsCASFz2AMhh5nPmIkm0zwsu7uPVFqg_P4zUsI9V_e8xVMhz_anEduD76dWJmd36nJaYjFknMJmQiZeENjcZ-4H9jJtZa6te4sb9VMtoniiXUL2-edpRvK21ZMqwO8VTJcMUZwUKNPGiFSIwCJKo_4LnvOXBw-3TsajJA%3D%3D)

We won’t be able to save what’s worth saving in this country if we do not first fight for the institution of the family.

Thank you,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed78SWrgp4UfCCZvNCFKE2gsrJcinLiaGVbWF21PP7b6ZF9yV9A7mVSQXQ2G5dmp1iw0Y31CN6oyLe09_Aeqg3iRH_dmOcUOlSgNsOPE_0Opy3T10V8HEzVGv5oFEuYfvTf-H31JBlnJSNF7iFOL7F_EqtNgh-P9kXG97pJknd7CjS0dFfef8T0Uyjun2heB7OnVShJDvHdQnfs8yjFCuVlmjsD-U-EqsCASFz2AMhh5nPDHq0Tck5tQoyiDjfsEgKWyA6x7xbBI0njmZvhr-9nS7O3Bw-KDgsHsUBMRJ39FqW8BwL-yEydEaiLczdizutYxOIKY2FIbgJWpmMPdHO5byxyZ2sA-q9jMHICbo2d0-pZxSsEH4LQudZfh0hEcFl1g%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** FIGHT FOR FAMILY **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed78SWrgp4UfCCZvNCFKE2gsrJcinLiaGVbWF21PP7b6ZF9yV9A7mVSQXQ2G5dmp1iw0Y31CN6oyLe09_Aeqg3iRH_dmOcUOlSgNsOPE_0Opy3T10V8HEzVGv5oFEuYfvTf-H31JBlnJSNF7iFOL7F_EqtNgh-P9kXG97pJknd7CjS0dFfef8T0Uyjun2heB7OnVShJDvHdQnfs8yjFCuVlmjsD-U-EqsCASFz2AMhh5nP_EdE79B8eHtJ-u5ZQYlICeMgmysFHw-7cXFYWjGcOpEQWaAJdt7b7x_PVHn6xmLgvmWW2TUsWhP34KyMwwFIapUYGy1SzAPIXrTOEdJy4Pf88_N-cuf9HGaqRK4bLZq8vBGOFoCaoxdqyYjXTYH68w%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed78SWrgp4UfCCZvNCFKE2gsrJcinLiaGVbWF21PP7b6ZF9yV9A7mVSQXQ2G5dmp1iw0Y31CN6oyLe09_Aeqg3iRH_dmOcUOlSgNsOPE_0Opy3T10V8HEzVGv5oFEuYfvTf-H31JBlnJSNF7iFOL7F_EqtNgh-P9kXG97pJknd7CjS0dFfef8T0Uyjun2heB7OnVShJDvHdQnfs8yjFCuVlmjsD-U-EqsCASFz2AMhh5nPvCfauwmbkTEzGq2KC7TEY0qmU6c9FY2feX4H2Jx6uKtJHRAF4h0my0yUaqaleFVIn0NTjwl9bdKN29OXmdazmk0aaz-Or-OnSD1kABQazYPRNHnl7dYWGcFfWrIojyIKSBo61qQtW1u8UkEqjewrMw%3D%3D)

---

| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed77g90tEPihpDuGo8-KfnPnB7M1R6yqaTBG7f_AcABa29vQJumLrLY1QZ0Y3x9FBntXoE8TK5rrDsWUmJG9sXGaiR3sqhMSA32q6IZ4osEEL4IuebzLo7Ftr25uCiZyq2MnUANl1IVw9nLh7BR64YxjQlgnlWpMpHUUTxGIPuvpRQhh2irdGgc0Fw8dvk0Fo3IXTDuwJqb0NZ8W5WU52AXkU%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed7zNcqaRyM8xH_WtvzUJ1t9FDJR1Br9si5zVCmQ8HeUE054CBJnI84UvuPC1mPvRRlwLTuIMTRDGIn84SThhsuv0QGF0D4NpzNrJX-ML8xgb9TBaHXKJtRR9E8PXH0PdYXUI875v6-ziGLoOr2CvmA3kJM0KDQBTPvLYFtcJGGWiwV-YkQJOdwzCpvhyrIXi8xg%3D%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab9df55998384d3da368d0824eab2f7f&_e=k0zMDx8ybT4OejZiRoed72hfzdXEiwnVVosYWlgtTo3CkWaGIjNO1hYDQfpsH8IaFIG6GLkjMXbSCOO5NDyNIQSBX-73jC_fTUz4dPaXCURUADvMsBzzqU4OOLpEOzg4QQcnAhXMTQU2Vuoeau8PD0E8ODAvCCSd_pLJz-6w4uNrpJOPNAnjkj0L57S3oVh8dGG9PLUFFbe4R8ks2chLC6ueZ4mBnfoneieARB25_Fk%3D)

Without a surge in responses -- Biden will pack the court with liberal activists & erase every conservative victory we've achieved to date.

We're pleading with every patriot to stand with us ONE FINAL TIME against the radical left's disgusting intimidation to destroy Justice Kavanaugh, and our Supreme Court Majority.

**We 're running out of time.** There is no time left to think about this. **IT'S NOW or NEVER.**

We need you to hold the line & defend our court majority now more than ever before. So, please, please don't hold off a minute more.

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f67a0ace1a9344cfad80434b99f4eaa9&_e=ryklzxwVKA8V4kL0K1d8V1TfXYDa-J7ijuWYFAoIg2OAfMd2107fCOeqJO-hhmBdg_X9EkxY8Vy0LG-mZUtD-5UCW_yXXn06yQROAXTK2xsCcz3JoyeI0unQc3BoWfy0tkTzFhV3zxRPVH7IwFCauh7bRutf37mftVZgPxdMHyUuFNGUOv_dU7GGZrSF5BFWZYBEDV0X83pndAluXEOHAPdU91LzzlthRriuID9F5biQhvufjrvm783j9_okQeoJIyqRuNS5p8Kwyh2vNIMOsHPo5xzupkEQWD7WrvHXTjpnLxaII_5dsGfDEJ2K1RHRAGYEaYxHpxhTVCqWDFRVmmTqWPJpB7sCUGRkDOHE9JYmssGgJ-oX6LUfwV78-WZI7vkya_RlrjRzhtfvuPhMSg%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f67a0ace1a9344cfad80434b99f4eaa9&_e=ryklzxwVKA8V4kL0K1d8V1TfXYDa-J7ijuWYFAoIg2OAfMd2107fCOeqJO-hhmBdg_X9EkxY8Vy0LG-mZUtD-5UCW_yXXn06yQROAXTK2xsCcz3JoyeI0unQc3BoWfy0tkTzFhV3zxRPVH7IwFCauh7bRutf37mftVZgPxdMHyUuFNGUOv_dU7GGZrSF5BFWZYBEDV0X83pndAluXEOHAPdU91LzzlthRriuID9F5biQhvufjrvm783j9_okQeoJuy49V9NJxosh_C72YWCMdkvtFkgHJrOagu6XWgNOnmMfJsVburkgSyMOq_c-Vc3NM-UOYG69FWJ-Wtih2aIFEXpGzEDOt06rjQrqR761Ni8ORqWjYXCNsKa8Yx-u2i3tS6JC92d2tb3sWv7UVxFSww%3D%3D)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85b993bf-9404-4e07-baee-44e292cac2fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Now, the GOP’s top-tier recruit kicked off his campaign just last month and is fundraising like crazy. Republicans are eyeing this seat because a blue-to-red flip here virtually ensures they keep their House Majority. _The fight to flip back the House starts right here,_ **and I’m in this to win.** [**Will you rush a donation of $20.24 or another amount right now to ensure that Maryland’s most vulnerable swing district stays blue?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7770e9c5-efd2-4c14-a65d-64290f6a919c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| I served for 25 years in the U.S. Army. I know firsthand that our democracy is not gifted to us. I have witnessed soldiers die in front of me. I have seen the price paid by heroes both in and out of uniform to defend our freedom. **MAGA politicians disgrace those sacrifices by helping Donald Trump willfully tear our constitution to shreds.** Making it harder for people to vote, trying to overturn election results, and inciting an insurrection against our democracy. Those actions are shameful, and the people who aid or enable them are villains or cowards. That’s why, when the most vulnerable Democratic district in Maryland became an open race, I knew I had to step up to ensure that this must-win seat stays blue. I’m an Army veteran who knows democracy is earned through sacrifice. I’ve had enough of politicians who are destroying our democracy. Together we can defeat divisive politics and focus on serving the people, but that requires a movement of grassroots supporters. _Peter: Democracy isn’t a single-player sport, and neither is securing it._ [**If you are in this fight with me, will you please consider pitching in a donation before midnight tomorrow? I’ve been asking supporters to donate $20.24 in honor of next year’s election, but any amount helps.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f2f40e2-b721-4fdc-87c2-535edf15943b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3826589-409e-4ab5-801d-216c22aa8001/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: SAVE THE DATE: Video Call with Dan Cox
body:
Please plan to join and sponsor my video call on week from today, Dec 18th, at 7pm. | | | |
---
| | |
#### Will you join me on my video call?
# Save the Date: 12/18/23 Video Call with Dan Cox.
---
| [Yes I will sponsor Dan's Video Call](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=c65cb25d55&e=5bb5efcda7 "Yes I will sponsor Dan's Video Call")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
| Friend, **Please save the date: December 18, 2023, 7pm. Stay tuned this week for the video call link information with Dan Cox. You will be able to ask Dan questions and provide feedback in real time.**

We are heading into election year in just 20 days and I am asking you to join my campaign video call one week from today to discuss our path to victory.

Our country is close to financial crisis with our debt to GDP ratio at 130%, now at $34 trillion. We need experienced leadership from proven conservatives who know on Day One how to hold federal agencies accountable and save our economy from the run-a-way inflation and debt hurting us all. I am the only candidate in this race who has actual elected experience in doing this and has proven to do so boldly.

You’ve seen the televised footage. Thousands of undocumented migrants are lining up and being granted immediate entrance into the United States.

That is not sound policy for any nation to remain safe or financially stable.

Ronald Reagan once wrote that our nation was facing a “time for choosing.” Well, our ship has almost sailed on that one. If we wait much longer we will be discussing "a time for losing."

The average young, unmarried Marylander, who is making $16-$18/hr, if s/he is laid off will receive only about $224 or so a week. And layoffs are beginning to rise in Maryland. The average American has lost over $2500 in actual cash value under Biden while also seeing a rise in prices and taxes.

As reported in the Herald newspaper last week, according to the USA Today and the United States Labor Department, for the week ending on December 2nd unemployment claims rose in Maryland by about 13% from the week before.

But there is hope. President Trump is running far ahead in the polls and _**I am the only candidate in the race endorsing and supporting his re-election as 47th president.**_ The time is now for victory. There may not be another opportunity.

I firmly believe I will be your Republican nominee for the Sixth District in Congress. Would you help Valerie and me raise the war chest we need to fight for you?

Please [contribute today](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=3772d20e2b&e=5bb5efcda7) to be the first invited to the video call next week.

Thank you.

Dan Cox,
---
|
---
|
---

body:
We're updating our battleground polling data for 2024 and need your feedback.

Friend,

With less than one month until the most important election year in American history, we're fielding our **[December Battleground Assessment](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6506e400fe224efb9c01c5efac6cdff6&_e=xDmv4JiNTBREdMOfKwYu2fCWFLI4Xb1yB69QEG3wIJDPhyZa9sJTTvR2cHmJVEAqV3F9U_2FTKfB9UsGOHa6jGwCJFJzi6DCP_AmiqNwT7bjMJFnlPPtTDgXXP0eyZhf09uO57PAiGtNOHxohsb3ECoNalL7P1tDQtEWyivbK1SDXnqqhi8_tRPnFho5rZiz-KLmqT2NXBPAlnTkJaZRfyxuPVH1Zf-UKbsmnuXrKYWiOd7nCcUvYAIYpTvj2ka2bsXgVp78GJG1_nGbLA0H-enedNtMIESE3sWUOHIPI1NBqM7TbCr9T6qnDgpjbbVc7VEm7bUFizlNzZOQoCyx_7FzcdW3qivC1s5Dx0jW2oggtlo27YtVmrZyRHjgPwPCK8EEGHvsBaGYYkAIw5qVeHPdjOUG2SS4wLATxBH5NvCGNeB4twFv-aEJs9QgvDPBYigvNHaTq47LIhf7MB6A5D9XL3Cw_eO4lP-ytisUqRLx8WwduZB4AYprbiMHPZlC) **now to gauge the GOP's support in critical swing states for next year.

_****[< < TAKE THE DECEMBER BATTLEGROUND ASSESSMENT >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6506e400fe224efb9c01c5efac6cdff6&_e=xDmv4JiNTBREdMOfKwYu2fCWFLI4Xb1yB69QEG3wIJDPhyZa9sJTTvR2cHmJVEAqV3F9U_2FTKfB9UsGOHa6jGwCJFJzi6DCP_AmiqNwT7bjMJFnlPPtTDgXXP0eyZhf09uO57PAiGtNOHxohsb3ECoNalL7P1tDQtEWyivbK1SDXnqqhi8_tRPnFho5rZiz-KLmqT2NXBPAlnTkJaZRfyxuPVH1Zf-UKbsmnuXrKYWiOd7nCcUvYAIYpTvj2ka2bsXgVp78GJG1_nGbLA0H-enedNtMIESE3sWUOHIPI1NBqM7TbCr9T6qnDgpjbbVc7VEm7bUFizlNzZOQoCyx_7FzcdW3qivC1s5Dx0jW2oimPsvIMLup2W2HRpaoCgt1FSueRq6yzoRWsVxD1mgJ84x-ss2Z_RgnyAfEcRnvjLrclqM0a-20wKHAlWGlyLGwzeHUFly9DAcKrfH7mHlZgKXhuy5VMBO-5kOVdLFytffMmSrgtSoz8ESzq1s148vU)****_
Crooked Joe Biden and the socialist Senate Democrats have proven time and time again that they are unfit to lead America forward.
_****[Soaring inflation, a wide open southern border, loss of energy independence, two new wars, and an economy in ruins.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6506e400fe224efb9c01c5efac6cdff6&_e=xDmv4JiNTBREdMOfKwYu2fCWFLI4Xb1yB69QEG3wIJDPhyZa9sJTTvR2cHmJVEAqV3F9U_2FTKfB9UsGOHa6jGwCJFJzi6DCP_AmiqNwT7bjMJFnlPPtTDgXXP0eyZhf09uO57PAiGtNOHxohsb3ECoNalL7P1tDQtEWyivbK1SDXnqqhi8_tRPnFho5rZiz-KLmqT2NXBPAlnTkJaZRfyxuPVH1Zf-UKbsmnuXrKYWiOd7nCcUvYAIYpTvj2ka2bsXgVp78GJG1_nGbLA0H-enedNtMIESE3sWUOHIPI1NBqM7TbCr9T6qnDgpjbbVc7VEm7bUFizlNzZOQoCyx_7FzcdW3qivC1s5Dx0jW2ohFhjbFdtessrXRPqVpNGdA58b8TEohYH4JU7xBia2rHJ6jP8W__u9aPwuuLPz16XxaZTYq89jBYz5jaLXnZgK63YNMJ5x0rUkK9XEbMth46BVBIjoINu0owXBxtK-43yBeLP21aGBM3RiVNhw3Qzku)** **_
These are just some of the radical left's accomplishments after years of controlling both the White House and the Senate majority.

The one-narrative news networks just can’t help themselves when they’re called out. “Careers” built on identity politics and deciding that the America First agenda is not the future of this country. They are wrong.

Fellow American,

**The mainstream media strikes again.** The one-narrative news networks just can’t help themselves when they’re called out. “Careers” built on identity politics and deciding that the America First agenda is not the future of this country. _**They are wrong.**_

This point was made all too clear recently on CNN when Van Jones said this of me:
> _“You’re watching the rise of an American demagogue that is a very, very despicable person. And I literally, I was— I was shaking listening to him talk because a lot of people don’t know. That is one step away from Nazi propaganda coming out of his mouth.”_
Fellow American, I suppose it was only a matter of time until I was called Nazi-like. Give me a break. [**We all know that the mainstream media is a tool for the Establishment and their favorite method of control.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=58f8e8dcd1d1484abc5a29389892f5db&_e=CrbJmHAQg6jchhqBjqWpp-IFOjazOxPlnq_1wmUYNaQK-1ZIqz8q4uvW1NWSxJFUgPDnes-6vMO8s69uDaK_n37bmry1uZR44zH6d42WbFukHe9re_JBrHpY9HyvLsCGzkNM7jQMhdj43Wt7D9rquTzYdZ2rcGG0ZZisBoxQGcnsde0b7khg3MjU28VsMKoamRlkj5b76OU37V-PEUgd1rbJY1t77oRLMTT-rhEwOuwgfs7XopJn8EPgff4n0n7Oq_wKA4_kup4ipN2UfYOyDILsjmW92cISUj2IUQJrf1Drg08TNpdoy4-1_NdPCRcARpTVu7MIUJDXZ0HxIY9--tLcmZd54ukd8ifPHd5s8Mqz13IYT4B04BtckgsOXhvBTVX18b0fAxzoWn_14uaQ41tuPjCJCW5fd0SRE1S8jlU%3D)

| [** DISRUPT THE NARRATIVE **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=58f8e8dcd1d1484abc5a29389892f5db&_e=CrbJmHAQg6jchhqBjqWpp-IFOjazOxPlnq_1wmUYNaQK-1ZIqz8q4uvW1NWSxJFUgPDnes-6vMO8s69uDaK_n37bmry1uZR44zH6d42WbFukHe9re_JBrHpY9HyvLsCGzkNM7jQMhdj43Wt7D9rquTzYdZ2rcGG0ZZisBoxQGcnsde0b7khg3MjU28VsMKoamRlkj5b76OU37V-PEUgd1rbJY1t77oRLMTT-rhEwOuwgfs7XopJn8EPgff4n0n7OpAtQMw4SECIx9LmfWbGkFybSyS-98VuEmrDO4nbP76EQ0uOjBaQCD7JwlXbPPf0A98v1xsaCigW3fTWWXBHSjdRGX9K-d4qBM5xf6lr4zrZ2LnJsZA95kvmRdsiLj_GiRl4SQZMy4D30hsmDejfROhGoJnYnUp7ibdPtizLMamM%3D)
---

I’ll keep calling them out. The Trump-Russia collusion hoax? About the origins of Covid, about funding Ukraine’s corruption, about Hunter Biden, about Jan 6th looking more and more like entrapment. Now, they’re upset at me calling out the “Great Replacement” not being a “conspiracy theory.”

For that, we just need to go back to Van’s words from just 2 years ago:
> _“The request from the racial justice left: we want the white majority to go from being a majority to being a minority and like it. That’s a tough request, and change is hard.”_
He makes a great case for why it’s not a conspiracy, right? I’m speaking the **TRUTH** about the topics that you’re not supposed to talk about.

[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=58f8e8dcd1d1484abc5a29389892f5db&_e=CrbJmHAQg6jchhqBjqWpp-IFOjazOxPlnq_1wmUYNaQK-1ZIqz8q4uvW1NWSxJFUgPDnes-6vMO8s69uDaK_n37bmry1uZR44zH6d42WbFukHe9re_JBrHpY9HyvLsCGzkNM7jQMhdj43Wt7D9rquTzYdZ2rcGG0ZZisBoxQGcnsde0b7khg3MjU28VsMKoamRlkj5b76OU37V-PEUgd1rbJY1t77oRLMTT-rhEwOuwgfs7XopJn8EPgff4n0n7O4gSMmg5Arjl21_Wa3Zbbqxj-D2yEvGV19YdnFIXACBTyir35KrpvXKAszSmZ4ebs27a8f3GQ33etBm1kKcVSjSgJPuGm9vSWYnNxaSdyFh7i1eXBdeMcCzMolf-31ZkdUxHznkk64fwo4B_pL1li_qxSwS3Uosj-_6AyrfIUYZ8%3D)
---

Fellow American, here’s the bottom line and where we go from here. I’m not playing their game. I’m relying on the grassroots support of people like you to continue challenging the mainstream narrative.

They want division. The Establishment wants more identity politics, this new religion that says your race, your gender, and your sexuality are your identity. It is anti-American. And it is dividing this country to a breaking point. [**Help me stand against it today; it’s not about the money, it’s about the signal we send. Whether it’s $1 or $100 can you help me send a message that we won’t stand for this anymore.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=58f8e8dcd1d1484abc5a29389892f5db&_e=CrbJmHAQg6jchhqBjqWpp-IFOjazOxPlnq_1wmUYNaQK-1ZIqz8q4uvW1NWSxJFUgPDnes-6vMO8s69uDaK_n37bmry1uZR44zH6d42WbFukHe9re_JBrHpY9HyvLsCGzkNM7jQMhdj43Wt7D9rquTzYdZ2rcGG0ZZisBoxQGcnsde0b7khg3MjU28VsMKoamRlkj5b76OU37V-PEUgd1rbJY1t77oRLMTT-rhEwOuwgfs7XopJn8EPgff4n0n7Obw8fktxGYDcdmEWQZG1fFaJ6c9MmG4Ao4Vnz8QP-C5jV0T4jvoPjIudUmgOg0J2SH8pZ6MOz0jVhEuzmxbv0K335eseT_CHFVL2UYHOcrLLKgWTyzYidEWc7i-t86Ofw1U8GBzn5EZV8iw9ed9cb7VTw38WUd1QksKAlMd8XbqM%3D)

Thank you,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The one-narrative news networks just can’t help themselves when they’re called out. “Careers” built on identity politics and deciding that the America First agenda is not the future of this country. They are wrong. | | Fellow American, The mainstream media strikes again. The one-narrative news networks just can’t help themselves when they’re called out. “Careers” built on identity politics and deciding that the America First agenda is not the future of this country. They are wrong. This point was made all too clear recently on CNN when Van Jones said this of me: “You’re watching the rise of an American demagogue that is a very, very despicable person. And I literally, I was— I was shaking listening to him talk because a lot of people don’t know. That is one step away from Nazi propaganda coming out of his mouth.” Fellow American, I suppose it was only a matter of time until I was called Nazi-like. Give me a break. | I’ll keep calling them out. The Trump-Russia collusion hoax? About the origins of Covid, about funding Ukraine’s corruption, about Hunter Biden, about Jan 6th looking more and more like entrapment. Now, they’re upset at me calling out the “Great Replacement” not being a “conspiracy theory.” For that, we just need to go back to Van’s words from just 2 years ago: “The request from the racial justice left: we want the white majority to go from being a majority to being a minority and like it. That’s a tough request, and change is hard.” He makes a great case for why it’s not a conspiracy, right? I’m speaking the TRUTH about the topics that you’re not supposed to talk about. Fellow American, here’s the bottom line and where we go from here. I’m not playing their game. I’m relying on the grassroots support of people like you to continue challenging the mainstream narrative. They want division. The Establishment wants more identity politics, this new religion that says your race, your gender, and your sexuality are your identity. It is anti-American. And it is dividing this country to a breaking point. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: DC Removing 103,000 Ineligible Names from the Voter Rolls in Response to Judicial Watch
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it sent notice letters to election officials in the District of Columbia, California, and Illinois, notifying them of evident violations of the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) of 1993, based on their failure to remove inactive voters from their registration rolls. The letters point out that these jurisdictions publicly reported removing few or no ineligible voter registrations under a key provision of the NVRA.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 10, 2023
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66148&L=30885&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtcmVtb3ZpbmctMTAzMDAwLWluZWxpZ2libGUtbmFtZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5c63c38583bf0aa63842f46d551662564998bd73efbc34863520b78fbeba5710) | **[DC Removing 103,000 Ineligible Names from the Voter Rolls in Response to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66148&L=30885&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtcmVtb3ZpbmctMTAzMDAwLWluZWxpZ2libGUtbmFtZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5c63c38583bf0aa63842f46d551662564998bd73efbc34863520b78fbeba5710)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it sent notice letters to election officials in the District of Columbia, California, and Illinois, notifying them of evident violations of the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) of 1993, based on their failure to remove inactive voters from their registration rolls. The letters point out that these jurisdictions publicly reported removing few or no ineligible voter registrations under a key provision of the NVRA. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it sent notice letters to election officials in the District of Columbia, California, and Illinois, notifying them of evident violations of the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) of 1993, based on their failure to remove inactive voters from their registration rolls. The letters point out that these jurisdictions publicly reported removing few or no ineligible voter registrations under a key provision of the NVRA. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 10, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it sent notice letters to election officials in the District of Columbia, California, and Illinois, notifying them of evident violations of the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) of 1993, based on their failure to remove inactive voters from their registration rolls. The letters point out that these jurisdictions publicly reported removing few or no ineligible voter registrations under a key provision of the NVRA. ---|--- | | | | | Foreign terrorist organizations can exploit the southwest border as the United States faces the highest risk of an attack following the Hamas onslaught in Israel, according to Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) Director Christopher Wray. The FBI chief revealed that terrorist threats to the nation have skyrocketed since October during testimony this week before the Senate Judiciary Committee. In his prepared statement Wray failed to include the dire security threats created by the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies. The crucial information only surfaced and became part of the official record because a Republican lawmaker grilled Wray about it. ---|--- | | | | | “These records show the lengths to which a ‘Homeland Security’ Deep State agency went in its effort to censor and suppress Americans during and after the 2020 election,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That it took a federal lawsuit to extract these disturbing records should raise additional worries about what else this Biden administration is up to.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that the Minnesota Court of Appeals reversed the trial court’s ruling and allows Judicial Watch’s historic lawsuit filed on behalf of a Minneapolis taxpayer over a teachers’ contract that provides discriminatory job protections to certain racial minorities to proceed ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner Several states and the District of Columbia have been hit by an election watchdog for failing to clean up their voter rolls of the dead and ineligible. Judicial Watch said it just finished investigating registrations and sent letters to the district, California, and Illinois warning that they are violating the National Voter Registration Act by not cleaning up the rolls. Newsweek The Department of Justice recently released a redacted subpoena for ex-President Donald Trump‘s account on Twitter, now named X, amid Special Counsel Jack Smith‘s investigation of attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/854de85242da/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6684710?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
# In The News....
This week, John Teichert joined Jim Lokay on Fox’s The Final 5 and Andrew Wilkow on The Wilkow Majority to discuss his bid for the U.S. Senate and the need for leadership in Washington, D.C.
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=71fa7624b9&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
While discussing the future of the American government on [The Final 5](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ba19625d30&e=1b1fb1ad9f), Teichert explained his optimism in the American public by saying, **“There’s optimism because this is an amazing American experiment. I jumped into this race because I'm concerned that if we head down the direction that is the status quo, then we might go astray as a country. But I believe that people are the solution to the problems, and they just need to be unleashed and unshackled from the status quo that is harming them and their families.”**
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e47b4cf11d&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Wednesday, Teichert joined [Andrew Wilkow](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e9c4d2ee11&e=1b1fb1ad9f), discussing federal issues on foreign affairs. John stated on the matter, **“The Constitution defines the responsibility of going to war to Congress, so that people get a say on what our federal government does. And whether it's Ukraine or whether it’s the Western Pacific or the Middle East, all of those things need to go through Congress - but we also need to get control of borders because it is out of control and it's a pressing national security crisis that's already here in our country.”**
|
---
# Endorsement Alerts!

Last week, the endorsements began to roll in as John Teichert, a retired Air Force Brigadier General, seeks the GOP nomination as a candidate for U.S. Senate. Teichert was excited to announce that he’s received support in his race for Senate from State Senator Johnny Ray Salling from Baltimore County (District 06), Delegate Wayne Hartman from Worcester and Wicomico Counties (District 38C), and Delegate Matt Morgan from St. Mary’s County (District 29A). Read their full statement [here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=8a7d5a9d76&e=1b1fb1ad9f).
This week, endorsements for John’s candidacy for the U.S. Senate continued, with Former Maryland Lieutenant Governor Boyd Rutherford and Former Secretary of Commerce Mike Gill announcing their support for Teichert for Senate. Read their full statements [here.](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=7319d90ae0&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
# On the Trail...
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
# Thoughts...
On Monday, December 4th, General Teichert released “The Natural Result of a Pro-Criminal Society”, writing about soft-on-crime politicians and policies, and their effect on today’s crime-ridden society. Read the full article [here.](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=d73c617bba&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Friday, December 8th, John Teichert released “A Unique Perspective For Hanukkah in 2023”, speaking on geopolitical, political, and cultural issues facing the Jewish population. Read the full article [here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=79ee17aef1&e=1b1fb1ad9f).
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=b1d5625b80&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John wishes a very happy and blessed Hanukkah to his Jewish friends and the Jewish population around the world!
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=34c967f4be&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
Visiting the last warship afloat that was present at Pearl Harbor in 1941, General Teichert reflected on the significance of Pearl Harbor in American history.
Thank you for joining John on the trail as he looks to become the next U.S. Senator for the State of Maryland. Make sure to check out [teichertformaryland.com](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=b5a98e937d&e=1b1fb1ad9f) and see how you can donate, get involved, and join the mailing list!

|

body:
I knew what I had to do| | |
---
[](http://links.friendsofkellencurry.com/u/click?_t=6ee7a82151bd4c5caddc8b7097991cb3&_m=4c18b2a8dac5493b8a2eb5ad645322a8&_e=03H5ImP-cbU68uE-ix47W2-eOeQM9gxQSqf8ChR86T4oSCNiuKQuGgDKLRvMUmfg4S4SZuoJ2sDvCsESdvh_uWNkxlYXZ8upCWzhGxdkS7ZCLm370FVM3LZ8SIwzZr6eFlBhRmicRV-41oU2PrK3r6gD4B_2Wy0-h5HkYNmfHQa7wimZinQfGTDNF9JqwNGzcwAthbDMB-0vJLYMzRB_Kh7aA39qtc4VEmZPtlJaSXKXyyaJSnM_yj2wmfcLQJ3dqSV8zOz5ynRTCbm-xAWva-GMbTxwQ8Azr_s6oxgmYjQtVc6JTtoSd7OyQ3CZg66FMQYVQqW6bRePxiiwkKZYWAb3MNOOHG2emNyXTLPRIAjMcQXV1w5JExK6Y52gaKKBqrAA2dZdM4OVe6iuOcGz5vOomeYGlVqhmomkq6xqXDYoblt9unxX7hewrd8mhdAQ)

Friend, I packed up my desk on Wall St. and shut off the lights in my J.P. Morgan office for the last time. Because I was utterly terrified of something I saw. Something I couldn't go on living my life ignoring. When I told people, they called me crazy. I wasn’t leaving Wall Street for another finance executive role... **[I took a good look at Washington D.C. and realized that God was calling me to step up and do something before the America I loved was destroyed.](http://links.friendsofkellencurry.com/u/click?_t=6ee7a82151bd4c5caddc8b7097991cb3&_m=4c18b2a8dac5493b8a2eb5ad645322a8&_e=03H5ImP-cbU68uE-ix47W2-eOeQM9gxQSqf8ChR86T4oSCNiuKQuGgDKLRvMUmfg4S4SZuoJ2sDvCsESdvh_uWNkxlYXZ8upCWzhGxdkS7ZCLm370FVM3LZ8SIwzZr6eFlBhRmicRV-41oU2PrK3r6gD4B_2Wy0-h5HkYNmfHQa7wimZinQfGTDNF9JqwNGzcwAthbDMB-0vJLYMzRB_Kh7aA39qtc4VEmZPtlJaSXKXyyaJSnM_yj2wmfcLQJ3dqSV8zOz5ynRTCbm-xAWva-GMbTxwQ8Azr_s6oxgmYjTjC5coOWwvde5KJQhwTfoNndaLgFCK3icUmp6UwLcYEJDs5kv11B1OvDzcSAsJm58mzA-pAuBUGWN3wvKntXWvUoZ6dVrLsxOdZEdeinD5CQplSuYPiZwjWNPju0mXhRGteT4-aPNXrVwNQPGe5VxF)** **I decided to run for Congress in NY-3 because Crooked Joe Biden’s corruption has been a death sentence to our country. And only a new generation of conservatives can truly turn things around. ** That’s why throughout my time on Wall St. I knew that there was something missing: I knew that I was meant to continue my service to this country. **[But I can’t put Washington on notice without your help, Friend!](http://links.friendsofkellencurry.com/u/click?_t=6ee7a82151bd4c5caddc8b7097991cb3&_m=4c18b2a8dac5493b8a2eb5ad645322a8&_e=03H5ImP-cbU68uE-ix47W2-eOeQM9gxQSqf8ChR86T4oSCNiuKQuGgDKLRvMUmfg4S4SZuoJ2sDvCsESdvh_uWNkxlYXZ8upCWzhGxdkS7ZCLm370FVM3LZ8SIwzZr6eFlBhRmicRV-41oU2PrK3r6gD4B_2Wy0-h5HkYNmfHQa7wimZinQfGTDNF9JqwNGzcwAthbDMB-0vJLYMzRB_Kh7aA39qtc4VEmZPtlJaSXKXyyaJSnM_yj2wmfcLQJ3dqSV8zOz5ynRTCbm-xAWva-GMbTxwQ8Azr_s6oxgmYjQB4mBlqcCf6_MCI2a-XWKdp3dR61hb-OyH8pEiGSnhhs_h64K5nHwX_8JHlqI2DlADXf6hzUDvkaSAchk8f-9qxgYXdfZanYioMIWMi01SXD4bBZe-fBibe6zF08sbZQCJ3WDBL9RA_p1-7QkvUcR4)** It's time to declare that the radical left won’t get away with their corrupt games any longer. **[Will you help me live out my calling to continue to serve this country by sending me to Washington?](http://links.friendsofkellencurry.com/u/click?_t=6ee7a82151bd4c5caddc8b7097991cb3&_m=4c18b2a8dac5493b8a2eb5ad645322a8&_e=03H5ImP-cbU68uE-ix47W2-eOeQM9gxQSqf8ChR86T4oSCNiuKQuGgDKLRvMUmfg4S4SZuoJ2sDvCsESdvh_uWNkxlYXZ8upCWzhGxdkS7ZCLm370FVM3LZ8SIwzZr6eFlBhRmicRV-41oU2PrK3r6gD4B_2Wy0-h5HkYNmfHQa7wimZinQfGTDNF9JqwNGzcwAthbDMB-0vJLYMzRB_Kh7aA39qtc4VEmZPtlJaSXKXyyaJSnM_yj2wmfcLQJ3dqSV8zOz5ynRTCbm-xAWva-GMbTxwQ8Azr_s6oxgmYjSUfT9VGpV4wqGjmhdE3DX0aN3-PSGfbSuyhdxk9Csl47muUhpNG_0GejEKZihCrzkM4G2BnM4UMxV2CxEZmZTXwtKg2cRtqaulwRu6uKFNLLO2Nx9-HaS7wziPaMImSspCSUCb8-dLUz_7jBTOY-M2)** With gratitude, Kellen

| | [](http://links.friendsofkellencurry.com/u/click?_t=6ee7a82151bd4c5caddc8b7097991cb3&_m=4c18b2a8dac5493b8a2eb5ad645322a8&_e=03H5ImP-cbU68uE-ix47W2-eOeQM9gxQSqf8ChR86T4oSCNiuKQuGgDKLRvMUmfg4S4SZuoJ2sDvCsESdvh_uWNkxlYXZ8upCWzhGxdkS7ZCLm370FVM3LZ8SIwzZr6eFlBhRmicRV-41oU2PrK3r6gD4B_2Wy0-h5HkYNmfHQa7wimZinQfGTDNF9JqwNGzcwAthbDMB-0vJLYMzRB_Kh7aA39qtc4VEmZPtlJaSXKXyyaJSnM_yj2wmfcLQJ3dqSV8zOz5ynRTCbm-xAWva-GMbTxwQ8Azr_s6oxgmYjQB88feunxZ-FsVrMkOSYwz5j7NuTpC641921GPLxC4ATO5TrLJl-9Rf6d-4iUf__uRYSAqk5iP1r-OB-o6njqND0aezWdh86qAmUcQXbrzHAXV_jjRay9LrG3MHWdiylqOv25ig3E7vze_nJwM-Rte)

name: Schiff HQ
subject: We want to know your thoughts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We need to defend the White House in 2024 – we can’t afford four more years of Donald Trump.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4673%2E5257348%2E9-DnsT)
Derek,
We’re less than a year away from Election Day, and the presidential race is at the center of the nation's attention.
The frontrunners of the presidential race are Joe Biden and Donald Trump, and despite Trump's indictments and crimes, he’s outpacing every single Republican candidate.
Rather than Trump’s influence diminishing after the January 6 insurrection at the Capitol, it has only grown stronger.
President Biden has signed legislation to protect our climate, rebuild our infrastructure, invest in jobs and manufacturing, expand health care for veterans, keep guns out of the hands of abusers, and bring our economy out of the pandemic and build it back bigger and stronger.
**We need Joe Biden in the White House to continue this work.**
**We need to defend the White House in 2024 because we can’t afford four more years of Donald Trump.**
[**Derek, take this poll to let us know if you approve of Joe Biden’s leadership in office.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202312-biden-survey/.4BvbDc&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20231211_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4673%2E5257348%2E9-DnsT)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This week in Texas - Dec. 11
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here’s what Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Firing the extremists on the Texas Supreme Court

The 9 GOP justices on the Texas Supreme Court proved that they are unfit
to uphold the law this weekend when they blocked Kate Cox from getting an
emergency abortion. We just learned that Cox was forced to flee the state,
despite her deteriorating medical condition, to get the healthcare she
needs.

Texas’ abortion ban is supposed to provide medical exceptions for people
like Cox, whose nonviable pregnancy each day makes her more susceptible to
permanent infertility and life-threatening infection. But these justices
threw the book at this woman, jeopardizing her life to advance their own
politics and extremist views.

If you need any more proof that these justices are incapable of ruling
impartially on these life-or-death cases, here’s a video of Justice John
Devine bragging about getting arrested 37 times for harassing women at
abortion clinics:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231211.qAULvJ&refcode=ema20231211-236204&t=1001&akid=236204%2E444211%2EPxvlLO ][IMG]

Texas Supreme Court justices are chosen through partisan elections. Three
of them — including Devine — are up for re-election next year. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231211.qAULvJ&refcode=ema20231211-236204&t=1002&akid=236204%2E444211%2EPxvlLO ]Please
chip in whatever you can today to help us replace these extremists with
justices who will protect the lives of Texas women.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231211.qAULvJ&refcode=ema20231211-236204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=236204%2E444211%2EPxvlLO ]DONATE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Help us register Democratic voters in Texas

Last week, we launched an ambitious new program to bring hundreds of
thousands of eligible but unregistered Democrats onto the rolls in Texas.
We are training an army of volunteers who will mail, text, call, and meet
Texans in-person across the state to help them register to vote.

This work is critical if we’re going to elect Democrats up and down the
ballot in 2024. No matter where you live in Texas or if you live out of
state, we need your help to reach as many voters as possible. Please join
this effort by signing up for a volunteer training below:

TEXTING TEAM TRAINING
Help us text unregistered voters!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60419?t=1022&akid=236204%2E444211%2EPxvlLO ]Tuesday, Dec. 12 at 12:00PM CT

VOLUNTEER DEPUTY REGISTRAR (VDR) TRAINING
If you live in Texas, become a VDR to register Texas voters!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60420?t=1023&akid=236204%2E444211%2EPxvlLO ]Thursday, Dec. 14 at 5:30PM CT

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=236204%2E444211%2EPxvlLO

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: BREAKING: House votes 221-197 to block the EPA's tailpipe emissions standards. We must fight back >>
body:
__The only way to defeat this bill is to mobilize - and fast. |
---

|
**In a vote of 221-197, the House of Representatives voted last week to prohibit the EPA from maintaining current or strengthening future tailpipe emissions standards for vehicles.**

Peter, cars are our country's #1 source of greenhouse gas emissions -- and they are a _huge_ source of harmful pollution. To protect the air we breathe and have any hope of curbing the climate crisis, we MUST switch to clean cars as fast as possible.

This bill is now headed to the Senate, and there are a handful of key senators who are on the fence. LCV needs to keep up the pressure if we're going to prevent this disastrous bill from getting a vote. **The only way to do that is to mobilize -- and fast... but we need your help to make it happen.**

[Please, Peter -- the best thing you can do right now to help cut this harmful pollution is renew your membership to power our campaign. Right now, it only costs $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**How did we get here?** Former President Trump granted a favor to Big Oil by **gutting our nation 's successful Cleaner Car Standards,** a critical tool in the fight against climate change. His decision exacerbated racial inequities by putting low-wealth and communities of color who disproportionately live near freight depots and congested roadways at further risk of respiratory illnesses and other serious health conditions.

Now, these same polluting corporations are pulling out all the stops, spending heavily on lobbying the Biden administration and Congress to maintain their ability to pollute our communities and environment. With this vote, the House of Representatives has chosen to do Big Oil's bidding.

**We need to ensure that people 's -- not polluters' -- voices are heard loud and clear by our elected officials.** We need phones to be ringing off the hook. We need emails pouring into congressional offices from constituents. We need to rally support for protecting our health and environment in Washington D.C. and in states and districts across the country.

_**No one knows how to mobilize support for strong policies better than LCV.**_ We've been building political power for people and our planet for decades -- and we know how to win. But the truth is, **a campaign like this takes resources we just don 't have right now.** That's why your LCV membership is so important -- and why I'm asking for your support today.

[Please, renew your membership now. Even $5 can have a big impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Please don't wait -- the next few days are crucial!

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

_**P.S. Peter, we know that this is a busy time of year for your inbox. If you renew today, we won 't reach out again before December 31. [Renew now >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)**_ ____ |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10354147&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDIyMTcxNgS2&spReportId=MTg4MDIyMTcxNgS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10354147&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDIyMTcxNgS2&spReportId=MTg4MDIyMTcxNgS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
