name: Katie Porter
subject: Here’s what we can do right now to clean up corruption in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken corporate PAC money.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34600%2E3422442%2EosCqsf)
Derek, our campaign finance system allows for legalized corruption. Here’s how to clean it up:
* Ban taking donations from registered lobbyists
* Ban corporate PAC money
* Overturn _Citizens United_ and get dark money out of politics

While I’ll keep pushing for these reforms, I won’t BS you: It’s an uphill climb to enact them. But right now, _**every single Member of Congress has a choice to make_** : how they fund their own campaign.
That’s why I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Big Bank CEOs. I’m one of just eleven Members of Congress who rejects federal lobbyist money. This pledge should be the norm, not an exception.
**You can help reduce the role of big money in politics by voting for and supporting people-powered candidates.** Your donations to our campaign are so meaningful because I rely on grassroots supporters. Seriously, 99% of our donations are of $100 or less. [**Can you chip in today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231211?refcode=EMAO23_1_COR_20231211_V1_F&refcode2=34600_3422442_osCqsf&akid=34600%2E3422442%2EosCqsf)
[Chip in ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231211?refcode=EMAO23_1_COR_20231211_V1_F&refcode2=34600_3422442_osCqsf&akid=34600%2E3422442%2EosCqsf)
I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken corporate PAC money. It’s not a pledge I took just because I’m running for the U.S. Senate, this is who I am.
**I know people make a real sacrifice when they donate.** I’m SO grateful for every grassroots supporter, because I literally would not have made it to Congress without the teachers, service workers, and retired folks who power our campaign and keep me fighting against corporate special interests and corruption.
Onward!
Katie Porter
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231211?refcode=EMAO23_1_COR_20231211_V1_F&refcode2=34600_3422442_osCqsf&akid=34600%2E3422442%2EosCqsf)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_COR_20231211_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34600_3422442_osCqsf&akid=34600%2E3422442%2EosCqsf)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=34600%2E3422442%2EosCqsf)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=34600%2E3422442%2EosCqsf)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Randy B. Corporon - ATP
subject: Arapahoe Tea Party December Update
body:
No meeting, No Christmas Party, and Bah Humbug!
| | | |
---
---
| Tea Party Patriot,
Dear Tea Party Patriot:
Merry Christmas!
This is a reminder that there is no December meeting this Tuesday night, December 12th. See you on January 9, 2024!
Our apologies to all as we were not able to facilitate a Christmas party.
We hope you have a great holiday and Happy New Year!

---
| My Best,

Hi, friend, it's Wendy Davis. I'm going to ask you to support my good friend Colin Allred's campaign to defeat Ted Cruz. But first, let me tell you why Colin is the steady leader we need in the Senate:
I first met Colin when he worked as the DFW Regional Voter Protection Director for my campaign in 2014.
**Here's the thing about Colin:****** What you see is what you get – Colin is a community servant before all else. I knew from the day I hired him _(__almost 10 years ago!__)_ that he would do everything in his power to make sure Texans have every opportunity to succeed.
That's why I was so proud to endorse him in 2018 when he decided to run for Congress and defied all odds to defeat a 22-year Republican incumbent.
**And it's why I'm thrilled to support Colin again now. He can defeat Ted Cruz _if_ we give him the resources he needs to reach voters across Texas. That's why I'm personally asking _you_ to support him, too. I'm sure I don't need to convince you how terrible Ted Cruz has been for Texans.
His attacks on our reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights, his outrageous book ban, his irresponsible trip to Cancun while a winter storm caused power outages across the state ... I could go on and on, but the long and short of it is this: **We need a new senator, and Colin Allred is the real deal.**
Experts agree Texas is winnable. FiveThirtyEight called it Democrats' best pickup opportunity in 2024, and CNN says Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot. All we need is a powerful, Texas-sized grassroots movement made up of passionate supporters like you, friend.
[**So please, will you join me by splitting a donation of any amount between Colin's and Debbie's campaigns today? Colin needs to raise $50,000 by midnight, and I promised we'd help him get there. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. clean_body: I'm personally asking | | | = Hi, friend, it's Wendy Davis. I'm going to ask you to support my good friend Colin Allred's campaign to defeat Ted Cruz. But first, let me tell you why Colin is the steady leader we need in the Senate: I first met Colin when he worked as the DFW Regional Voter Protection Director for my campaign in 2014. Here's the thing about Colin:** What you see is what you get – Colin is a community servant before all else. I knew from the day I hired him (almost 10 years ago!) that he would do everything in his power to make sure Texans have every opportunity to succeed. That's why I was so proud to endorse him in 2018 when he decided to run for Congress and defied all odds to defeat a 22-year Republican incumbent. And it's why I'm thrilled to support Colin again now. He can defeat Ted Cruz if we give him the resources he needs to reach voters across Texas. That's why I'm personally asking you to support him, too. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Colin Allred will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm sure I don't need to convince you how terrible Ted Cruz has been for Texans. His attacks on our reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights, his outrageous book ban, his irresponsible trip to Cancun while a winter storm caused power outages across the state ... I could go on and on, but the long and short of it is this: We need a new senator, and Colin Allred is the real deal. Experts agree Texas is winnable. FiveThirtyEight called it Democrats' best pickup opportunity in 2024, and CNN says Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot. All we need is a powerful, Texas-sized grassroots movement made up of passionate supporters like you, friend. = I promise you won't regret this, Wendy Davis | | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

**[_So, if you still care about FREE and FAIR elections, please complete our Election Integrity Audit before submissions are due at 11:59 pm._](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ed94b57be0584a6298b9259ccbc29e4d&_e=rS5Tnj9lTqnPgYu9vE-gbhuHmgLbdWujjHIai_flw3BhKqNd5K_5tl84DDkMaFtLH2EfFymkKoXelbXhU-1iqXNGmio-DJsCCgX8qyANJ7ejAWyXS6ufVLT3U5EGll5Icb7_j3SFJkDOgee_VG7Afbm6AcqYKyNGBtEOzhnih0Bn8gVWYVJ1jQMfr3qKJIueiDvBjj3kcO0n1RxEdJK8796YY7PWuIxdqKMe5uxKTt5TM_qPbqfimC0f8Z8Qgw1n_ONAWIQQFHd5JxBxqYmGi0RTQWvWKlE0IODltgs2rn3BL_2rkS9NplUkvDxqLd50854H-M9PkKrn1bZK0VhDOihlkX0PFR-I34_q8ljtc2vTjpf3-L1IcpZD4T2yYt_2 "So, if you still care about FREE and FAIR elections, please complete our Election Integrity Audit before submissions are due at 11:59 pm.")**

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74993097/443260853/-233825198?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2M5N2Y5My02Njk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a8iQsk-HpUusN1gD-gGUNI-KPFJ2wTEp_Vk9F7Qw5UQ=)
Peter, have you heard the news?

Former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy announced he’s resigning at the end of this month instead of finishing out his term.

McCarthy will be remembered for the 15 rounds of voting to elect him as Speaker of the House in January – and for his downfall at the hands of the far-right extremist he catered to.

But here’s why this matters in CA-27:

**McCarthy has been one of Mike Garcia’s most steadfast funders. Between his super PAC and fundraising committees, he has boosted Garcia to the tune of millions of dollars over the years.**

Garcia just lost a key ally, and everyone is taking notice.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74993098/443260854/-233825198?refcode=em-12.11.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2M5N2Y5My02Njk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a8iQsk-HpUusN1gD-gGUNI-KPFJ2wTEp_Vk9F7Qw5UQ=)

Meanwhile, Team Whitesides is building a community-centered campaign to give CA-27 the representation we deserve. Can we count on you to chip in $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74993099/443260855/-233825198?refcode=em-12.11.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2M5N2Y5My02Njk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a8iQsk-HpUusN1gD-gGUNI-KPFJ2wTEp_Vk9F7Qw5UQ=)**

With or without McCarthy, Republicans in the House – including extremists like Mike Garcia – are desperate to cling on to their power.

But they are on their heels now, Peter. Only a handful of seats wins back the majority, and this California toss-up race could be one of our best chances in the country to do it.

**[If you haven’t yet, please give $3 or any amount toward our $50,000 end-of-year goal to flip CA-27 and stop Mike Garcia in his tracks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74993106/443260863/-233825198?refcode=em-12.11.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2M5N2Y5My02Njk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a8iQsk-HpUusN1gD-gGUNI-KPFJ2wTEp_Vk9F7Qw5UQ=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, have you heard the news? Former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy announced he’s resigning at the end of this month instead of finishing out his term. McCarthy will be remembered for the 15 rounds of voting to elect him as Speaker of the House in January – and for his downfall at the hands of the far-right extremist he catered to. But here’s why this matters in CA-27: McCarthy has been one of Mike Garcia’s most steadfast funders. Between his super PAC and fundraising committees, he has boosted Garcia to the tune of millions of dollars over the years. Garcia just lost a key ally, and everyone is taking notice. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = With or without McCarthy, Republicans in the House – including extremists like Mike Garcia – are desperate to cling on to their power. But they are on their heels now, Peter. Only a handful of seats wins back the majority, and this California toss-up race could be one of our best chances in the country to do it. = Thanks, Team George Whitesides =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

Yikes, team — **Matt Gaetz just endorsed our opponent.** It's hard to overstate just how distasteful this endorsement is. But in case you're not familiar with Matt Gaetz, we put together a quick CV.
In his short Congressional career, Gaetz:
* _**Paralyzed the work of Congress for nearly a month**_ , after leading the charge to remove his own party's Speaker of the House
* Introduced a bill to _**abolish the Environmental Protection Agency**_
* Cast the _**only "no" vote in Congress**_ against a bill to fight human trafficking
* _**Invited an alt-right leader**_ to the State of the Union
* _**Was investigated by federal prosecutors**_ for trafficking and consorting with minors
* Is under investigation by the House Ethics Committee for _**sexual misconduct, misuse of taxpayer money, and accepting bribes**_

What does our opponent think about all of this? _**He says Gaetz is "exactly what is needed in DC," and he's "proud to be endorsed" by him.**_ After endorsing Q-Anon conspiracy theories and misrepresenting his military service, we thought our opponent couldn't stoop any lower. But once again, he's proven us wrong. [**Friend, our opponent doesn't belong anywhere near the halls of Congress. ---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=83214df27ffb42b693bc1f5db726323b&_e=0CmZSPbtvyFDKPBLlf8Uolwxhj_l9BkR8Crik5g6nsPzgEzcjlJAWR6wBSD0JDrtT-gEpmcHcZ6xjYvFsl2BWAOETyaM7PFR6prtmI4uR07qGptR-fGPN20F6FS4Z_rwNAExXX08MVt5_UvMOzJuQBynVAyvPAL57j_frl1c0Aog-GMNC2Qm88FQ2XmVXUngmL1DYlvgY1CkJLT3G96T0KU6GPxr48XRHgGiCdxHKbQqb0qTQ5Ti6axNsA8uBjBYDGHZyoGhThr7YoZeN1-VW-U4lexQUZFHLWbh_ubiuGB4yP54E9as7L2Efg9qI9cVTdNLe1PaEFy9lcDvGIui5u93y6Qjsua-mdmKOC1GpJ3OmQXGLMvwplowt99ta2YhPJGEMkeKAOd1kiFPO0FsdRSnNwHxLAs55eaHIp1q-oE%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s been nearly a week since the presidents of Harvard, the University of Pennsylvania, and MIT- under oath in front of Congress - declined to say that hateful rhetoric on their campuses, including calling for the genocide of Jews, constituted hate speech according to their school’s code of conduct.

_**My opponent, Montana Democrat Jon Tester, has said nothing.**_

His silence is deafening.

I want to know your stance on this, Fellow Conservative. Please drop what you’re doing and spend 30 seconds answering a few questions on my mind over the last couple of days.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=83214df27ffb42b693bc1f5db726323b&_e=0CmZSPbtvyFDKPBLlf8Uolwxhj_l9BkR8Crik5g6nsPzgEzcjlJAWR6wBSD0JDrtT-gEpmcHcZ6xjYvFsl2BWAOETyaM7PFR6prtmI4uR07qGptR-fGPN20F6FS4Z_rwNAExXX08MVt5_UvMOzJuQBynVAyvPAL57j_frl1c0Aog-GMNC2Qm88FQ2XmVXUngmL1DYlvgY1CkJLT3G96T0KU6GPxr48XRHgGiCdxHKbQqb0qTQ5Ti6axNsA8uBjBY3o9HR9zc7fCF0QGd8n_sEm8F8oD1IlLDXZyKG86EPijen70KkpPxsCQ7wNoSw-yfNuNRBWEgxBwVXOOxcfZ3MYFVQZsZeU6S_-Rwc7ZYnfujmWY_OWih2NCAXo5Nq2k1CttDMkxsVWTCG9epc7QQ1a3XBOHniLbbMeWq5UUHsj8%3D)
[**DOES ISRAEL HAVE THE RIGHT TO EXIST?
LET US KNOW->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=83214df27ffb42b693bc1f5db726323b&_e=0CmZSPbtvyFDKPBLlf8Uolwxhj_l9BkR8Crik5g6nsPzgEzcjlJAWR6wBSD0JDrtT-gEpmcHcZ6xjYvFsl2BWAOETyaM7PFR6prtmI4uR07qGptR-fGPN20F6FS4Z_rwNAExXX08MVt5_UvMOzJuQBynVAyvPAL57j_frl1c0Aog-GMNC2Qm88FQ2XmVXUngmL1DYlvgY1CkJLT3G96T0KU6GPxr48XRHgGiCdxHKbQqb0qTQ5Ti6axNsA8uBjBYqXfL3tPU08Lno0rgnll8yEIototsvlp3dyZeYirYPa6j30AOeIj2P5mXN5Eh6-8146kMspdq8cpeBYsVwThW4W5VeoIpOGVJsRIqovW8_n6C4xlu6HuCmqULe8PRavLfJqEhjU6X3ictbDoxSYLpDbopmeuwBsw_hMQWvpGUPNY%3D)

The testimony by all three university heads was _**pathetic**_. The testimony each of the three women who sat in front of Congress yesterday gave was not only dehumanizing toward the Jewish people, but _**it also sent a clear message to the enemies of Israel in America that their hate toward Jews is acceptable on college campuses across our country**_.

Meanwhile, over on Twitter, Jon Tester wasn’t posting about the importance of defending Israel or condemning hate speech against Jewish Americans - **he was posting about butchering meat.**

As a former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate, defending America’s right to exist, our freedom, and the values that we stand for are always at the forefront of everything I do in life. We need folks in the United States Senate who aren’t afraid to ask tough questions, defend our democratic allies abroad, _**and, more importantly, stand up for what is right.**_

The presidents of Harvard, MIT, and UPenn should lose their jobs for their failure to condemn Jewish hate, and Jon Tester should be ashamed of himself for having nothing to say about Jewish genocide.

[**DOES ISRAEL HAVE THE RIGHT TO EXIST?
LET US KNOW->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=83214df27ffb42b693bc1f5db726323b&_e=0CmZSPbtvyFDKPBLlf8Uolwxhj_l9BkR8Crik5g6nsPzgEzcjlJAWR6wBSD0JDrtT-gEpmcHcZ6xjYvFsl2BWAOETyaM7PFR6prtmI4uR07qGptR-fGPN20F6FS4Z_rwNAExXX08MVt5_UvMOzJuQBynVAyvPAL57j_frl1c0Aog-GMNC2Qm88FQ2XmVXUngmL1DYlvgY1CkJLT3G96T0KU6GPxr48XRHgGiCdxHKbQqb0qTQ5Ti6axNsA8uBjBYeGCEcpek-ME7g_lS_bl5ZMUMpGp7jkiCnncb-t3FKH2MU4WrEm1DRn2Da-Iu0rBue-PZyvvBLk1VhMuOh5B_WqL9uQAQrSnYmqsmu_zwC1dpLDhu9cd-AOUhWwlX1mIxsPyGS0mX5sDB24MiqADBDGgoLU71TcWbOfEhhD_WRao%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

subject: The fabric of our country

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=45747a9921a445eea7d7c8ccb9d0df54&_e=P3hwWHWXHIBjrc-IILMbRg7Hugu5S01Yo-MBqGQ0NLvW2SdML2Jeammc8Wa311hGux_rbdnli5XmHswJnH389If2gnHqBPXn1oYr2acx2NH7AUm4BLMCHNVlFZ7Hc7X3Di2baPgAzvSgD2VaheWP9qHywdIJRkmyUCQdz8Oa5RkHUXuX5c4wfyXkdq-22PDF55kcToTZTOWT2ed7jEbV54ghMdqvSrwd5oCxT4BBXjd1BZeVImbh3inXxt-ZP_rT_MyHAfk7X1SsO3N_kfsTtw05tiUxH82QG0ALQah5voA4FBW1J7VrL98MUcjH68v2XZjZ7xyln0n3JZulEg16SsGQOg3Bn3HDhD74-r7P-cgMs-1_lxpe8-eDcuu3Hge6qITnhkgjnCVxxei7IATpcg%3D%3D)
**TRUTH: The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.**
Peter,

My two parents who brought me into this world and my wife, Apoorva, and our two sons, are the most important people in my life. Family is a grounding institution, one that matters and is worth preserving.

I have talked about how America is losing its sense of national identity and losing our ability to believe in God — we absolutely cannot lose and degrade the importance of family. The fabric of our country is built on the love and care we give to future generations and in making sure our country continues to thrive with each passing year, not just election cycles.

| [** FOR OUR FUTURE GENERATIONS **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=45747a9921a445eea7d7c8ccb9d0df54&_e=P3hwWHWXHIBjrc-IILMbRg7Hugu5S01Yo-MBqGQ0NLvW2SdML2Jeammc8Wa311hGux_rbdnli5XmHswJnH389If2gnHqBPXn1oYr2acx2NH7AUm4BLMCHNVlFZ7Hc7X3Di2baPgAzvSgD2VaheWP9qHywdIJRkmyUCQdz8Oa5RkHUXuX5c4wfyXkdq-22PDF55kcToTZTOWT2ed7jEbV54ghMdqvSrwd5oCxT4BBXjd1BZeVImbh3inXxt-ZP_rTo2QMVA_RbBnDS_urpg2d4htD-mzYMa65STkpfUCN_6B-IQo_fvk6ubh3fR1WnmYjnwL2_Vgk3qMjTmcjxr5DoE2sIDPYiq3m7IKB9DrF1ID4D7pBb_rgBWKaFev08PYXc0USHhFFNwJyARbr4noUew%3D%3D)
---

We’ve gotten lazy just being against the other side, forgetting what we actually stand for. The nuclear family is the foundation of a flourishing nation. I have loved meeting the families who come in droves to our campaign events. We all want a better opportunity for our future generations and children.

[**I refuse to continue letting my sons grow up in a country where many people cannot even answer what it means to be an American. Our family’s top mission in the White House: revive our national character and the importance of the family institution. Apoorva and I are ready for the challenge.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=45747a9921a445eea7d7c8ccb9d0df54&_e=P3hwWHWXHIBjrc-IILMbRg7Hugu5S01Yo-MBqGQ0NLvW2SdML2Jeammc8Wa311hGux_rbdnli5XmHswJnH389If2gnHqBPXn1oYr2acx2NH7AUm4BLMCHNVlFZ7Hc7X3Di2baPgAzvSgD2VaheWP9qHywdIJRkmyUCQdz8Oa5RkHUXuX5c4wfyXkdq-22PDF55kcToTZTOWT2ed7jEbV54ghMdqvSrwd5oCxT4BBXjd1BZeVImbh3inXxt-ZP_rTWBD9H-lmRko_IWV0q1dRthDnb-xfT7QESJPj0XmrG0CGqo0m-QwavFBtzvZQ5OaBPcBalGld9FrynRq6Eqv-IZYNuL-7rmnHh5U0-_HwtwHtc7l0JgI2iiMH9a6zAKFZerepbERP6YuQXIupDUWEDw%3D%3D)

We won’t be able to save what’s worth saving in this country if we do not first fight for the institution of the family.

Thank you,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=45747a9921a445eea7d7c8ccb9d0df54&_e=P3hwWHWXHIBjrc-IILMbRg7Hugu5S01Yo-MBqGQ0NLvW2SdML2Jeammc8Wa311hGux_rbdnli5XmHswJnH389If2gnHqBPXn1oYr2acx2NH7AUm4BLMCHNVlFZ7Hc7X3Di2baPgAzvSgD2VaheWP9qHywdIJRkmyUCQdz8Oa5RkHUXuX5c4wfyXkdq-22PDF55kcToTZTOWT2ed7jEbV54ghMdqvSrwd5oCxT4BBXjd1BZeVImbh3inXxt-ZP_rTLoaPpWVaLYKrVUnPLxF4_R-GYertQy1DQcgb8mpQntL5rRE_gOPL4M4lwW9iaeImeNbfQdHPpmZesoLnY42sO6cMhvM5-GJxCtPTbKsge8w55UYZPhS-L2OTupUlxKvbVE_B6QDXtXe3JL4TPtyRiA%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** FIGHT FOR FAMILY **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=45747a9921a445eea7d7c8ccb9d0df54&_e=P3hwWHWXHIBjrc-IILMbRg7Hugu5S01Yo-MBqGQ0NLvW2SdML2Jeammc8Wa311hGux_rbdnli5XmHswJnH389If2gnHqBPXn1oYr2acx2NH7AUm4BLMCHNVlFZ7Hc7X3Di2baPgAzvSgD2VaheWP9qHywdIJRkmyUCQdz8Oa5RkHUXuX5c4wfyXkdq-22PDF55kcToTZTOWT2ed7jEbV54ghMdqvSrwd5oCxT4BBXjd1BZeVImbh3inXxt-ZP_rToh9g1WD2z0-nc-cKzfskyVodEgnS02B6NTa-vFlCuQbGpmdNeearNR-p_V_nP8Qw1FzlAHFKRkh2wCpdZCXKfkHwwIkg6TnYl8sCA5l7W2b_516n9q2kXuWX2t7A3AF4rtBNqSOq7vRs2nOWUtBG3A%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=45747a9921a445eea7d7c8ccb9d0df54&_e=P3hwWHWXHIBjrc-IILMbRg7Hugu5S01Yo-MBqGQ0NLvW2SdML2Jeammc8Wa311hGux_rbdnli5XmHswJnH389If2gnHqBPXn1oYr2acx2NH7AUm4BLMCHNVlFZ7Hc7X3Di2baPgAzvSgD2VaheWP9qHywdIJRkmyUCQdz8Oa5RkHUXuX5c4wfyXkdq-22PDF55kcToTZTOWT2ed7jEbV54ghMdqvSrwd5oCxT4BBXjd1BZeVImbh3inXxt-ZP_rTxwim93Ly3mVI_Fp9D-o28vG5xFZ8PF0h6pOpCUI-7WJ6WcbBzWb1RgvlMERsvHm0_ykA7ME4XMtmJrHoam-vZzDOWfofoEZboafZqjVE4iDDkRw-RCBshl9cKCr57lrkAgeP5FYhq7HALmubi_h85Q%3D%3D)

---

name: Brian Mast
subject: It takes a veteran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
| | | Friend,

After more than a decade in our nation's military, I learned that effective service to our country doesn't depend on how much money you have or where you come from. What matters is that you have the courage to stand up for what's right and a dedication to American freedom.

**That 's why I'm proud to support Gabe Evans for Congress to expand our conservative House majority. **

For those I haven't met yet, let me tell you a little about myself... I lost two legs and a finger defending America on the battlefield, and now, I'm continuing that fight in the Halls of Congress as a conservative representative from the FREE STATE of Florida. On the battlefield, I served with men and women who were in it for the right reason: service before self for our country. In Congress, I've also witnessed people there for the right reasons, but I've met far too many who simply are not. I'm confident that Gabe Evans is in it for the right reasons. He flew Black Hawk helicopters in the Middle East fighting for our country. He put his life on the line every day to keep America safe while career politicians were sitting in their cushy seats and lining their own pockets.
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=31a099793cad49a79d3a81c03b39ba24&_e=GzJWo0SGI3rJHybwFMCYgaTHl8UH2zKmVQGSnZujFyvm9JLBXL7ZYzPXTQDfi_kn3s1B-8JkH979GXmIRBMuI0KQkp7LH0cgD97-X2aUSy356HkD9KRyXd_-VSx0fDwQKHwvuN8cYVSDX5pr163troSpSKEYUTxISQgOimaKumpYDkbUvXyG6Eh1n4VKjW8GKOo6G-Pu2LclLusSviODQx8MrMrjBAZ3qUcoY8D7Tsjb7q3-dL4H3YVYF7XefF7brIUqbXWcxIz7zj3m-aWZ98575e-mbgEWmUALWfSkFvgoniATRCug5yRczOCI37kiSW_hn5ypAGJYXVFm2ol-oBD53wv9NxuZdVWNFY6IP9FXwLYjKZ7tgUkVisQeHcSvPYpTfzGcir4D_dBN1o7W1w%3D%3D)

_And when Gabe got back home, he wasn 't done keeping his country safe. _

He served bravely as a police officer for his community, coming face to face with dangerous criminals.

**Gabe knows what it 's like to put the American people first, and now, he needs your help to bring that spirit to Congress in a must-win district. **

clean_body: | | | Friend, After more than a decade in our nation's military, I learned that effective service to our country doesn't depend on how much money you have or where you come from. What matters is that you have the courage to stand up for what's right and a dedication to American freedom. That 's why I'm proud to support Gabe Evans for Congress to expand our conservative House majority. For those I haven't met yet, let me tell you a little about myself... I lost two legs and a finger defending America on the battlefield, and now, I'm continuing that fight in the Halls of Congress as a conservative representative from the FREE STATE of Florida. On the battlefield, I served with men and women who were in it for the right reason: service before self for our country. In Congress, I've also witnessed people there for the right reasons, but I've met far too many who simply are not. I'm confident that Gabe Evans is in it for the right reasons. He flew Black Hawk helicopters in the Middle East fighting for our country. He put his life on the line every day to keep America safe while career politicians were sitting in their cushy seats and lining their own pockets. Use of Gabe Evans' military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by The Department of The Army or The Department of Defense. And when Gabe got back home, he wasn 't done keeping his country safe. He served bravely as a police officer for his community, coming face to face with dangerous criminals. Gabe knows what it 's like to put the American people first, and now, he needs your help to bring that spirit to Congress in a must-win district. Gabe's district is one of the most important ones in the country, Friend. Last year, Republicans lost this district by less than 1% of the vote. In a race so close, we CAN change the results this year. Gabe is doing all he can to win this critical seat, but the Democrats are prepared to spend millions to silence him. That's why he needs our help. Thank you, SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.) | | | Paid for by ElectGabeEvans.com | | PO Box 350608 Westminster, CO 80035. # MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. ([Hear Speech](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959b36b6bf0247618f1ce1ee073b15a1&_e=fiz-XUOLBEUDtTKmiB8mB6f437ZiDHTRkp_kVY54jR36BUeCy7B8bEDEnKn3cQd8xv8HN6IbNdZzOpVZUKc5iun75Q_1IpGE6_KFjm4pzfC5KKENOCLMpg-3t2l8KW9ddZ5ZZpuQdk-5wqWPhUm6et6KGPuhL2WJOyWj7vhvpqc5KA37pBZDGF3ICgAwrqRAPX2rkU_LiGF7_4gIAde7XRLm81rCofwQnPjzdNKjsEs%3D)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959b36b6bf0247618f1ce1ee073b15a1&_e=fiz-XUOLBEUDtTKmiB8mB4CBwv6bgq3iNcppcq4t5IZUcFYUGqtTywaWhkfwys6Qbg33IYA-6f5O3tr8G_vZuOlRSxjDGUx3yXiRyufvmpZZW5iV2179dL9RRNQCdG4AZJ4ISJoKTNgrPDja57MRZbanDFrg0ONEXdIk7wQH7330am8bdOFWoFpFVKC5yG8oGV5jIiuWM6RYnozVdtKhfhCRFltvJPbPOhCY4EoiUQCY7QYELAIdHlfa2gS1IYrkW95x5ed3WlEoFMdxIyc2Lg%3D%3D).

## Penn President Resigns Over Testimony
University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill [resigned this weekend](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959b36b6bf0247618f1ce1ee073b15a1&_e=fiz-XUOLBEUDtTKmiB8mB0ooEtAzXsEoy9IarYl_ISsF_7ocUiZsbC23kKzLQZIxfyDqhoCFPDkm5z48ME5ENc6WWuLtqjmYzQ3CHOOMOtMq9wV5Iow1u7ljMkN9xrS8tBAdlYcWTJBN1hUYgw8_BrE8LivWayLeH_yW4FowffxewCalLhmdvK1gt7BP48BWdX6TdR4VvhHJC4R7ps83uFyzaoIfJwRWjkLTMHkkie8h1jKeOM0QEOIArp69vIc13MAPqMweJyJuNvwtFwkU5cbOkSyRoWbMcNj9tVBK313pL-DES1GFtoTs8WQ2gNhh) in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. [Two mobile vans ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959b36b6bf0247618f1ce1ee073b15a1&_e=fiz-XUOLBEUDtTKmiB8mB-qFc1KHmXiFXI82sIfgyjVrRpXm2ymDtJ7ocOTd8rDd9hIUR17x47q_CdJpTtp0u4F_xOqMkxVtqeIjWCekCw-e_XX2GUchZ1xSb5sQYkLltjArbcpgipmgPiPe5_2b6O0RfsIMplY5zKVVWobWjVyfeby0yWLn98P1DoSCA-P0qyzAtRWophJaoJwEHx8BClO4KX6Q8tAUEgLvlpAGTqv-LECBr0wDMiy5_rDg-em46yFhZ96xQG2U4T5entT2sOLduIWP9x_CLfsbDN4SRVQ6lwqGNnhvBd6jYkU8tI94)at Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said [House Rep. ## Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers
Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed [the biggest free-agent deal in history](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959b36b6bf0247618f1ce1ee073b15a1&_e=fiz-XUOLBEUDtTKmiB8mB-qFc1KHmXiFXI82sIfgyjWigYaqTKvYT5KnY5r-aFHnWKdgA5gMbA9aKGgoowDN5yE1I3Hv6LyMpN5PuJYr9HkornMIPqLHJfv9LuGATSLhy6Uk7trE8r3fPG5SwA_83arfQIbDKTFzan1x7kAk-LMylZ1mpqrUKTEthBLAtGL3r4wfpBNQWgiTNNF8VXIfxnfTo48u_SS5rc5329nh6v_79gUvIYFWBeOCIC-tffFnZ99HFH1QnNAX780JGdrYTwH_bVlp4jJbirk3tQMjSdc%3D), agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher _and_ slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal [eclipses the previous record](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959b36b6bf0247618f1ce1ee073b15a1&_e=fiz-XUOLBEUDtTKmiB8mB8BCK1_NNPoUav-0NyI7bdOEolZLzqJlOHdp3JhI-A2f37lZi6ZiA3izuMDJiF6pth5R60Ab9qVzGlGHk-zJ4pbcVm10080-KKkvHa-wuby4XUJTZNIXL0HIyGfw3w0-A9MbK6cbAJ-ocMK4W86Cf8U2WYZwa_kxUu4DmXiv4_M_I9oW3xEoGxwr_4Y-YzSXo-3GAMuTHHfppjF0isoH1_nUVXhkzi7jvS_ZJzsFB8Adh2l0godL_P8tRnAnZQ06xkuO62vHGQaryy8WdHe4SWI7X4XWZNwikioQkswDbo40HDwWYKstdLYj3CGgNGWd-A%3D%3D), held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract.
## EU Sets World's First Rules on AI
Europe has agreed to the [world's first set of rules](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959b36b6bf0247618f1ce1ee073b15a1&_e=fiz-XUOLBEUDtTKmiB8mB8BCK1_NNPoUav-0NyI7bdOOlRCS5U9snaXIzE0ymPHz9zfDK_wvhIpvul-fbZckk-d6h6f9tzdaRwtl3Iph38X1hIt0NSTUTNrDX7n3EvwEdTVroc-befMkuxTTdR9bCTwcUfjcEUrjb3M-iPO8gEkjqW_wG6y68BPrplmEU2tSKjb2FWhyJvaj7FyiT_d01vq35pY9WOALEUrIaB-zh1lmSu0e_quvFk_TTYnG9lHsxylQ5mHR29AyG7fGqjQUEl5TpiDkguel13y4SlIy_dzbbU2SSFDSkb6nt58OIqyj) regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, [target usage of AI against citizens](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=959b36b6bf0247618f1ce1ee073b15a1&_e=fiz-XUOLBEUDtTKmiB8mB33bV08RBtiahpFSM7V3JL3pLY2wUnRxwP5bAO1D96H51ccDG8cSvAyPnUBKEUUs73d1dVVLTaeeNG_eLFC-dCTVAAFaKGsapDqAZpKEkgjE8YYcWWWMc9GQxXMYdCoaWz5v9Iu0zUqtvkHEAVh2oshDOMgYNlLGxBQJZzFbkgKw1ho9hS-NQw7MaYTf47Tj2a63EG5BBjlEEXW5vgDKupSsoOW2qI9ItU_5eswTTzLC) in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out.

clean_body: Negotiations to held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas. | | Hey Friend, Have you heard about The Flyover? Unlike many news sources out there that put their own spin on every news story, they just deliver the facts and let us draw our own conclusions! It's easy to read and only takes a couple of minutes to get caught up on all the news for the day. But the best part is that this newsletter is 100% FREE! Check out the newsletter I got from them today below, if you don't believe me. Trust me you don't want to put this off. ! It's time to break free from the biased news that has infected our world. \-- Jess | | | | MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . | Penn President Resigns Over Testimony University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses. Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed , agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher and slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal , held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract. EU Sets World's First Rules on AI Europe has agreed to the regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out. () ➤****The State Department bypassed Congress to approve the sale of $100 million worth of tank ammunition to Israel. The decision is possible because of emergency authorization rules in use since 1979. () ➤****The Biden administration told lawmakers that an average of 5,000 illegal immigrants are being released into the U.S. every day. The total could reach 1.8 million for the year if the current pace continues. () ➤ Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee lost a runoff election to be Houston mayor to Texas state Sen. John Whitmire, who promised to make the city safer with increased policing. () | ➤ LSU quarterback Jayden Daniels won the 2023 Heisman Trophy, college football's most prestigious player of the year award. Washington QB Michael Penix was the runner-up. () ➤ The Los Angeles Lakers, led by the shooting of Anthony Davis, won the first NBA Cup, beating the Indiana Pacers 123-109 in the NBA's inaugural in-season tournament. body:
Negotiations to [free 50 of the hostages](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvPhi0nmSJp6U500Qpbqb4s_GYcA-xhv91q4CGY6YtMeGPqOOrjFl-76hE_aKZsgLNtHFYJgaehnb8STRuTxm6FmBzbXRg-KyplM9d-QVlMCVg0egeQJ0noqw3TftsypP4PekXfYlqjsfHAbh7J8KvJmYZcfLOhOz5vrn8fFldvg0nuWJ9HqipvJndHgWPZqkqEi4HUJta1M2NIqbzRmnZdkzZPx_GpM7_Z5_xk-gPQb56UClDEaNaNlIsMzhiyP9ImhCQZx5Jk1_fzCeLvsAURtFE1wE8jnfLFWiJJHFE43zq2tw0UeOYgigxFC1-j7i4IKwcy8zT8Wwlf9nw2zzbQc%3D) held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas.

# MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. ([Hear Speech](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvF8nStd0yhjsDlhYuzjwVZ9VOkGd6AcdfV7WSHfKf2YUPFLJChsohB9tnMmly5WodFmAQgvMLwdRclIJO3-fj_EYUQnaP5HfP0RO0iXAdkYw5jOtMMJrfAiGLZxjvs639DxaieQZc1q0EhgN89xZ_A1aTvaUxzy_5sa_dfi4bZUJpRyIBsZ4Q1MV1xp0yQmaqm5Uct_9Z_vYnHWZOUNGk9M%3D)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvETrJTnYs7cG_HHAV_XtZ4bsgOuJLHmGz0Z5T3r3gtuRSqmXxNMcAfNlE-hx3HxO5BBK1lM75NhfIh3yn5G_9__YicKvcxAC599eagtkFU7on-8Ip-FRKemqTOWevrW2VZFEnOKXT-EvBAZv585LGjijfvelCFlSZNk8QT0oViOf49Swq-EQvK5cj1VDB9N64f-zYd7u1WrhwgEU3vkqWZyvVZX2dbxHKJBcARJYZ6w7N3BXPHLzh0sQPViJdyMHRw%3D%3D).

## Penn President Resigns Over Testimony
University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill [resigned this weekend](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvHkDK3StzTBG4dYP87wEzJRIWIIeSFXzpRPxqzM5nE7LFW6QIua8jzGdvl21T7AGh6xYSD_aZynf6atn9LpVJ_pB-w-Rgk-IvJq9sq5TOMc9HuutxL8JPw7X5xwUSoUEgAeac7ESuMERd2HHs9WujKk1__1e29uIlKPKzlRIAVXr-oYG0f-skvru8_Kg9pmE2vSg0niXUojmlp_V9vm2QiKIUZ8I4dMpj9B1-RKltg4yjtO367YftrSJYP4aiithHbpsaX5-2zbyxPN3Zb7yGxfv2HC5cbpC-pKOV92jUXsk) in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. [Two mobile vans ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvLMGxEG8tBqegCqpAV3Q6fzXu07BdndGsRuP-MgRsGIBchhtUDaPPLLSBG_a_wJEvmMNJwA_LsjteKlmuFpKAPRBRg0Q3xPT7QvwI0IqNUWPauyuRaZeug26icxugIBclRpJixzW8CTRH-m5bXuiWHX7foYp7ffjmWrvfpNGJwDoiHxQkyaLR_MOWFKKZLce2LecP34dLBOCX6ZnqzqMRtNboNZJx5nwJEZn3Z3xLTq2Lts_814KAQuIiWJWl4hjjkziiLfnS78LnJpwe1OKc-eSYnaP3AhMMhW70A0QSvTA)at Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said [House Rep. Elise Stefanik,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvG6AZ0OFyjhC1zWD9paHhAB8TpS1aqQ9TjZRiOTleErIKCya83j8TtHegHz4ItWgdXFpjYVy5zQmNR_hCCcUvwAF8CwO6Zgi5AnTdgpurpO4-vWL5c9FWGCTqDTlrAz7GYR7mmvzqkGzriT9Wbrph47KWIv2HxFRYjDC29Y5t8BRtkrc4yfxa3H91B_y38dnqsvc5VNB9gmUSFMF59iubj5BqB-Y41w7FlaZk8zcwfh5YGRYHpPKvx5a49UoKWvV2NY4f1HVR_l_3dT3HOWrdLXj3CC-_DVve2iLyGlOy1MqB3JhtZJO_5RuSBHf2KF2ng%3D%3D) who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses.
## Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers
Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed [the biggest free-agent deal in history](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvLMGxEG8tBqegCqpAV3Q6fySSEkz3Rx9U41_6iBEY1DwSrHwoyoQrdphMINPJvkR2Tk1AYSXSJPXpVmVc7EsdFZfNMcJSLdk7uc05ndToi11B3Prf6qkXeqWuMv7Kn3GuoU9RFTwyB6wwaNa-5ayIAHjPMgWHqpodtvww2G_Zd_YbdqlY4kUrg-v3AOhMgwlBkcOgkdoT83U_7auc09ehYsU0GT8PrPkMtISxpTcFEXUYo2Erv6sTcNh0UznhdHaazqdpGu00XQ3aUys-_UKBCI%3D), agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher _and_ slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal [eclipses the previous record](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvG6AZ0OFyjhC1zWD9paHhACdCCqD1Iep0R0LUbCb3y0qYxfLbOSGM3j9kCo8rJOkvF3_tCWw9ihY7qMLfMyn2nZTTHW0uZZSKCcdBv4oj-ZBfsx_4lmysftxTPhjPc1mv1eEctpFFYgBd-cS7V4GQ66zQaZ9iTNmzWvI3WDm4KXnetOGOsXDU30TpQxXPaTSQmKTYyqFtjoxkNkCr4Gzsq1doFcYHvFO2yPDnkHe8huxA8bb2I49EE5wvL-zkEJ7IvUasaCU12Ujwu0eYTtPhvyYm7n8nDDwBIh0K0Z6nGX7nAp7kNPcmtC_WbdD8xy6ow%3D%3D), held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract.
## EU Sets World's First Rules on AI
Europe has agreed to the [world's first set of rules](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvG6AZ0OFyjhC1zWD9paHhAB49iLU-BOzkXW0Z8Y_5yz-fsjL5Sr0DDp31cMjqdEENVxWg-_IfPNXW0zp_BEGNJWjmRCCbb8pogpA8gMl3C53C-Wxy-imSDsuFOxHMyQDMWtT77GsOBGN0OeqpavXOOtnUjOwcqCG5ndd7VZlnSh8MGXZJAZPvGwv5Fml8T9xaVTnkHiesbHGXjJOEc7SQOc-08O7yrU6aX18XvlUsLowOgoQ7ghVMKTs8nf0vCHUp_OsUZ8bYqpQsVrpKGduE1tMK3Al_mZLVPZpWdrqH_Az) regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, [target usage of AI against citizens](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d02b118fd594041b2cb33058ded078d&_e=41PF_lDL60_9dXVgUtcgvFi1-UtB05iqcmf1cCC6I7_dQy1hXvcXjIfEpRIiNKU9z2yRiGTj2AYIfYQozAVgFm9LXrFPanBGEbzzPGCObncHecKemN0YgWc4PCAuywxXjVem3JiyjepYvWwBj-a2AXPbUB3L9C7XqXSFd5b7Y0UzXcxvOaFcgcqLMP2Va1yE181VvbKDwHt3oWlfI-8ZM17MVS--o-olJQKEJ6J1BY1pg2N0nHk2sUxft0wepBDD) in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out.

clean_body: Negotiations to held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas. | | Hey Friend, Have you heard about The Flyover? Unlike many news sources out there that put their own spin on every news story, they just deliver the facts and let us draw our own conclusions! It's easy to read and only takes a couple of minutes to get caught up on all the news for the day. But the best part is that this newsletter is 100% FREE! Check out the newsletter I got from them today below, if you don't believe me. Trust me you don't want to put this off. ! It's time to break free from the biased news that has infected our world. \-- Jess | | | | MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . | Penn President Resigns Over Testimony University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses. Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed , agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher and slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal , held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract. EU Sets World's First Rules on AI Europe has agreed to the regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out. () ➤****The State Department bypassed Congress to approve the sale of $100 million worth of tank ammunition to Israel. The decision is possible because of emergency authorization rules in use since 1979. () ➤****The Biden administration told lawmakers that an average of 5,000 illegal immigrants are being released into the U.S. every day. The total could reach 1.8 million for the year if the current pace continues. () ➤ Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee lost a runoff election to be Houston mayor to Texas state Sen. John Whitmire, who promised to make the city safer with increased policing. () | ➤ LSU quarterback Jayden Daniels won the 2023 Heisman Trophy, college football's most prestigious player of the year award. Washington QB Michael Penix was the runner-up. () ➤ The Los Angeles Lakers, led by the shooting of Anthony Davis, won the first NBA Cup, beating the Indiana Pacers 123-109 in the NBA's inaugural in-season tournament. body:
I’m releasing House Republicans’ OFFICIAL Election Integrity Audit, and I’m personally reaching out to our supporters and asking them to complete it. |

|
Friend,

It's Speaker Mike Johnson, and I have something big for you today.

I'm releasing House Republicans' OFFICIAL Election Integrity Audit, and I'm personally reaching out to our supporters and asking them to complete it.

**[_So, if you still care about FREE and FAIR elections, please complete our Election Integrity Audit before submissions are due at 11:59 pm._](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cc6ba8ba5c054eac925b7c27ca58ea14&_e=wyz5Vbxka2rwgNDl2wHNoxRMCtYL-IFq6DUHaT8LQFG87MOLqgyVePekcZeJsQMi4n-qRcqgw2qacd8U8y5nCtiVi7hW2vfsdmO866bjqjC9S8B9-_xXE8QPz2raOf-ZP6gF2hIjYLhCp-1k9z-G9qKGsRlA0O03NYqH7sTc3Qm46oeyJwNPQ3jtdV37zXDKGwIGM6wRzMXg5JRtEiNBIiiqps7zKlkwpoVfkLc9aZ_lwC9wDGjR5_LZIi3SgN_S8alhAbAlLtVynsk8JPe8IPSziWfIJM33fe2iYqJtlYim-sveeaCizIpXyDZSv4DeK9zkhd78HKt5HmbRs42zAubudZLsfpJhOzq5nyFpfxMyUP3a3h1G5CspT-YV8TKi "So, if you still care about FREE and FAIR elections, please complete our Election Integrity Audit before submissions are due at 11:59 pm.")**
**ELECTION INTEGRITY AUDIT **
---
| | | [COMPLETE NOW](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cc6ba8ba5c054eac925b7c27ca58ea14&_e=wyz5Vbxka2rwgNDl2wHNoxRMCtYL-IFq6DUHaT8LQFG87MOLqgyVePekcZeJsQMi4n-qRcqgw2qacd8U8y5nCtiVi7hW2vfsdmO866bjqjC9S8B9-_xXE8QPz2raOf-ZP6gF2hIjYLhCp-1k9z-G9qKGsRlA0O03NYqH7sTc3Qm46oeyJwNPQ3jtdV37zXDKGwIGM6wRzMXg5JRtEiNBIiiqps7zKlkwpoVfkLc9aZ-Aqke8nlWOXXQN0vrR5VSFi-ZuxBEFzqa9araWOXRBASQkD--NdERSPcZlp31ZLMOghsJ1_8Q2ifDMhHoy3v5rnDT6kQ5EWatpHC9BkCiZvKqIzihtN8eBiYSr4HNXWki8819PaZspZGeyQ97u_PsB "Generic Button")
---

The Radical Left has made its position clear. They want to open up our borders, and let ANYONE vote without showing an I.D.

I have made my position clear. **Only American Citizens should be voting in our elections- full stop.**

name: Tammy Baldwin via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: pesky
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

_Hi there, we wanted to quickly share this note from Sen. Tammy Baldwin of Wisconsin. Helping Tammy win is absolutely critical to our work holding on to our Democratic majority in the Senate, so please consider chipping in today if you can. - Team Padilla_
* * *
Hi folks, Tammy Baldwin here with an important update on our campaign:
The past few weeks have been really tough for our campaign. Fewer folks are opening and donating to messages like this one, and as we prepare for the holiday fundraising slump, my team is worried we won’t be able to make up for lost ground before our important public fundraising deadline on December 31st.
That’s a problem because while our fundraising slows down, Republicans are making plans to spend a fortune on Wisconsin’s Senate race. As we speak, **the GOP is recruiting a right-wing megamillionaire willing to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to defeat me.**
That’s why I’m reaching out with an important request. I know that these emails can be a bit pesky sometimes — and trust me, the last thing I want to do is ask you for your hard-earned money. But the truth is, these emails make a huge difference for our team.
If we’re going to protect my seat from right-wing self-funders, then we need to catch up on our goals — and quickly. But we can’t do it without you, so I’m humbly asking:
**Will you split a donation between Alex Padilla and my campaign today to help me defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat and our Democratic Senate majority? Here’s a secure link you can use to donate:**
**[https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/Alex-Tammy](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-dec23-baldwin.DjIN7d&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=1&akid=1622%2E159979%2EeOlOQl)**
Thanks for everything. I’m so grateful that we can always count on this incredible team.
— Tammy

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1622%2E159979%2EeOlOQl)

name: =?utf-8?q?a_personal_note_=F0=9F=92=8C__=28via_VPP=29?=
subject: To: President Joe Biden >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57998?t=6&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57998?t=7&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57998?t=8&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57998?t=9&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57998?t=10&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=12029%2E878179%2EGrApRu)

body:
It's going to take all hands on deck to ensure access to democracy for all. |
---

| | Our democracy is on the line in next year’s elections. Record turnout in 2020 renewed anti-voter extremists’ insidious efforts to make voting more difficult. They’re amping up their efforts to target Black, brown, young, and other voters — but we won’t back down, and we’ll keep working to make sure voters can make their voices heard. Right now, Georgia — a pivotal battleground — and the country are facing the worst attacks on voting rights since Reconstruction. And if anti-voter politicians gain power next year, they’ll double down on their voter suppression tactics for future elections. **We need to act now to protect democracy for all Americans.** **[Will you add your name to say you're all in to help ensure free and fair elections in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74995214/443267904/462873487?contactdata=SWHIMpaB4Cp6zYdQ3CYcTkui/ZZmoDogmRqQWqe4VYC0syqucr8wCt7jU2intePabWHeeZhYWNzt5r6E85P33Du36BHpgP/xWFuNeVBIJtOHHO3WUvRU/cNr96pwNeLU&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231211_e_elections_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWRiZjYzZi02ZTk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdlL1eEXLDHzNMnrSWQFXdQhlVG_pg8fg_ZRBFBSQ6Q=&emci=f9cbb038-6e98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=8edbf63f-6e98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=1037277)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74995215/443267905/462873487?contactdata=SWHIMpaB4Cp6zYdQ3CYcTkui/ZZmoDogmRqQWqe4VYC0syqucr8wCt7jU2intePabWHeeZhYWNzt5r6E85P33Du36BHpgP/xWFuNeVBIJtOHHO3WUvRU/cNr96pwNeLU&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231211_e_elections_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWRiZjYzZi02ZTk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdlL1eEXLDHzNMnrSWQFXdQhlVG_pg8fg_ZRBFBSQ6Q=&emci=f9cbb038-6e98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=8edbf63f-6e98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=1037277)

### Posey Campaign Announces 2024 Leadership Team

Congressman Bill Posey is proud to announce his 2024 Campaign Leadership Team. Thank you for your continued support of our congressman and always feel free to contact our team. **State Senator Erin Grall**
**State Senator Tom Wright**

**State Representative Thad Altman**

**Brevard Sheriff, Wayne Ivey**

**Brevard County Commissioner Rob Feltner**

**Indian River County Commissioner Chair Susan Adams**

name: Team Pramila
subject: We don’t want to be in that position again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
With one year left until the General Election, there’s too much at stake for us to slow down.
#
Peter,
This time last month, our campaign experienced a fundraising slowdown that really impacted our ability to plan ahead for our campaign’s future.
_We don’t want to be in that position again._ Not when Pramila is already facing relentless attacks from far-right MAGA Republicans.
**With less than one year until the General Election, there’s too much at stake for us to slow down****, Peter.**
[**Can we count on you to contribute $17.99 _(the average donation made to our campaign)_ or whatever you’re able to give to strengthen our work to protect Pramila and our progressive movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231211.iClmls&refcode=em20231211-3266&t=1&akid=3266%2E420207%2EjWxc2i)

fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

body:

| | You've been with us on this incredible journey, and we want to make one thing clear: [**whether or not you chip in $20 today, you're already a valuable member of Team Lateefah.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/7w4wGkJ4TNA7SpEhjP6d8Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnWgqEP0RAaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9ZW1haWxEZWMxMS0yM1cDc3BjQgplc4uFd2Vsark9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~) Whether you've given generously, shared our posts, or simply believed in the change we're fighting for, you're making a difference. [And we're grateful for your support. Not just us, but Lateefah herself. ](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/7w4wGkJ4TNA7SpEhjP6d8Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnWgqEP0RAaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9ZW1haWxEZWMxMS0yM1cDc3BjQgplc4uFd2Vsark9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~) Now, we hope that you will give to this campaign today – all you have to do is click [**here**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/7w4wGkJ4TNA7SpEhjP6d8Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnWgqEP0RAaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9ZW1haWxEZWMxMS0yM1cDc3BjQgplc4uFd2Vsark9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~) – but if you just can’t swing it today, we have a few more ways to be part of this movement. Here are a few ways you can make a difference for free! **Spread the Word** : Tell 10 friends about our campaign. Word of mouth is powerful, and you can make a BIG impact with just your network. **Volunteer** : Join our team of passionate volunteers. Whether you can spare a few hours a week or just one day a month, your time and energy are invaluable. **Social Media Ambassado** r: Become a social media ambassador and help us amplify our message online. Every share, like, and comment matters – you are our best surrogate! **Just Follow Along** : Keep opening these emails and READING them. Stay up to date about what is going on in this race. It sounds easy (and it is) but that doesn’t mean it is not incredibly important. By taking these steps, you'll help us reach more people and build a movement that can't be ignored. Of course, we also need financial support to keep the momentum going. Campaigns come with costs, and every dollar counts so****[**we hope you’ll still consider making a donation today**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/7w4wGkJ4TNA7SpEhjP6d8Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnWgqEP0RAaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9ZW1haWxEZWMxMS0yM1cDc3BjQgplc4uFd2Vsark9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~). But again, if this donate button isn’t for you _today_ , that is OK. | | [Donate](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/7w4wGkJ4TNA7SpEhjP6d8Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnWgqEP0RAaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9ZW1haWxEZWMxMS0yM1cDc3BjQgplc4uFd2Vsark9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~)

Thank you for all you do,
Team Lateefah

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: The General Assembly Session Is Right Around The Corner!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
freedomva.org [freedomva.org]
Friends-
The Virginia General Assembly Legislative Session begins on January 10th, 2024! That’s just 30 days away! We are looking forward to the 2024 session and the progress that will be made.
As an organization our main goal is making Virginia more affordable, and as we head into session we wanted to remind our supporters of our mission.
Every day we work to make Virginia a better place to live, work and raise a family.
For the next few months, we will be in Richmond working with our newly elected legislators to make meaningful progress on these issues. Our website and our social media will be tools we use often during the legislative session, so please make sure to follow along in those spaces!
We’re excited to get to work, and we hope you’ll join us
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102

clean_body: freedomva.org [freedomva.org] Friends- The Virginia General Assembly Legislative Session begins on January 10th, 2024! That’s just 30 days away! We are looking forward to the 2024 session and the progress that will be made. As an organization our main goal is making Virginia more affordable, and as we head into session we wanted to remind our supporters of our mission. Every day we work to make Virginia a better place to live, work and raise a family. For the next few months, we will be in Richmond working with our newly elected legislators to make meaningful progress on these issues. Our website and our social media will be tools we use often during the legislative session, so please make sure to follow along in those spaces! We’re excited to get to work, and we hope you’ll join us [] [] [] Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc. Freedom Virginia PO Box 10102 Norfolk, VA 23513 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Fellow Conservative,

It’s been nearly a week since the presidents of Harvard, the University of Pennsylvania, and MIT- under oath in front of Congress - declined to say that hateful rhetoric on their campuses, including calling for the genocide of Jews, constituted hate speech according to their school’s code of conduct.

_**My opponent, Montana Democrat Jon Tester, has said nothing.**_

His silence is deafening.

I want to know your stance on this, Fellow Conservative. Please drop what you’re doing and spend 30 seconds answering a few questions on my mind over the last couple of days.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=266503d35f3d46778c62a9e27e2cd6d6&_e=IditPgtlwvwCmMe2yGbSawfiglOCm9UJ811vK7XWAK7SjZnSlKGpgFJxofxQVyWOb4jh3aFWqLAFz-OkaQXdb3LEhQEAcNnpMbHPAM441Od1mzou1YeFO-OUQtgmFQ4EZQG70vJICTKl2hkm4-Kg_UTCbgaTc-_2umjBpoFmZSSlG3cfXSXOmzm6w1JUQaI1ZeLZPNgg8aWEg88X1IATJvy7sOTQo9_minWXCxBt9WGZljHJTvNX_Cbwld22l5VHhzuz3t0IcfPJrZ3Wjv_FQ6ZVYdudG2Im0nnxOuqMCeSSEZ6_DLbAxOucPVLEklzIffQLSLu_dLV6st0jZT0mfK7cH3i8csoJi4krZOQIb32mNkLIZzbZg-xlnKoRS8l_H0h4YKtTc6uzO_yJk2bimMrWMYzMoMT-Qt-E3V9vjfg%3D)
[**DOES ISRAEL HAVE THE RIGHT TO EXIST?
LET US KNOW->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=266503d35f3d46778c62a9e27e2cd6d6&_e=IditPgtlwvwCmMe2yGbSawfiglOCm9UJ811vK7XWAK7SjZnSlKGpgFJxofxQVyWOb4jh3aFWqLAFz-OkaQXdb3LEhQEAcNnpMbHPAM441Od1mzou1YeFO-OUQtgmFQ4EZQG70vJICTKl2hkm4-Kg_UTCbgaTc-_2umjBpoFmZSSlG3cfXSXOmzm6w1JUQaI1ZeLZPNgg8aWEg88X1IATJvy7sOTQo9_minWXCxBt9WGZljHJTvNX_Cbwld22l5VH_rlSgu8uvE1tYao-Ad68mtiKS4c1keCgRWYwZ51qseG323LcDMa1wrPiH2KLzm_XsMVR2m2vxZUKiyQcA-Ds1C63OZbyna9HJAZ6RNBDZM80u8mIJh1hSCbeSGu9g5Ucw3aBWyeDaQ2p0es02Rdh3rInxiWiw75OJfyneOJeTwU%3D)

The testimony by all three university heads was _**pathetic**_. The testimony each of the three women who sat in front of Congress yesterday gave was not only dehumanizing toward the Jewish people, but _**it also sent a clear message to the enemies of Israel in America that their hate toward Jews is acceptable on college campuses across our country**_.

Meanwhile, over on Twitter, Jon Tester wasn’t posting about the importance of defending Israel or condemning hate speech against Jewish Americans - **he was posting about butchering meat.**

As a former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate, defending America’s right to exist, our freedom, and the values that we stand for are always at the forefront of everything I do in life. We need folks in the United States Senate who aren’t afraid to ask tough questions, defend our democratic allies abroad, _**and, more importantly, stand up for what is right.**_

The presidents of Harvard, MIT, and UPenn should lose their jobs for their failure to condemn Jewish hate, and Jon Tester should be ashamed of himself for having nothing to say about Jewish genocide.

[**DOES ISRAEL HAVE THE RIGHT TO EXIST?
LET US KNOW->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=266503d35f3d46778c62a9e27e2cd6d6&_e=IditPgtlwvwCmMe2yGbSawfiglOCm9UJ811vK7XWAK7SjZnSlKGpgFJxofxQVyWOb4jh3aFWqLAFz-OkaQXdb3LEhQEAcNnpMbHPAM441Od1mzou1YeFO-OUQtgmFQ4EZQG70vJICTKl2hkm4-Kg_UTCbgaTc-_2umjBpoFmZSSlG3cfXSXOmzm6w1JUQaI1ZeLZPNgg8aWEg88X1IATJvy7sOTQo9_minWXCxBt9WGZljHJTvNX_Cbwld22l5VHkki_bZXibyiLSV6W848_r4SQJ0fBiAtDMuObLX-b_Z5SnkBTz3VdCRFz9T3ah4p-0o4Z7Lrf6550-VPY7r-Udx-5bHQdPCaXx0-IEW0J0-0DZ4B2VKI9emyQcU4_abmXXX47aNW9DgNhijl1k5dcnA9wSOOPhzsTvV6UbLog7Xk%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

Team Dean

Negotiations to [free 50 of the hostages](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjTugd-R6lC6SkDfce6Lc5r20_aT4K7mY2BxuSxBF-27vY6oqQhqoWjYBVeYlAR0z7fj8SNbgRZCWJCm_hsFTTx-M2zl3ps7UdVt7nvqrsYGilKQ_2G-q90P41nrayoVZK45lcpaSgsGqkIw_wdlGnQot65HcQkvoKYULIN8RCChDKxvUSl4vmteUAPZfKP1d0U2x7lZMXuihzGPAdVYPBpPPDkST8s3F0lOioipNvyUnjsxvoJG1H-vz4y0FSHFHSqxLMBqrHhANEsAoIv3dCWPHhXZP3MKsFpc1vQUdwqp1UhD9ChMKHhMV6vtYLDIdr5qU47DsmbRP5sQReLtBXas%3D) held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas.

# MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. ([Hear Speech](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjWJNIvXoDxN2wIER85idZ860-amMKkIAS9uM1onQ_xLuo2uxGuxDvRObVq1ZI0flGwjQBuNjYPjO4SFo6GFuCcelEC6Hovdzysm9uQX9RSs8czHa5VimHcybjJaYbM5WzGyag0C2kYN_hIdvgIHJ6YvcELJ9GDVupo4E9dZW8xyd8qiEt2SLSxNdZNJjat9J_P209NVCpjk7_iCgwpyxcoQ%3D)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjU_ZNdrYxedRgbLvMUtQpJCcStePEVzBXoIO3JCzdU7Q4_9m729jGuydmSej8pLjWPYFZnXgqhfU5EhqnrkK6-vuBUZYTHC-TOzxzfcnAxlhurqszsTwGuUy3pJIOQTKml2xuLJNAoX_bV4r_YJIDE2M1J8gztbPwIMEO5r58Vv7tFec540gcohBpvrMySYZ8Ry4emVcJPWlxwJ1DlnsPa2A21tQunvpJvaxGaR3oz3Dn4MOZDnQTHn-D13Eo3FI1A%3D%3D).

## Penn President Resigns Over Testimony
University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill [resigned this weekend](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjVwH6g-y8eM2oJawU1FLtJ0SCG29Lko_UkL2AMCu5Ll4KbWZvIfv--KbK6M_FByDmNwm9bdYa-mGmUPwA_m_kzmr3zIUxPDiRr4V2E6gQcbylytEeArZ6ZCKcDNr2LQse9jAi7I2Tld84jmXNpD8bK57OQRY6lnZmi62b2YMB68BGyIj8nAY8DMNZ9FWG4L7J5H6a8Xhv3UhcoQa_4Kut3nD1klADwTdMSuC58Maw27yi35x-xo6CUfFVSaqyqCyL4G0ZZHAxZA-V0F_pdMZuW_1akiZyH2Z7GzFpx1CRDlj) in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. [Two mobile vans ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjSVY6aCDtNIDiVHRnlwp11sqR5W8KhBQPg3mAuWjeX1EGHnuUf7k7pqalp-ntekn8DPDd5aghS_X-nNEGmRYZ5DReoINoHSTqVwLcYbTIgoQsRgovStV3GbVxQzzGv_WPO1zaTAUiC7iYS9MUBCXlcKKmUsokoJdQ6wx6VhQ4SOt-9Hn0y5Ck1ag2JrqWB6lsPydMt48aRcoYe3LXGqBEIKBodMtcuYTKzdfNZp2GbeRq22icnvVMvcFNy62zLfXK-boXEAf2oKi3EkN2owrXWzCittSz2w99nc9W0Eol9JS)at Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said [House Rep. Elise Stefanik,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjVQ1AZpQdwRlDJqAHrr5MBjFBItuE1Emb7yQP9R_mzDIwZc8JZ82prjQjzHH6hJ78B6-d7ewdSVrNkvR9XTtX0_jck_VR6J_yhctHY8wiekF8btzc0aLNverld3-Zl_JgkVeMEESB7kMjWV9uyCxaup5ZRGtq2jL-KRgIyXXq9Q1I5tHo04XIRKsorXuSaAJGjtVgKsd6qEZhak46SvUwq0hURFTI_DnWgsHW1Antn7DHs518xGVYUX32be4z0zO19Gaz4R8_bMbeIDoFaXAnrmYh6Z3SoyFA4z16cXrgqydfBA0kTX1PfT4e-_10LjkcQ%3D%3D) who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses.
## Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers
Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed [the biggest free-agent deal in history](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjSVY6aCDtNIDiVHRnlwp11uvOf9kBT2OMt7_xTr9LHcFXNROLQa3Wk7fpGUpLKv0n9Bcgu-H6ZCi4BMUWgvHFp1qwRup6BdWqKWGzkmhxC7PFRPDE0Fiy9PyTHaPf7FLJAIOEWJh_6M13IXqbxIzEQfmKjqyCH9FRlA0VCJ1hOTP89Shoc4MqaQ52hj9yiyyLoMZG58pwGfTzi-UHiVuTL1zHZP9uazrtrZRSV_JvGm0EAqiHanAHDS1lJGsRcAPd7cYKUDsCrw7ShQWXwLZ8og%3D), agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher _and_ slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal [eclipses the previous record](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjVQ1AZpQdwRlDJqAHrr5MBjPhn3x8g9No8c_C6ROvUeNvelK7v55tsPefAmSLRL0MdgSvxSrDyJxt_XLKaiNK221_uT68eoQUbn_T9feoh0JStH7GanSkQw6FLygRqPNaMyJj7XgPcyZGVX31DOBa0ETJm0Ltne7lukYSYRrzP5DGi03r8wRBwmnZVThtB67scL-fHum_OwkKLvL2k0-moJUGeRqMdQ8kCniiSgunYFVjGW44r-RU2RBrJj_Xln7kx9_98F7p_c6WDO74Fk_pVdbvBG8nqoB6-ATEaPHAiy8ukxHdmdjA1YIac4OiYFKxw%3D%3D), held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract.
## EU Sets World's First Rules on AI
Europe has agreed to the [world's first set of rules](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjVQ1AZpQdwRlDJqAHrr5MBgTaiQ2iiQD1SvzY4NO4bD-bKoVFCkypWhJVnJEIU22oixmfVSn0Rso-WRUVdLw85gdWZ8HkoduI5yJmQUgWFkKl9P-XZfgji3kc_9a_tf8ulS3hDLQJZwFdJrfWxb4JPDVwU35-vPCIe93EENpOnd8LHlYgU5enl7Z1htR9jFS4F1qbfciUfDHgJHCJnbLVULcPINu0LlPs8ZpOjbIAa-9dlyp0-m9eeP_WKwOyMrwLtxJh6VsqGwvP3NXgS00aoI2ZyAyszLrvCX3vITUwOVz) regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, [target usage of AI against citizens](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1434e22bbdb4c6cbc93159f90acbdb4&_e=N_LHNEKkm3iwvdjnR7dJjfZ8g5DOeMRhLiDOsJgwFZRNzQ1_PEfIIpAIXq9q4p1AFHty7WBC-0elZTWI0lpjZ101PAVMyXGTfKcf6mOOchAjxWJibTki6MMo3QjQlKh4nuWR-I8jk-X6kFdnCFXZu2Dfm9puS25bRV0k40JZb7Ao3wOxYKQhoROwBQHBhWCK2GCPaEfoIbYRms0VIbClcI1-0f9mn5kc22pZ4B3MJlPbaVG0RziGy7xde1WpVuxW) in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out.
