clean_body: Negotiations to held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas. | | Hey Friend, Have you heard about The Flyover? Unlike many news sources out there that put their own spin on every news story, they just deliver the facts and let us draw our own conclusions! It's easy to read and only takes a couple of minutes to get caught up on all the news for the day. But the best part is that this newsletter is 100% FREE! Check out the newsletter I got from them today below, if you don't believe me. Trust me you don't want to put this off. ! It's time to break free from the biased news that has infected our world. \-- Jess | | | | MONDAY, DECEMBER 11, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1936, King Edward XVIII abdicated the British throne to marry American divorcee Wallis Simpson. He announced it in one of the British monarchy's most famous radio speeches. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . | Penn President Resigns Over Testimony University of Pennsylvania President Liz Magill in the backlash from her testimony in Congress last week about handling antisemitism on campus. Scott Bok, chairman of Penn's board of trustees, also resigned. Critics in Congress have called for the resignation of the presidents of Harvard and MIT as well, who also refused to directly condemn calls for Jewish genocide as hate speech. Harvard called for President Claudine Gay to step down. "One down. Two to go," said who posed the antisemitism question to the college presidents at Tuesday's hearing. The House has opened an investigation into speech codes at the three campuses. Ohtani Signs $700 Million Deal with Dodgers Baseball superstar Shohei Ohtani has signed , agreeing to a 10-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers for a record $700 million. Ohtani, a stellar pitcher and slugger for the California Angels the past six seasons, won the Most Valuable Player award in 2021 and 2023 and finished second in 2022, despite the Angels never being serious contenders. His new deal , held by his former Angels teammate Mike Trout, at $426 million over 12 years. It's also nearly double what Ohtani was earning in his Angels contract. EU Sets World's First Rules on AI Europe has agreed to the regulating artificial intelligence, potentially a model for the United States to follow as regulators here grapple with AI's potential consequences. The rules, hashed out by various institutions in the European Union, in the form of face recognition, scoring of social behavior, manipulative algorithms, and emotion recognition. It also takes aim at the foundational development of new AI systems, but only in a general way, calling for transparency and, in some cases, preliminary model evaluations and testing before new systems can be rolled out. () ➤****The State Department bypassed Congress to approve the sale of $100 million worth of tank ammunition to Israel. The decision is possible because of emergency authorization rules in use since 1979. () ➤****The Biden administration told lawmakers that an average of 5,000 illegal immigrants are being released into the U.S. every day. The total could reach 1.8 million for the year if the current pace continues. () ➤ Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee lost a runoff election to be Houston mayor to Texas state Sen. John Whitmire, who promised to make the city safer with increased policing. name: Vicente Gonzalez
subject: Friend, I need to humbly ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Vicente Gonzalez for Congress Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
Friend,
It's Vicente Gonzalez, and I've officially kicked off my reelection in a MUST-HOLD competitive seat for Democrats in Texas and across the country.
As a lifetime resident of South Texas, it's been an honor fighting for our values in Congress , but to make a real difference, we need steadfast dedication and commitment to progress, making me the ideal candidate to continue the job.
Before I continue, my team and I have set a goal of finding 67 more Founding Donors before MIDNIGHT. Friend, will you contribute $35 or more and become a Founding Donor today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial&amount=35]
MEMBER: dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
DIGITAL FOUNDING DONOR STATUS: MISSING [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231207_em_fr_b1_VG_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231207_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
Friend, your support is crucial in ensuring that our shared vision for South Texas becomes a reality , especially as the GOP is determined to push their extremist ideas and take away quality healthcare from those who need it most and give handouts to drug companies.
Let me tell you a little about my journey: born into a military family, I understood early on the value of hard work and determination.
My mother's words, 'Hace más el que quiere que el que puede'—he who has the desire to do more, does more—have guided me throughout my life. From earning my GED to obtaining a Juris Doctorate degree, I've dedicated myself to our community of South Texas.
With these lessons and experiences guiding me as your Congressman, I've continuously advocated for our community by fighting for our working families and delivering billions to support our schools, families, and small businesses.
The challenges our communities face require a strong and united front, and your contribution as a Founding Donor today will play an important role in countering the GOP's extremist agendas.
Know that this race is one of the closest districts in Congress, which is why early investment is key to counter right-wing Super PACs looking to defeat us.
Friend, as a grassroots campaign, your support can help me build a stronger South Texas—one that reflects the values and aspirations of our hard working residents. Will you stand with me and become a Digital Founding Donor today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
DONATE TODAY
In unity,
Congressman Vicente Gonzalez
Vicente Gonzalez, a life-long Democrat, is a candidate for Texas’ 34th U.S. Congressional District.
From humble beginnings, Vicente was raised in a military family. Through hard work and pure ganas, Vicente aimed to make something of himself. His mother stressed to him over and over again that education was the key that will open doors of opportunities. Vicente made the decision to get his life back on track by going back to school to get his GED, working and attending classes at community college, and earning his college degree alongside other military families at the Embry Riddle Aeronautical University on the Corpus Christi Naval Air Station. Vicente surpassed his and his parents' dreams when he graduated from Texas A&M School of Law, earning his Juris Doctorate degree.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231211_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
While in law school, Vicente learned how government should work. Through his experience as a Congressional Intern in Washington, D.C., Vicente learned how government really works. After law school, Vicente didn’t stop learning, and continued his training in Negotiation at Harvard University School of Law.
Vicente started his business, the Law Offices of V. Gonzalez and Associates, in McAllen and married Lorena Saenz, a former teacher and administrator in Edinburg and McAllen schools. Vicente has focused his practice on fighting for a level playing field for working families wronged by corporations and insurance companies evading responsibility. Through several victories for our community, Vicente recovered millions in tax dollars for South Texas school districts after shady contractors misspent millions in bond money and put our children in physical danger.
Today, Vicente Gonzalez is fighting for our South Texas values in Congress as a member of the Committees on Financial Services and Foreign Affairs and the Select Committee on Economic Disparity and Fairness in Growth. Vicente has stood by our promise to veterans, helping constituents cut through red tape at the VA and working across the aisle to prevent the shameful deportation of our honorably discharged veterans. He’s working to lower prescription drug prices, protect the benefits and healthcare of seniors, and ensure that jobs and opportunities are there for all with the ganas to work.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Vicente Gonzalez for US Congress
PO BOX 6270
Brownsville, TX 78523
JOIN TEAM VICENTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231207_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]

Friend

_**This is the most important email you will receive all day. Keep reading.**_

I was going to wait to send this to you, but I'm getting anxious, and we're running out of time.

This is coming directly from me, Kari Lake: **a critical fundraising deadline of my campaign is just around the corner.**

# You're invited to an Iowa update call with Ryan Binkley & his campaign team.

On January 15, the Iowa Caucus will be the first presidential primary of 2024. Iowa plays a pivotal role in election year politics, and can change the course of the primary race, literally overnight!

Please join Ryan and the Binkley 2024 team on Zoom this Wednesday, December 13 at 7pm CT / 8pm ET for an important update.

Learn how YOU can get involved and help make history in Iowa!

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I have some exciting news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I’m proud to have received Brady PAC’s endorsement for Governor of Virginia.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996378/443271792/-1898250603?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2023-12-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjIzYTg2MGEtNzE5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rg-cE5D2Ih5Z2q-JAdZ6j2bElspIprGPa4Rimd6W3d8=)
---
| Peter,

I have some exciting news:

**I’m proud to have received Brady PAC’s endorsement for Governor of Virginia.**

As a lawmaker, I’ve met with survivors of gun violence, as well as the loved ones of victims. As a parent, I know the feeling of worrying about the safety of our kids as they board the bus — and I know the fear that comes with each active-shooter drill. As a former federal agent who carried a gun for my job every day, I know there is much more to be done to keep our communities safe.

Virginians deserve a Governor who will focus on reducing gun violence and protecting our families, children, and law enforcement.

It’s important to ensure that firearms aren’t getting into the wrong hands, something we’ve seen too many times before.

I know that Brady PAC is doing important work to ensure that crucial gun violence prevention reforms become a reality. As Governor of Virginia, I’ll continue to advocate alongside them to protect our communities and promote responsible gun ownership.

[_**It is a long road to the 2025 Governor’s election, but will you join me now and support my campaign with a contribution? I am working to build a strong foundation of support, and I need your help.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996380/443271794/-1898250603?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2023-12-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjIzYTg2MGEtNzE5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rg-cE5D2Ih5Z2q-JAdZ6j2bElspIprGPa4Rimd6W3d8=)

clean_body: I’m proud to have received Brady PAC’s endorsement for Governor of Virginia. | = | Peter, I have some exciting news: I’m proud to have received Brady PAC’s endorsement for Governor of Virginia. As a lawmaker, I’ve met with survivors of gun violence, as well as the loved ones of victims. As a parent, I know the feeling of worrying about the safety of our kids as they board the bus — and I know the fear that comes with each active-shooter drill. As a former federal agent who carried a gun for my job every day, I know there is much more to be done to keep our communities safe. Virginians deserve a Governor who will focus on reducing gun violence and protecting our families, children, and law enforcement. It’s important to ensure that firearms aren’t getting into the wrong hands, something we’ve seen too many times before. I know that Brady PAC is doing important work to ensure that crucial gun violence prevention reforms become a reality. As Governor of Virginia, I’ll continue to advocate alongside them to protect our communities and promote responsible gun ownership. = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = = If you wish to receive fewer emails, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

subject: WOW Ravalli Democrats are fired up to support Jesse James Mullen and fight for Democrats across Montana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullen for Secretary of State - Democrat_
body:
No slowing down for the holidays, it's full speed ahead in Montana | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/wow-ravalli-democrats-are-fired-up-to-support-jesse-james-mullen-and-fight-for-democrats-across-montana?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e7c37bf135&e=805e709ff8)
_These emails give you a look into Jesse’s life on the campaign trail, but he wants to know what you’re going through—email campaign@mullenformontana.com to schedule a meet-up in your community or host a fundraiser. Or schedule a call with Jesse to speak one-on-one. Please let us know if you enjoy this email and want to see more “newsletter” emails rather than standard fundraising emails._
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=cd8f22a4c1&e=805e709ff8)
# [Matt Rosendale trying to kill 500 jobs in the Bitterroot might have something to do with it](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=85c229a76f&e=805e709ff8)
Every week, I meet with dozens of Montanans who are sick of listening to an out-of-control GOP lie about being good for the economy.The last time a Republican president grew the workforce by more than one percent/year, I was four years old. Bush Senior and Junior left the economy in a worse place than they found it. Trump, well, he nearly killed it entirely.Montanans hear daily from a Secretary of State and Governor shouting, “Don’t believe your eyes!” But our economy is outpaced by every surrounding state and the rest of the USA. A Secretary of State who doesn’t understand how to run the Montana Business Services Department doesn’t help.I saw in Hamilton this week and Havre last week that Montanans are fired up.When I purchased the Bitterroot Star newspaper company, the nearby Pachyderm Club invited me to speak. The man I sat beside said, “The Democrat Party is dead in Ravalli.”Boy, can a lot change in three years. It’s the holiday season, and passionate supporters are turning out in big ways. Hundreds of Democrats are attending events in counties written off by everyone as safely Republican. I couldn’t be more grateful for their support, and yours.Let’s talk soon!Jesse James Mullen
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c0de964d83&e=805e709ff8)
# What do we do about it?!?
We win back Montana! Winning our state and putting trustworthy and capable officials in place are the only ways to avoid losing Montana to billionaires treating our home like a playground.[The only way we win is with your help.](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e7d3e6085a&e=805e709ff8)
| [Click Here to Donate Any Amount](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=bb5548d74f&e=805e709ff8)
---

subject: Who should you trust?

body:

[A Congress that does not have the trust of the American people is a danger to our republic. And that makes it imperative to elect members of Congress we can trust. Read below for more, and help me defeat Scott Perry by making a donation of any amount.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996575/443272455/608682604?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_231211_1_3&refcode2=6390fb25-7298-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=0qA1BiNGauU3YV3g3mSt5SjBulQo7UPvvkFyr6w7beNWB8Fo4q9GJ/XTbqoOCWke&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzkwZmIyNS03Mjk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI94DqrqiMwAZZtFrkHO4ABREOP1v4Z-7L3PmY7izI0=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996576/443272456/608682604?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_231211_1_3&refcode2=6390fb25-7298-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=0qA1BiNGauU3YV3g3mSt5SjBulQo7UPvvkFyr6w7beNWB8Fo4q9GJ/XTbqoOCWke&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzkwZmIyNS03Mjk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI94DqrqiMwAZZtFrkHO4ABREOP1v4Z-7L3PmY7izI0=)**
---

**Who should you trust to defend democracy and voting rights?**
* Someone who lives his oath of office as a soldier and public official without exception.
* Someone committed to ensuring full voting rights for all eligible citizens.

_Not Scott Perry for more reasons than need to be recited – insurrection and voter suppression leading the list._

**Who should you trust to beat Scott Perry in the Race to Replace?**
* Someone who has won elections as a Democrat in a Republican district.

_There’s only one candidate with that record._

**Who should you trust to fight for your rights, your family’s financial security, your community’s safety, and the planet’s future?**
* Someone who has clearly spelled out his position on reproductive rights, gun safety, Social Security and Medicare, and climate change on our website for everyone to see: **www.RickCoplenforCongress.com**.

_There’s only one candidate with detailed proposals and how they stand up to Scott Perry’s terrible record of misrepresentation._

**Who should you trust to represent the diversity of people and communities in the 10th District?**
* Someone who has actually lived, worked, volunteered and voted here over many years.
* Someone equally at home on Allison Hill and on the farm.
* Someone whose family experienced discrimination, rose above it, and who fights to end it.
* Someone who knows small business and large organizations.

_There’s only one candidate you can trust to bring ALL of this to the Race to Replace._

**Who should you trust to decide whether your children will go to war?**
* Someone who is a crisis-tested leader.
* Someone who knows from on-the-round combat experience and peacekeeping experience what war really means.

_There’s only one candidate who understands this decision from personal experience._

[I have the experience and dedication PA-10 needs in its next representative. With your help, I’ll defeat Scott Perry and restore trust in our elected officials. Please donate any amount to power our campaign through the work ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996577/443272457/608682604?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_231211_1_3&refcode2=6390fb25-7298-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=0qA1BiNGauU3YV3g3mSt5SjBulQo7UPvvkFyr6w7beNWB8Fo4q9GJ/XTbqoOCWke&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzkwZmIyNS03Mjk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI94DqrqiMwAZZtFrkHO4ABREOP1v4Z-7L3PmY7izI0=)

clean_body: | = | | = Who should you trust to defend democracy and voting rights? Someone who lives his oath of office as a soldier and public official without exception. Someone committed to ensuring full voting rights for all eligible citizens. Not Scott Perry for more reasons than need to be recited – insurrection and voter suppression leading the list. Who should you trust to beat Scott Perry in the Race to Replace? Someone who has won elections as a Democrat in a Republican district. There’s only one candidate with that record. Who should you trust to fight for your rights, your family’s financial security, your community’s safety, and the planet’s future? Someone who has clearly spelled out his position on reproductive rights, gun safety, Social Security and Medicare, and climate change on our website for everyone to see: www.RickCoplenforCongress.com. There’s only one candidate with detailed proposals and how they stand up to Scott Perry’s terrible record of misrepresentation. Who should you trust to represent the diversity of people and communities in the 10th District? Someone who has actually lived, worked, volunteered and voted here over many years. Someone equally at home on Allison Hill and on the farm. Someone whose family experienced discrimination, rose above it, and who fights to end it. Someone who knows small business and large organizations. There’s only one candidate you can trust to bring ALL of this to the Race to Replace. Who should you trust to decide whether your children will go to war? Someone who is a crisis-tested leader. Someone who knows from on-the-round combat experience and peacekeeping experience what war really means. There’s only one candidate who understands this decision from personal experience. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Trust yourself. name: HillHarper.com
subject: Ups and downs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We could really use your help!
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231211&t=1&akid=693%2E62735%2E9Ev5Tc)
**Peter, you’re one of our most active supporters, and we don’t take that for granted for even one second.**
And that’s why we strive to treat you with respect. _That means we stay away from “sky is falling”, gimmicky, spammy emails._
When we ask you for contributions we strive to make sure that we’re straight up and as transparent as possible about why and how we really need it.
We don’t expect every person receiving our emails to be able to donate every single time we ask, but we want to be honest about where we’re at, and if even a few people can donate $5 or more, it makes a big difference!
In honor of that transparency and respect we’re sharing a screenshot from our ActBlue dashboard today:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231211?amount=5&refcode=em20231211-693&refcode2=693_62735_9Ev5Tc&akid=693%2E62735%2E9Ev5Tc)
**This graph shows our fundraising volume this month so far.** As you can see, we’ve had some ups and downs throughout the month, but we’re facing a sharp decline in fundraising as of today.
**[Can you help us out by rushing a contribution of $5 or more right now? We’ve set a fundraising goal of $7,000 by December 15 at midnight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231211?amount=5&refcode=em20231211-693&refcode2=693_62735_9Ev5Tc&akid=693%2E62735%2E9Ev5Tc) **
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231211?amount=5&refcode=em20231211-693&refcode2=693_62735_9Ev5Tc&akid=693%2E62735%2E9Ev5Tc)**
We believe in the power of this movement, and together we know we can take on special interests, corporate $$$, and the establishment to win this race the right way: for the people and by the people.
[**But we need your help**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231211?amount=5&refcode=em20231211-693&refcode2=693_62735_9Ev5Tc&akid=693%2E62735%2E9Ev5Tc)**[, Peter. Anything you can chip in today will help a lot as we attempt to take on this fundraising slump.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231211?amount=5&refcode=em20231211-693&refcode2=693_62735_9Ev5Tc&akid=693%2E62735%2E9Ev5Tc) **
Thank you so much,
Team Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231211&t=2&refcode2=693_62735_9Ev5Tc&akid=693%2E62735%2E9Ev5Tc)**

name: VoteVets
subject: The Grand Orban Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The GOP is working hand-in-hand with authoritarian leaders to support Vladimir Putin’s illegal, unprovoked war on Ukraine.
#
Derek,
Do you remember the great figures of the GOP — the leaders they idolized, whose example they looked to for guidance?
Dwight Eisenhower, Ronald Reagan, and John McCain come to mind.
Leaders who we may have disagreed with, true. But leaders who largely stood up for the principles of liberal democracy and freedom against dictators, authoritarians, and ideologues.
The Grand Old Party is something else today.
The Heritage Foundation — the foundational think tank in the conservative movement — is hosting Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban (a repressive dictator and darling of the MAGA-right) and Republican members of Congress. Their goal is to end American and European funding for Ukraine’s defense.
It’s clear now — beyond any doubt — that the GOP is working hand-in-hand with authoritarian leaders to support Vladimir Putin’s illegal, unprovoked war on Ukraine.
_“Ronald Reagan would be aghast at what the conservative Republican movement has become – being lapdogs to authoritarians like Viktor Orban, denying funds to protect European democracy, and rolling over for Russia as it seeks to reestablish the Soviet bloc.”
Alex Vindman, U.S. Army, Retired_
We are working to pressure any members of the GOP who still understand how important this aid is to join us. We will keep up the fight, and many VoteVets supporters have already donated to help drive that work.
**[Can you join them and make your first donation? Now that the Senate has begun moving senior Military promotions forward, passing aid for Ukraine has become VoteVets top priority.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23.L4YfC7&refcode=em231211-1-30&t=1&akid=21845%2E3013755%2Eko-Lbk)

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m proud to champion reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks, Last year, when this incredible grassroots movement stood together to elect me, we didn’t just flip this seat blue — we also flipped it in favor of a woman’s right to choose. Far-right Republicans have made it clear that they will stop at nothing to roll back reproductive freedom. They even elected a House Speaker who has repeatedly called for a national ban on reproductive health care. The GOP assault on our reproductive freedom shows no signs of slowing down, so I’m doing everything in my power to protect and strengthen reproductive freedom — _so my constituents, not politicians, can make their own decisions._ I’ll always fight for reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy. The GOP assault on our reproductive freedom shows no signs of slowing down, so I’m doing everything in my power to protect and strengthen reproductive freedom — so my constituents, not politicians, can make their own decisions. I’ll always fight for reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy. Hi Peter,
To start the week, I’ve got a small ask. Can you chip in $1 to help support our campaign today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_121123_onedollarask&amount=1]
I’m feeling good about the direction our campaign is headed as we enter 2024. We’ve earned some big endorsements, myself and my team are out there every day connecting with voters and building our grassroots support, but we’re still working hard for one thing... The resources we need to power our campaign forward.
Listen, as a grassroots campaign, we don’t have a rolodex of wealthy donors to call up or friends working at super PACs to help us out. Our movement is funded by small-dollar donors from all across Arizona’s 3rd District, chipping in a few bucks here and there.
With 2024 just around the corner, Peter, can you chip in $1 to support our movement? Believe me, every PENNY helps make a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_121123_onedollarask&amount=1]

name: Lucy McBath
subject: There’s a target on my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The GOP is blatantly trying to kick me out of Congress |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996952/443273702/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWVkZDA5YmEtNzM5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kaa5Tb7naji9P5P_GRDCfem8NNpxl81WDURlJQpgEwU=)
---
Hey Peter – I’m Congresswoman Lucy McBath, a proud Democrat representing Georgia’s 7th district. **The Georgia state legislature****just passed****new Congressional maps that redrew my district to be over 20 points Republican.** I’m going to ask for your support in fighting back, but first let me tell you my story... **I never thought I’d become an activist, but everything changed when my son Jordan was shot and killed in November 2012.** _As a grieving mother, I decided I had to turn my pain into purpose._ I began working as an organizer and activist for gun safety organizations and eventually ran for Congress in a district deemed impossible for Democrats to win. So-called “experts” told me not to raise the issue of gun safety reform in Georgia, but I knew my community better. **I’ve become a leading voice on gun violence prevention in Congress, but a recent court ruling has put my reelection into question.** The state legislature just passed the new Georgia Congressional maps, and the district I represent is now tilted toward the GOP by +20. [_**Can you please pitch in a $10 donation between myself and HER Time to help me fight back before the judge makes a ruling?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996953/443273703/-1146044587?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWVkZDA5YmEtNzM5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kaa5Tb7naji9P5P_GRDCfem8NNpxl81WDURlJQpgEwU=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996954/443273704/-1146044587?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWVkZDA5YmEtNzM5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kaa5Tb7naji9P5P_GRDCfem8NNpxl81WDURlJQpgEwU=)
---
You see, my outspokenness on the gun violence epidemic has put a target on my back. The NRA (and the GOP politicians they back) have been attacking me for years. They know I won’t back down, and they’ve done everything they can to force me out of Congress.
**My worst fears have unfortunately been confirmed. The GOP has shown they’ll do anything and everything in their power to force me out of the Capitol.**
We’ve set a goal of raising $25k in grassroots donations by 12/20 to make sure I’m prepared for what will be a highly contested reelection campaign. [_**Peter, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and HER Time ASAP?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74996955/443273705/-2065165508?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWVkZDA5YmEtNzM5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kaa5Tb7naji9P5P_GRDCfem8NNpxl81WDURlJQpgEwU=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Lucy McBath and HER Time will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The GOP is blatantly trying to kick me out of Congress | = Hey Peter – I’m Congresswoman Lucy McBath, a proud Democrat representing Georgia’s 7th district. The Georgia state legislaturejust passednew Congressional maps that redrew my district to be over 20 points Republican. I’m going to ask for your support in fighting back, but first let me tell you my story... I never thought I’d become an activist, but everything changed when my son Jordan was shot and killed in November 2012. As a grieving mother, I decided I had to turn my pain into purpose. I began working as an organizer and activist for gun safety organizations and eventually ran for Congress in a district deemed impossible for Democrats to win. So-called “experts” told me not to raise the issue of gun safety reform in Georgia, but I knew my community better. I’ve become a leading voice on gun violence prevention in Congress, but a recent court ruling has put my reelection into question. The state legislature just passed the new Georgia Congressional maps, and the district I represent is now tilted toward the GOP by +20. = | = You see, my outspokenness on the gun violence epidemic has put a target on my back. The NRA (and the GOP politicians they back) have been attacking me for years. They know I won’t back down, and they’ve done everything they can to force me out of Congress. My worst fears have unfortunately been confirmed. The GOP has shown they’ll do anything and everything in their power to force me out of the Capitol. We’ve set a goal of raising $25k in grassroots donations by 12/20 to make sure I’m prepared for what will be a highly contested reelection campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Lucy McBath and HER Time will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for having my back, Lucy McBath HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

clean_body: More than 1,500 Democrats from all across the country have already renewed their 2024 Biden-Harris Membership! | | | Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know: Thousands of President Biden and Vice President Harris’s supporters from all across the country have already reserved their 2024 Biden-Harris Membership Card. We’re shipping our first batch, and I don’t want supporters like you to miss out on this opportunity to be among our first card-carrying members in Pennsylvania. | | | Just like in 2020, this election is going to be close and we’re counting on every single member of this team to make an early investment in the success of our campaign. It fills me with hope to know that so many of the President and Vice President’s supporters have already renewed their membership from coast to coast. The commitments that they have made to this campaign are already supporting investments in organizing programs in battleground states, message testing, and digital and TV advertising. All of which will be essential to defending the White House against Donald Trump (or whomever Republicans nominate!) So, I have to ask: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We can’t do this work without your support. So, thank you for everything you’ve done and everything you will do to help reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris. More soon! Jess Jessica Porter Grassroots Fundraising Director Biden-Harris 2024

name: Greg Casar
subject: Jailing doctors for providing abortions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
We MUST codify abortion rights.
Today is a sad day for Texas, Peter.
Last week, Judge Maya Guerra Gamble granted 31-year-old Kate Cox an exception to Texas’s extreme abortion ban, after learning that her fetus had a fatal genetic condition that posed a risk to her own life and future fertility.
But then, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton asked the Republican-stacked state Supreme Court to intervene—and he threatened any doctor who assisted Cox with jail time. And the Texas Supreme Court obliged, blocking the lower court’s ruling and preventing Cox from getting the care she needed.
**Kate Cox then announced today that unfortunately, she would be forced to leave Texas to get the life-saving, court-sanctioned care she needs.**
This is a shameful example of the extremism Texas Republicans have brought to our state.
First, they pass one of the most extreme abortion bans in the nation—with no exceptions for rape, incest, or even in cases like Kate’s where the patient’s life is at-risk. Then they threaten to jail doctors who provide life-saving, court-sanctioned abortion care to Texas patients.
**Here’s the sad reality:_Texas is no longer a safe place to be pregnant. _**
With politicians like Greg Abbott and Ken Paxton dictating reproductive care, anyone could find themselves in Kate Cox’s position. That’s why it’s so critical we work to unseat these far-right extremists and codify abortion rights—and that’s what Team Casar is working on every day.
[**Can you chip in $8 or $10, or whatever you can, to help Team Casar fight to restore abortion rights in Texas and across the nation? They have sent four separate candidates to see if any can spread enough lies and misinformation to defeat our grassroots movement. However, in 2022, I successfully became the first Democrat in nearly 50 years to hold this seat and the first woman ever. Republicans are determined to bolster their support in my hometown, recognizing the strength of our campaign. Despite the odds, I surpassed the performance of top-of-the-ticket Democrats, making our campaign a target for the GOP. Their efforts aim to undermine my position, suppress district turnout, and reclaim this seat in 2024. They have sent four separate candidates to see if any can spread enough lies and misinformation to defeat our grassroots movement. By preserving my Democratic seat and driving victories for Democrats in West Michigan and nationwide, we can achieve a significant impact in 2024. = | = | = | = | = | = Your support is much appreciated, thank you so much, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema betrayed women's most basic rights
body:
Reproductive rights in Arizona are in peril because of Sinema | | | Peter – When Kyrsten Sinema had the choice to either stand up for Arizona women’s right to an abortion, or to side with Republican politicians’ “right” to filibuster – she chose to side with the Republicans. **Now, states across the country, including Arizona, are left to fight tooth and nail to protect reproductive healthcare.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wh6FCWiWv8rBfMCA6LXqAJVEvFYOmqd2jtRCQi4eANrQbToG-SC4MOQ0UMv49L5dMvdP4o4s2b_-BDrYGbCUQVwcnMEvMIu1kdVOrhQPNLnfN9T9M1sA54MlRyTkJthVk99eYSZ1tZX4kDq6LZ53eLZheGmR6kFnCmzK7ImEr5zBHb1XfWygjAEV2gy9vAWv-b9Ohg8AUuWSACoeCWBU-QCRdiRDZvlUn2B3mQ89LbhtLNaXzmEGa34Qk94irVHrTTIEKhrghYk6PtS63N9osbTwPKuVPhWE7Y6o2s3Cx_Vo-I0eIl_kEJCAnDIDfA4sM/421/vdXZ7KvETDW63q1wuAqW2Q/h0/6uhM2F4Tvz3XK_PTQ24doc1n7gGtOTbQoeYFq9Onhzc) Sinema’s choice imperiled the lives of Arizonans, and blocked federal action on abortion rights. Thankfully, abortion advocates in Arizona are doing their part to help push forward a statewide statewide ballot initiative – the _Arizona Abortion Access Act_ – to enshrine abortion rights into the state constitution. But we need to remind everyone: these state ballot initiatives wouldn’t even be necessary if Sinema and the Republicans hadn’t blocked abortion rights on a federal level. **[_Help us hold Sinema accountable for her dangerous obstruction – and replace her with a REAL pro-choice Democrat like Ruben Gallego. Sinema’s record on abortion rights has long been mixed. First, she confirmed over 100 of Donald Trump’s judges – including several who were anti-choice extremists. Then, after Trump stacked the Supreme Court with right-wing judges who overturned Roe v. Wade, Sinema joined Republicans in preserving the Senate filibuster instead of joining with Democrats to protect abortion rights.
It’s no wonder groups like NARAL, Emily’s List, and Planned Parenthood rescinded their endorsements of Sinema. Meanwhile, Governor Katie Hobbs publicly added her name to a petition to pass _the Arizona Abortion Access Act_ ballot initiative _._ And of course there’s Democratic Rep. Ruben Gallego who is staunchly pro-choice and has promised he’ll work to enshrine abortion rights into federal law.
**That’s why we have to do three things in November 2024 to protect the right to choose:**
1. **Pass the**** _Arizona Abortion Access Act_****ballot initiative**
2. **Defeat Kyrsten Sinema**
3. **Elect Ruben Gallego**

clean_body: Reproductive rights in Arizona are in peril because of Sinema | | | Peter – When Kyrsten Sinema had the choice to either stand up for Arizona women’s right to an abortion, or to side with Republican politicians’ “right” to filibuster – she chose to side with the Republicans. Now, states across the country, including Arizona, are left to fight tooth and nail to protect reproductive healthcare. Sinema’s choice imperiled the lives of Arizonans, and blocked federal action on abortion rights. Thankfully, abortion advocates in Arizona are doing their part to help push forward a statewide statewide ballot initiative – the Arizona Abortion Access Act – to enshrine abortion rights into the state constitution. But we need to remind everyone: these state ballot initiatives wouldn’t even be necessary if Sinema and the Republicans hadn’t blocked abortion rights on a federal level. name: John Fetterman
subject: Just took a peek at ActBlue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
As we get closer + closer to the end of the year, I thought I’d take a peek at our average ActBlue donation this quarter.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231211-1?refcode=em20231211-1&refcode2=8705_434096_7SRe0N&akid=8705%2E434096%2E7SRe0N)
Yep, still under $20. 😍
IDK about you, but I think it’s pretty cool that normal working people chipped less than $20 to this campaign on average, and as a result we were able to support candidates in important elections this year + keep fighting for working people from PA and around the country.
This campaign has always been powered by real people, not special interests, Derek. That’s why I’m in the Senate to fight for yinz + youse.
**[If you’re ready to continue supporting my work in the U.S. Senate, will you chip in $19.14-- our average donation in Q4 2023 -- or more?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231211-1?refcode=em20231211-1-8705&refcode2=8705_434096_7SRe0N&akid=8705%2E434096%2E7SRe0N)**
**[Donate $19.14 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231211-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231211-8705&amount=19.14&refcode2=8705_434096_7SRe0N&akid=8705%2E434096%2E7SRe0N)**
**[Donate another amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231211-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231211-8705&refcode2=8705_434096_7SRe0N&akid=8705%2E434096%2E7SRe0N)**
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231211-8705-footer&t=1&refcode2=8705_434096_7SRe0N&akid=8705%2E434096%2E7SRe0N)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: It’s not about money raised. | | Hey team, It’s Jahana Hayes here. We’re just a few weeks away from 2024, and we need your help to develop the campaign that will help us win in November 2024. To help us build on our support, today I’m setting a goal of getting 50 new donors before the end of the week. This goal is not about the money that we raise, it’s about showing that we have a team backing us every step of the way. = | = I ran for Congress because of voters like you, team. I’m not listening to outside dark money, because I’m running my campaign a different way. To run this grassroots campaign, I’m counting on our grassroots supporters like you. Simply put, I couldn’t do it without you. I set this goal to give our campaign the power that we need to do the critical work in 2024. name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: I'm personally inviting you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
1️⃣ perfect way to pledge your commitment to pro-choice champions all year long → |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74997666/443276274/-87447817?sourceid=1052530&refcode=20231211_ERMem_ND&refcode2=WTEFEL16&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmM4YTJiNS03Nzk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l67u2ez9Xw1KX6Valtp8R7CMJmJLcYD267_hGjbV3Q4=) Dear Peter,

In 1985, alongside the other Founding Mothers of EMILYs List, I set an ambitious goal: To build a network of _at least_ _1,000 members_ committed to our mission of electing qualified Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. In just ten months, we not only met this goal, __but surpassed it__.

In the nearly 40 years since the inception of EMILYs List, our now millions-strong community has made history countless times over.

Today, the political landscape looks vastly different than it did in 1985. Our mission, and the passion of our community, however, has never changed. EMILYs List members are tenacious individuals who are committed to breaking barriers, fighting back against Republican extremism, and supporting incredible Democratic pro-choice women who _get things done_.

****That is why I'm inviting you, Peter, to pledge your early support and become a 2024 EMILYs List member:**** | [START YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74997667/443276275/-87447817?sourceid=1052530&refcode=20231211_ERMem_ND&refcode2=WTEFEL16&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmM4YTJiNS03Nzk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l67u2ez9Xw1KX6Valtp8R7CMJmJLcYD267_hGjbV3Q4=)
---
Like you, I was furious when the conservative-packed Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last year. So as far-right Republicans got to work eliminating abortion access for millions of Americans, **we rolled up our sleeves and prepared for the fight ahead.**

Your investments in the women we endorsed last cycle _were the reason_ Republicans were unable to pass their national abortion ban this year. And this cycle, early support from this community helped power critical wins in battleground states like Virginia. Without the support, courage, and determination of pro-choice supporters like you, Peter, _none_ of this would have been possible.

But this fight is nowhere near over. The 2024 cycle is in full swing and the battle for our democracy and autonomy is being fought in the Senate, House, and state legislatures across the country.

EMILYs List built a name for itself because we support Democratic pro-choice women who _defy_ the odds and _never_ back down from a tough fight. So please, don't wait to join the millions who are ready to support fearless women taking on tough battles from now until next November.

********Donate any amount to become a 2024 member, help hit our goal of 15,000 Early Bird members, and stand with our millions strong pro-choice community today:**

clean_body: 1️⃣ perfect way to pledge your commitment to pro-choice champions all year long → | | | = Dear Peter, In 1985, alongside the other Founding Mothers of EMILYs List, I set an ambitious goal: To build a network of at least 1,000 members committed to our mission of electing qualified Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. In just ten months, we not only met this goal, but surpassed it. In the nearly 40 years since the inception of EMILYs List, our now millions-strong community has made history countless times over. Today, the political landscape looks vastly different than it did in 1985. Our mission, and the passion of our community, however, has never changed. EMILYs List members are tenacious individuals who are committed to breaking barriers, fighting back against Republican extremism, and supporting incredible Democratic pro-choice women who get things done. **That is why I'm inviting you, Peter, to pledge your early support and become a 2024 EMILYs List member: | = Like you, I was furious when the conservative-packed Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year. So as far-right Republicans got to work eliminating abortion access for millions of Americans, we rolled up our sleeves and prepared for the fight ahead. Your investments in the women we endorsed last cycle were the reason Republicans were unable to pass their national abortion ban this year. And this cycle, early support from this community helped power critical wins in battleground states like Virginia. Without the support, courage, and determination of pro-choice supporters like you, Peter, none of this would have been possible. But this fight is nowhere near over. The 2024 cycle is in full swing and the battle for our democracy and autonomy is being fought in the Senate, House, and state legislatures across the country. EMILYs List built a name for itself because we support Democratic pro-choice women who defy the odds and never back down from a tough fight. So please, don't wait to join the millions who are ready to support fearless women taking on tough battles from now until next November. ****Donate any amount to become a 2024 member, help hit our goal of 15,000 Early Bird members, and stand with our millions strong pro-choice community today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, Ellen R. Malcolm Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Look, no one should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one. But millions of Americans who are denied family leave are faced with these impossible decisions every time their child, parent or partner falls ill.
That's why Kirsten Gillibrand has spent years fighting for national paid family leave, guaranteeing every single American the right to take time off to care for their family without facing repercussions from their employer.
**And new polling has shown that Kirsten's legislation is hugely popular with Americans:****The overwhelming majority of Democrats, independents AND even Republicans support passing paid family leave!**
There's almost no other issue as unifying as paid family leave. And with such broad support, we're closer than ever before to getting Kirsten's legislation across the finish line. **But first we need to know where you stand.[Please, will you respond to our live poll before it closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74997757/443276539/1670627386?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4624-su-nd&refcode=jtk4624-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmZhYWE0Zi03ODk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M0uoWCqajmCgPtzkSDXAgjfHSSIpaPq8PHuK_TeVw7s=&emci=25f44076-1396-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=dffaaa4f-7898-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=7659029)**

And new polling has shown that Kirsten's legislation is hugely popular with Americans:The overwhelming majority of Democrats, independents AND even Republicans support passing paid family leave! There's almost no other issue as unifying as paid family leave. And with such broad support, we're closer than ever before to getting Kirsten's legislation across the finish line. name: Team Gallego
subject: Ring the bell
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’ve started looking at our progress, and we don’t have much good news to report.
#

Peter:
There’s a moment every month where we take stock of our progress and determine whether we’re on track to hit our goals or if we’re going to come up short.
That moment is coming up.
If we’re on track to our goal, it’s great. If we’re ahead, we can make more critical investments. And if we’re behind, we have to reel in our budget. That can hurt our chances at winning.
We’ve started looking at our progress, and we don’t have much good news to report. We’re behind where we should be, and alarm bells are ringing.
This isn’t any regular deadline, and this isn’t any regular goal. This is our last FEC deadline of the year, and this is our last chance to hit our overall fundraising goal for 2023. What we raise now is the foundation that our entire campaign will be based on.
It is absolutely critical to victory — critical to holding the Senate, critical to defeating Kari Lake, critical to taking this seat back from Kyrsten Sinema — that we start 2024 on level financial footing.
It would give Ruben and this whole campaign a lot of peace of mind if we made good progress to our goal today. That means we need good supporters who understand how important this race is to chip in.
So please:
[**Will you make your first online donation to Ruben’s campaign for Senate in Arizona today?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231211-2&t=1&akid=1543%2E734936%2E78UQZk)

subject: Struggle is real

The Democrats are outspending us

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ed9fb883a35d486fa55b1d1dc9528a30&_e=-GHFDlmpdj1INnSAPrthn5gIF1cK_azhgSf3mzSdla4xwcacWDAbfHwafvcUchFlck_KKEUopWnhOSkSbZ_Ed6brOCKJYXv2MRVGbo8-gYH8XJCmDD5jP1IEqCvMhA13bEEWOgk0KldxH6htq6EGvxYEuITc1OvAapqNCpldOwYdltusEpF4JJNakoDFcwDyBvWJN05CcLiko6f-b6Sh9DzMQQV5swk4dgk3L7Lb1Rx3m1fy0FsTroQ5tq6HW365TEJOfAzgUc4bmFn55-TT3WwpTHcpPbOksaHv6RtSiso6vd7DAGpxLBHticlBHzZp_9aqJH34bnUsR2D2FqK63-7_x9dnFmbyXchfVqUxE5DAecJL5yulPXQqyUBqwx-G)

Fellow American,

**We are beginning to struggle in our race for Senate. My campaign team just messaged me and told me we are neck and neck. On top of that, we are being outraised.**

**[We still have time to turn this around, but I will need your help immediately. We are in a dire situation and cannot afford another six years under Democrat leadership in Michigan.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ed9fb883a35d486fa55b1d1dc9528a30&_e=-GHFDlmpdj1INnSAPrthn5gIF1cK_azhgSf3mzSdla4xwcacWDAbfHwafvcUchFlck_KKEUopWnhOSkSbZ_Ed6brOCKJYXv2MRVGbo8-gYH8XJCmDD5jP1IEqCvMhA13bEEWOgk0KldxH6htq6EGvxYEuITc1OvAapqNCpldOwYdltusEpF4JJNakoDFcwDyBvWJN05CcLiko6f-b6Sh9DzMQQV5swk4dgk3L7Lb1RyuVnX-FEMy9G0N9kFetWFZAYwgQYMI2DmZWjCahpy9MeW-Zoln-RvkQ4AtmH3NBD963odym1Zqkro6Q3HgKbJ2MmGbIQj7U3wvYkseTzXL18JXAO__14RehjA1AaquVnsZoxbLY1cAu6uEqeuyqqiU)** | [ **HELP US WIN** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ed9fb883a35d486fa55b1d1dc9528a30&_e=-GHFDlmpdj1INnSAPrthn5gIF1cK_azhgSf3mzSdla4xwcacWDAbfHwafvcUchFlck_KKEUopWnhOSkSbZ_Ed6brOCKJYXv2MRVGbo8-gYH8XJCmDD5jP1IEqCvMhA13bEEWOgk0KldxH6htq6EGvxYEuITc1OvAapqNCpldOwYdltusEpF4JJNakoDFcwDyBvWJN05CcLiko6f-b6Sh9DzMQQV5swk4dgk3L7Lb1Rx564XZjprmJhfB_Ogq4HIWVA4T-U3N1JN5WMVTf61CSvAb4a7f3KrU0bdGUr_ajbIV2NLYlS-SYmYF5OGcU8zvqbpQvYNXfsxqAguXWMYmc0-F7pegt1_NvWYx66h8ni6xc9mhSC1t5v_wM8qyPlKI)

The Radical Left is doing whatever it takes to implement their Sick Socialist Agenda. They want to defund the police, cause CHAOS in our major cities, and target our children with WOKE ideas. I will not stand for it.

**[As the next US Senator for Michigan, I will never back down from the Left and its vicious tactics. Join me>>](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ed9fb883a35d486fa55b1d1dc9528a30&_e=-GHFDlmpdj1INnSAPrthn5gIF1cK_azhgSf3mzSdla4xwcacWDAbfHwafvcUchFlck_KKEUopWnhOSkSbZ_Ed6brOCKJYXv2MRVGbo8-gYH8XJCmDD5jP1IEqCvMhA13bEEWOgk0KldxH6htq6EGvxYEuITc1OvAapqNCpldOwYdltusEpF4JJNakoDFcwDyBvWJN05CcLiko6f-b6Sh9DzMQQV5swk4dgk3L7Lb1RwSE5EHmqXYXN9qDF02R3IwApXQGJNe9N-BixbVdmdS7BWjHYEg1UBgDaf54_0lRozi2XXV7iA-LeOs9Wcx9RhHMOUO91VZF0CF8baNZ7f5p2K8g68CkU8-bK-wddOD_KYGzqUhXI2YqQW89aVjrgwP)**

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Re: the genocide of Jews
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
If you’re calling for the genocide of Jews, it’s hate speech. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=c813f758d68741ac84b908de41efb0d8&_t=MYZoQCdgD6xzZgRqcmXm9YjKV9_wdAaYKUyU_TITJ-TSFzz0z2gO42B7yj_lIEmqU2qn7tAqMMPEtOivei7KOQQelk1ecArI0SYkqN0S3v4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=c813f758d68741ac84b908de41efb0d8&_t=MYZoQCdgD6xzZgRqcmXm9YjKV9_wdAaYKUyU_TITJ-TSFzz0z2gO42B7yj_lIEmqU2qn7tAqMMPEtOivei7KOQQelk1ecArI0SYkqN0S3v4%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c813f758d68741ac84b908de41efb0d8&_e=klgYdnEBjvGSrc-Lchb5tnvG_GJnnfSrgUWnJPCPJDPdoV1wXia38X74KVqyWsAAxW3ckeKW1hv5cGpXr6lj8dGhptjmsaUpcKT0tD5LHUCMZIuyxPGihLQQx2ZA40HiEmvRh6dTRtqOtyA-gX2_rZVViT0_H1eHmnxWptDczfY1cuBAZfpqjKrMsS4bfAIOEpj_qPONU3dRBKawPdEHYm9Xii2AWsbOLddrS4jNRPiNODid3LjB8uLEUhg_Lq2mgGHUmG_3_sFl3AUOeloMckQ-QZiqM5lxsrXufDQnVagL9Ztf59WiTmU39RAV4qAB4z5UaNkqiP0A7UEQQPObbxzG2lNZC1KePrRY0fz-ApHXjMXjB4L-b05leHJSBd3mo7HH9fo5l03taxeQSKvFhqJ0FvLJW0OuSyGx2N78Zmc%3D)

Peter,

It’s been nearly a week since the presidents of Harvard, the University of Pennsylvania, and MIT- under oath in front of Congress - declined to say that hateful rhetoric on their campuses, including calling for the genocide of Jews, constituted hate speech according to their school’s code of conduct.

_**My opponent, Montana Democrat Jon Tester, has said nothing.**_

His silence is deafening.

I want to know your stance on this, Peter. Please drop what you’re doing and spend 30 seconds answering a few questions on my mind over the last couple of days.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c813f758d68741ac84b908de41efb0d8&_e=klgYdnEBjvGSrc-Lchb5tnvG_GJnnfSrgUWnJPCPJDPdoV1wXia38X74KVqyWsAAxW3ckeKW1hv5cGpXr6lj8dGhptjmsaUpcKT0tD5LHUCMZIuyxPGihLQQx2ZA40HiEmvRh6dTRtqOtyA-gX2_rZVViT0_H1eHmnxWptDczfY1cuBAZfpqjKrMsS4bfAIOEpj_qPONU3dRBKawPdEHYm9Xii2AWsbOLddrS4jNRPiNODid3LjB8uLEUhg_Lq2mJXiPruKLq0yKwFOelIOeaOjJQZ2uEYcyF-IGZ-buxPFBRI0LImjPNBT7o7WE8Kn1esmKqtoQD-5oXfeFpRQvxkNMt61enrAeRbG67dDnH2ZVi9kzY-O8QO98V6iiiUOYXHZqLpqXZs5lKzFkUCqGGoI0_Md28_LcW7JGx19dgHw%3D)
[**DOES ISRAEL HAVE THE RIGHT TO EXIST?
LET US KNOW->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c813f758d68741ac84b908de41efb0d8&_e=klgYdnEBjvGSrc-Lchb5tnvG_GJnnfSrgUWnJPCPJDPdoV1wXia38X74KVqyWsAAxW3ckeKW1hv5cGpXr6lj8dGhptjmsaUpcKT0tD5LHUCMZIuyxPGihLQQx2ZA40HiEmvRh6dTRtqOtyA-gX2_rZVViT0_H1eHmnxWptDczfY1cuBAZfpqjKrMsS4bfAIOEpj_qPONU3dRBKawPdEHYm9Xii2AWsbOLddrS4jNRPiNODid3LjB8uLEUhg_Lq2mHmBqPUfgPkBb4er-APeufa-65E_-_yA32Ht7tBX2EM_m2Ccwv1QPezgBHYUPWNVFu7Iis2yssjBZuSgHWFrSqVbhsa_68He-CtHrPXMjP020BhWSr899znomWODn-QLyz1tHhU1bZcMJo_uQjSfk6Xfe-hqljUh_60uRmBcTEu8%3D)

The testimony by all three university heads was _**pathetic**_. The testimony each of the three women who sat in front of Congress yesterday gave was not only dehumanizing toward the Jewish people, but _**it also sent a clear message to the enemies of Israel in America that their hate toward Jews is acceptable on college campuses across our country**_.

Meanwhile, over on Twitter, Jon Tester wasn’t posting about the importance of defending Israel or condemning hate speech against Jewish Americans - **he was posting about butchering meat.**

As a former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate, defending America’s right to exist, our freedom, and the values that we stand for are always at the forefront of everything I do in life. We need folks in the United States Senate who aren’t afraid to ask tough questions, defend our democratic allies abroad, _**and, more importantly, stand up for what is right.**_

The presidents of Harvard, MIT, and UPenn should lose their jobs for their failure to condemn Jewish hate, and Jon Tester should be ashamed of himself for having nothing to say about Jewish genocide.

[**DOES ISRAEL HAVE THE RIGHT TO EXIST?

clean_body: If you’re calling for the genocide of Jews, it’s hate speech. | | Peter, It’s been nearly a week since the presidents of Harvard, the University of Pennsylvania, and MIT- under oath in front of Congress - declined to say that hateful rhetoric on their campuses, including calling for the genocide of Jews, constituted hate speech according to their school’s code of conduct. My opponent, Montana Democrat Jon Tester, has said nothing. His silence is deafening. I want to know your stance on this, Peter. Please drop what you’re doing and spend 30 seconds answering a few questions on my mind over the last couple of days. The testimony by all three university heads was pathetic. The testimony each of the three women who sat in front of Congress yesterday gave was not only dehumanizing toward the Jewish people, but it also sent a clear message to the enemies of Israel in America that their hate toward Jews is acceptable on college campuses across our country. Meanwhile, over on Twitter, Jon Tester wasn’t posting about the importance of defending Israel or condemning hate speech against Jewish Americans - he was posting about butchering meat. As a former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate, defending America’s right to exist, our freedom, and the values that we stand for are always at the forefront of everything I do in life. We need folks in the United States Senate who aren’t afraid to ask tough questions, defend our democratic allies abroad, and, more importantly, stand up for what is right. The presidents of Harvard, MIT, and UPenn should lose their jobs for their failure to condemn Jewish hate, and Jon Tester should be ashamed of himself for having nothing to say about Jewish genocide. body:
This email is different from what we normally send, but I hope you’ll read it. | | Peter,

From the frontlines, I've seen firsthand what lack of access to routine preventative healthcare means for Americans, and I’m determined to find solutions. **[Before I share my plan, I’m asking for your help with a donation to my campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74997964/443277592/1416552317?refcode=em23_231211_HCS_fnd_gq_inac___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231211_HCS_fnd_gq_inac___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=fcc17602-7998-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNjMTc2MDItNzk5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=idvha4FWOD9HhYX3OQKO0t8AJHWxTJgcMDubY6fy8ww=)**

It is tragic that healthcare is still out of reach for the millions of uninsured. In Texas, our healthcare outcomes are some of the worst in the nation. **In 2021, nearly 20% of Texans were uninsured, and Texas children were more than twice as likely as children in other states to be uninsured. Texas also ranks #49 in the nation for women’s healthcare.**

Texans deserve better. That's why in Congress, I will fight to:
* **Offer a public option for health insurance so Americans will have expanded access and more choices in the Marketplace.**
* **Lower prescription drug costs.** For those lucky enough to see a doctor, there is still the burden of prescription drug costs. We must cap the cost of insulin for all Americans at $35 per month and hold drug companies accountable by putting patients over profits.
* **Incentivize research and development of Orphan Drugs. Far too many parents watch their children suffer with rare conditions for which treatments are unavailable or way too expensive.** There’s more we can do to ensure that pharmaceutical companies continue to research treatments and cures for rare conditions and that those treatments are fairly priced. I will fight for expanded resources for Orphan Drug research and work to increase awareness and support for this vital program in Washington.
* **Fight for expanding Medicaid and support legislation to encourage state legislators to change course in favor of helping millions of Texans receive the coverage they need.**
* **Increase transparency for patients in the healthcare system.** Insurance companies and corporate hospital systems have made it virtually impossible to get straightforward answers on what patients might pay out of pocket — so they can make more money at Texans’ expense. We must pass reforms that get Texans the information they deserve when emergencies strike.
* **Ensure women have the right to make decisions about their health — without the interference of politicians.** In Congress, I will vote to re-establish and protect the right to an abortion nationwide. I will also defend the right to birth control and oppose medically unnecessary requirements on abortion providers.

**This isn't just a list to me — these are tangible, research-driven goals that will help us create a Texas that can thrive.** In 2022, I worked with Democratic leaders in Washington on legislation to allow Medicare to negotiate drug prices, improve diversity in clinical trials, and increase accessibility to affordable healthcare. I also worked on federal legislation related to mental health reform, reproductive rights, Medicare, Medicaid, and more. **I am more than ready to commit to this work as your congressman for TX-32.**

**[But I can only do that if our campaign has the resources to win next November. This campaign is a team effort, and we need all of our supporters to chip in where they can. That’s why I hope today you’ll make a donation of $5 or whatever you can afford>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74997965/443277593/1416552317?refcode=em23_231211_HCS_fnd_gq_inac___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231211_HCS_fnd_gq_inac___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=fcc17602-7998-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNjMTc2MDItNzk5OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=idvha4FWOD9HhYX3OQKO0t8AJHWxTJgcMDubY6fy8ww=)** Texans deserve better. That's why in Congress, I will fight to: Offer a public option for health insurance so Americans will have expanded access and more choices in the Marketplace. Lower prescription drug costs. For those lucky enough to see a doctor, there is still the burden of prescription drug costs. We must cap the cost of insulin for all Americans at $35 per month and hold drug companies accountable by putting patients over profits. Incentivize research and development of Orphan Drugs. Far too many parents watch their children suffer with rare conditions for which treatments are unavailable or way too expensive. There’s more we can do to ensure that pharmaceutical companies continue to research treatments and cures for rare conditions and that those treatments are fairly priced. I will fight for expanded resources for Orphan Drug research and work to increase awareness and support for this vital program in Washington. Fight for expanding Medicaid and support legislation to encourage state legislators to change course in favor of helping millions of Texans receive the coverage they need. Increase transparency for patients in the healthcare system. Insurance companies and corporate hospital systems have made it virtually impossible to get straightforward answers on what patients might pay out of pocket — so they can make more money at Texans’ expense. We must pass reforms that get Texans the information they deserve when emergencies strike. Ensure women have the right to make decisions about their health — without the interference of politicians. In Congress, I will vote to re-establish and protect the right to an abortion nationwide. I will also defend the right to birth control and oppose medically unnecessary requirements on abortion providers. This isn't just a list to me — these are tangible, research-driven goals that will help us create a Texas that can thrive. In 2022, I worked with Democratic leaders in Washington on legislation to allow Medicare to negotiate drug prices, improve diversity in clinical trials, and increase accessibility to affordable healthcare. I also worked on federal legislation related to mental health reform, reproductive rights, Medicare, Medicaid, and more. I am more than ready to commit to this work as your congressman for TX-32. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- We can, and we WILL do better. Onward, Dr. Brian Williams = = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Veteran, trauma surgeon, and Democrat running for Congress in Texas' 32nd district to fix our broken systems and create life-saving change. Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress Dr. Brian Williams for Congress PO Box 180725 Dallas, TX 75218 United States

Let’s be real, Peter. We need a winning strategy to turn our country around. But there's good news: Emerge has that strategy, and we’re already putting it into action.
With our unique recruitment and training programs, **Emerge is accelerating political transformation by propelling community-driven Democratic women to every level of office. **
We know how to help bold new candidates beat the odds. That’s why our win rate for first-time candidates is a stellar 56 percent. **Without the Emerge difference, first-time candidates succeed in just 10-15 percent of their races. That’s a 30 point advantage!**
**So if you’re ready for powerhouse Democratic women to replace the anti-science, anti-voter, and anti-progress GOP, then we need you to support Emerge today.[Will you give $10 or more right now to power our recruitment and training efforts and empower Democratic women to run for office in 2024?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74998424/443278930/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1375-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4YzQ5YWI1LTc5OTgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yGRUCcEXlHgEpHIE9jaUu9qNRmi5KAkrc_kRZmKCODQ=)**

It matters who’s on your ballot, Peter. Our communities need leaders who understand our experiences and challenges – because they’ve lived those challenges too. That’s what representative democracy really looks like, and Emerge is working nonstop to help us get there.

clean_body: | | | = Let’s be real, Peter. We need a winning strategy to turn our country around. But there's good news: Emerge has that strategy, and we’re already putting it into action. With our unique recruitment and training programs, Emerge is accelerating political transformation by propelling community-driven Democratic women to every level of office. We know how to help bold new candidates beat the odds. That’s why our win rate for first-time candidates is a stellar 56 percent. Without the Emerge difference, first-time candidates succeed in just 10-15 percent of their races. That’s a 30 point advantage! So if you’re ready for powerhouse Democratic women to replace the anti-science, anti-voter, and anti-progress GOP, then we need you to support Emerge today.= | | = It matters who’s on your ballot, Peter. Our communities need leaders who understand our experiences and challenges – because they’ve lived those challenges too. That’s what representative democracy really looks like, and Emerge is working nonstop to help us get there. We’re elevating new leaders in battleground states who can rally our communities for real change. We’re training candidates who champion real issues like abortion access, fair labor practices, and lifesaving health care for all. And we’re building Democratic power nationwide by creating a pipeline of transformative leaders who can seize opportunities to run, win, and build lasting blue majorities state by state. That’s the strategy, Peter, and it’s working. But we can’t slow down now. So please, don’t wait until 2024 and miss the chance to power our movement to victory.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being a part of our movement, Team Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Sharice Davids
subject: 3 important things you need to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi there,

There’s three important things I need to talk to you about today.
1. The Atlantic came out with an article that shines a light on exactly how National Republicans plan to eliminate—and criminalize—abortion access if they expand their majority in 2024. Despite the will of the voters, they potentially want to shut down every abortion facility in the country.

2. The Cook Political Report outlined why 2024 is our last best chance to bring reason back to the House. The House is more competitive than the Senate—meaning that if we don’t want all of Congress in the hands of dangerous extremists, we have to win key districts like ours.

3. **Extremist House Republican Elise Stefanik recently endorsed our opponent, a key signal to her special interest backers to ramp up their involvement in our race. **

That’s why our public FEC deadline at the end of this year is our best opportunity to show we have what it takes to win KS-03 in 2024.

**_[Here’s what it all boils down to: Our last FEC deadline before 2024 is critical. We have to hit our goals. That’s why this week only, I’m opening 500 early memberships on our digital team for the election year. clean_body: | Hi there, There’s three important things I need to talk to you about today. 1. The Atlantic came out with an article that shines a light on exactly how National Republicans plan to eliminate—and criminalize—abortion access if they expand their majority in 2024. Despite the will of the voters, they potentially want to shut down every abortion facility in the country. 2. The Cook Political Report outlined why 2024 is our last best chance to bring reason back to the House. The House is more competitive than the Senate—meaning that if we don’t want all of Congress in the hands of dangerous extremists, we have to win key districts like ours. 3. Extremist House Republican Elise Stefanik recently endorsed our opponent, a key signal to her special interest backers to ramp up their involvement in our race. That’s why our public FEC deadline at the end of this year is our best opportunity to show we have what it takes to win KS-03 in 2024. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for all you do, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. Florida has a massive crisis, Peter...and Ron DeSantis and his fellow Republicans _refuse_ to address it.

Property insurance rates are _skyrocketing_ , with some paying _four times_ the national average. But that’s not all, Peter. The folks who aren’t getting price-gouged? They’re getting their policies _canceled._

**This is a _direct_ result of years of failed leadership from Ron DeSantis and his Republican legislature. He’s _failing_ to regulate the insurance industry, _failing_ to address the climate crisis, and _failing_ to do what is right for _all_ Floridians. **

While they refuse to act, I’m committed to actually showing up. I’m here in Congress, fighting for Floridians who have been left behind, doing what I can to right that wrong and make real change. But I can’t hold this seat without your help. [Somehow, the only thing the far-right in Florida can manage to do is spend millions to unseat me. I need your help to hold them off, so please, will you donate $27 to my campaign right now so we can actually address the problems that working families face? >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/DEde5EZ3QNXOd2mT2moJTA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnWhvpP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIxMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9pbnN1cmFuY2VfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlpQcW9adEVlTEF0NXlxU1lKNmx6SVRTVkpmJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJaUHFvWnRFZUxBdDV5cVNZSjZseklUU1ZKZiZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yWlBxb1p0RWVMQXQ1eXFTWUo2bHpJVFNWSmZXA3NwY0IKZXPplndlV8qK4VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) | [RUSH A DONATION NOW >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/DEde5EZ3QNXOd2mT2moJTA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnWhvpP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIxMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9pbnN1cmFuY2VfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlpQcW9adEVlTEF0NXlxU1lKNmx6SVRTVkpmJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJaUHFvWnRFZUxBdDV5cVNZSjZseklUU1ZKZiZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yWlBxb1p0RWVMQXQ1eXFTWUo2bHpJVFNWSmZXA3NwY0IKZXPplndlV8qK4VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

Peter, this is personal to DeSantis. He has taken _millions_ from the insurance industry to fund his campaigns. Obviously that’s not somebody we can trust to regulate the industry. No, he’s putting their properties first – _over_ the needs of his actual constituents and voters.

My organizing team and I are working year-round to defeat this continued failed leadership. And I’m fighting hard to stop it at the source, introducing the bills we need in Congress to help everybody.

**But I’m up against millions in special interest money, and cannot defeat it without help from the grassroots. That’s you, Peter.**

name: Team Kennedy
subject: NOTES FROM THE FIELD: “A little — a lot — bit ofdestiny” from Del Bigtree
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
I see life as a series of miracles.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_from_campaign_del_1r_nd1&n=1)
