* * *
# Notes from the Campaign Trail
Edition #3 from Del Bigtree

* * *
* * *
Peter, When friends ask me how I got to be the Director of Communications for the Kennedy Campaign, it usually triggers a flashback to David Byrne, the lead singer of The Talking Heads, in one of my favorite music videos. It’s 1981—the year my generation was blessed with the invention of MTV—and Byrne sings: _...And you may find yourself in another part of the world_ _And you may find yourself behind the wheel of a large automobile_ _And you may find yourself in a beautiful house, with a beautiful wife_ **_And you may ask yourself, “Well, how did I get here?”_** I may, someday, write a book about how I see life as a series of miracles. If you’ve ever watched my online talk show, The HighWire, or seen me speak on a stage, you’ve probably heard me share that I view even the tragedies in my life as miracles. My experiences have led me to believe that I was born with a destiny. And because it is my belief that the universe is fair and honorable, I believe we _all_ have a destiny. It is more important than ever, in these incredible times, to connect with that guidance inside each one of us and seize it. In my case, I credit a divinely-organized journey of disasters and triumphs for helping me find mine. When I read Bobby’s book, _American Values_ , I reflected on the important role my family has played in my journey. In the book, Bobby tells the story of how his grandfather would give him a poem to memorize before dinner. Bobby couldn’t sit down to enjoy the meal until the poem was memorized and recited perfectly. I suppose such a practice might be met with raised eyebrows these days, but when you see Bobby answer a question in a public forum on any topic—from the war in Ukraine to the safety trials of a drug—his ability to recall names, historical dates, and intricate details to support his opinion is beyond anything we have witnessed in modern politics. Nice job, Grandpa. I, too, was blessed with an amazing family and incredibly conscientious parents. We weren’t the Kennedys by any stretch of the imagination, but my two siblings and I were raised to believe that we could achieve anything we put our minds to. My parents also instilled in us the value of a clear, calm outlook; “You can’t put your mind to something if you can’t control your mind,” they’d say. To this end, my parents taught us to meditate at a very young age. My father was a minister, and our family business was the church. We were taught to lead by way of our connection to God, and this gave us an intuitive sense of what was right. In fourth grade, when my mother felt that I was letting peer pressure undermine my self-esteem, she pulled my sister and I out of school, declaring, “I will never raise children who care what other people think!” I ended up being homeschooled until tenth grade. At this point, it’s probably obvious that, yes, my parents were hippies. They raised us with the guiding principle to question everything—especially authority. They were dedicated to free speech, free religion, and the pursuit to end all war. They spoke often of the Kennedys, of the Vietnam war, and of their belief that the CIA used controlled opposition to infiltrate the march at the Chicago convention, which they attended and which erupted into violent chaos. Only by the grace of God did my parents narrowly escape being clubbed by the police that day. In some respects, sure, their parenting techniques could be construed as radical. Eating candy and drinking soda was strictly prohibited. We weren’t allowed to watch television or even listen to music. I remember when a family friend gave me a Sony Walkman for Christmas when I was fourteen. My mother snatched the Walkman away from me, saying, “If you want music, go play the piano.” So I learned to play the piano, and instead of watching television, I learned to make television. Mom: thank you. One of the things I admire most in Bobby is his commitment to protecting our families. I often wonder if my parents could—would even be allowed to—raise us today the way they did when my siblings and I were young. Our government attempts to control so many aspects of our family life. It’s horrifying. From weaponizing social issues to dictating medical decisions, the sovereignty of our families are under attack from myriad directions. And I have watched for years as Bobby has fought in courtrooms, on the steps of state capitol buildings, and in so many places in between to keep the government and regulatory agencies out of our homes—all while being flogged mercilessly by a captured media empire. I know a lot about that media empire because before I met Bobby, I was an Emmy-winning producer on the CBS talk show “The Doctors.” My obsession with truth and my insatiable journalistic curiosity had made me one of the show’s highest-rated producers. It wasn’t lost on anyone that I was pushing the envelope of daytime television with controversial topics: hospitals involved in medical kidnapping due to a misdiagnosed phenomenon in children, debates about the safety of Roundup— Monsanto’s cancer-causing weed killer—and more. (I didn’t care if Monsanto was one of the show’s sponsors; I cared about what that company was doing to people’s health.) In the case of Monsanto, I found out years later that footage from my episode on “The Doctors”—featuring Monsanto’s head toxicologist, Donna Farmer, debating the renowned GMO activist Jefferey Smith—was used as compelling evidence against the company during the trial. Internal emails revealed that Donna Farmer had lied on my episode, which left the jury stunned.* Bobby was one of the lawyers in that case against Monsanto. The case resulted in a multi-billion dollar settlement for the plaintiff, Dewayne Johnson—one of many, many victories Bobby has brought for people injured by corporate lies and deceit. It’s incredible to look back now and realize that Bobby and I were working together before we ever knew it. Destiny, you might say. Over the past several years, Bobby and I have grown close, in large part because of our shared mission to restore transparency to science and integrity to government regulatory agencies. Through the work of my nonprofit, Informed Consent Action Network (ICAN), and his nonprofit, Children’s Health Defense (CHD), we’ve helped bring much-needed attention to the lack of proper safety testing in vaccine development. This was exemplified by the rushed release of the experimental Covid vaccine. We’ve even joined forces to bring lawsuits against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), including a landmark case that we won. But there has never been a more exciting or important collaboration than the one we are on now: to make Bobby the first independent president since George Washington. I’ve been in this campaign from the very beginning. I was deeply fortunate to be one of the first people called to a meeting when Bobby was just beginning to consider entering the presidential race. I was in the room when he made the incredible decision to officially run for president—without a dollar in a war chest or a single supporter’s email address. And I can tell you, with the utmost conviction, that no one has ever stepped into a journey of this nature with more faith than Robert F. Kennedy Jr. On a wing and a prayer, we’ve used the little that we have to mount the most formidable independent run in history. We currently can’t afford television ads, and we’re being shut out by most of the mainstream media who refuse to discuss Robert F. Kennedy Jr.—despite the fact that polls have shown he’s the most favored candidate in the country. In other polls, he’s been “first among voters under 35”; “leading among independents in battleground states”; and, now, “polling within single digits of President Trump and President Biden in battleground states.” As an athlete, I’ve always loved being the underdog. If this were a bicycle race, we’d be in third place, the peloton out of sight behind us, drafting off of the two leaders who are clearly struggling with the steep hill climb. With half a race still left to go, I cannot imagine Bobby being in a better position to win. I wish I could say it was my unique talent at creating powerful media that got us here. Maybe that played a small part. And perhaps a bit can be attributed to the work of my incredible teammates: Charles Eisenstein, Gavin DeBecker, Amaryllis Kennedy, and several others who form the backbone of inspired thought leaders that are deeply committed to this historic campaign. The truth is, we’re all consistently humbled by the charisma, integrity, and wisdom of Robert F. Kennedy Jr.—a shining star that is drawing the attention of the world. Make no mistake: this assembled team is the stuff that movies are made about. I have known from the very beginning that we can win. As Bobby surges in the polls, every news agency in the country is grappling with the reality that, any day now, they will be forced to admit that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. can win. I’ll be frank: the thing we need _most_ right now is Bobby’s supporters and their financial contributions. While President Trump and President Biden are busy collecting hundreds of millions of dollars from corporations and special interest groups, our campaign faces the challenge of needing to raise tens of thousands of dollars from hard-working people. Average Americans—though there is nothing average about a single one. And, as if they don’t have it easy enough, Trump and Biden are automatically on the ballot—whereas Bobby has to go from state to state raising funds and collecting signatures to get on the ballots in all fifty states. It is no small feat, and it requires manpower and money. And so, I ask everyone reading this to envision a deeply unsettling sort of world, one only slightly in the future. A world in which your children are no longer raised by you, but by your government. Where decisions about pharmaceutical interventions for your kids, such as anti-depressants and stimulants, are mandated without your involvement, without your say. A world where simply trying to guide your child to wait before undergoing a life-altering surgery could be grounds to have them taken from you. A world where social credit scores—in my mother’s words, “what other people think of you”—decides if you can board a bus, get a job, or buy a house. Imagine a government-controlled digital currency that blocks you from eating meat, or a tracking system that bans you from entering a hospital to see a loved one in their final hours. Imagine a world that censors any communication that doesn’t support the government, no matter how far that censorship strays from the Constitution. Imagine a world where you are told it’s illegal to breathe the air without wearing a mask. Not only are the technologies currently in place to slingshot this world into reality, but President Trump and President Biden have and will continue to take dramatic steps toward this dystopian nightmare. Now, imagine you’re standing in the middle of this almost inevitable future. Close your eyes and consider how hard you’d pray for a miracle that would allow you to go back in time to the moment you could have acted to alter this reality. _What would you be willing to do? What would you be willing to give?_ It is this thought that has made me work the most insane hours I could have ever imagined. It is this reality that has me thanking God every day for the hardships that shaped me and the experiences that honed my talents for this moment. I only have to look into my children’s eyes to know that I cannot give up hope while we still have time. I am deeply inspired and more motivated than I’ve ever been in my life. And I fervently hope that, with these words, you will be inspired to tell everyone you know to lend their support while we still have a chance. I truly believe we were born for this. And I know, deep in my bones, that this is our destiny. So, as it turns out: I do find myself in another world
I find myself behind the wheel of a large automobile
I have a beautiful house, with a beautiful wife
I have two beautiful children
and I am the director of communications
for the greatest presidential candidate in my lifetime.
How did I get here? I don’t know. But I know what I’m going to do about it. The question is: do you? All the best, Del Bigtree P.S. Please consider making a contribution as we wind down Q4 fundraising efforts. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_from_campaign_del_1r_nd1&n=2 "$25") [$25](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=notes_from_campaign_del_1r_nd1&n=2)

[**_The NDRC is working nationwide to protect fairness in our elections and promote a strong democracy. Will you donate now to power our efforts across the country?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74998678/443279658/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231211_FR_12F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1OGNkMDFhLTdiOTgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VgRH37dazQpX2_m9TIBsF2Fe6wReKONYxySv6vPYmbY=) **FIRST,** ten years ago, the Supreme Court’s ruling in _Shelby County_ dismantled key portions of the Voting Rights Act, opening the door for a new wave of voter suppression laws.

**THEN,** after the 2020 election, Donald Trump’s Big Lie motivated state lawmakers to pass dozens of voter suppression laws across the country.

**NOW,** new court rulings threaten to eliminate voters’ ability to challenge these restrictive laws! | **_The Washington Post_

Step by step, conservative judges are gutting the Voting Rights Act

_“A right without a remedy is worse than useless — it is a cruel mirage. And that is what conservatives want to do to the Voting Rights Act: Turn it into an illusion.”_**
---
Here at the NDRC, we’ve never relied on one court or one ruling to accomplish our goal of defending democracy. _We have to do the work ourselves._
**We’re working nationwide to mobilize our grassroots movement to defend voting rights and our democracy – and we depend on supporters like you to power these efforts. Can we count on you to pitch in today?**

clean_body: | = FIRST, ten years ago, the Supreme Court’s ruling in Shelby County dismantled key portions of the Voting Rights Act, opening the door for a new wave of voter suppression laws. THEN, after the 2020 election, Donald Trump’s Big Lie motivated state lawmakers to pass dozens of voter suppression laws across the country. NOW, new court rulings threaten to eliminate voters’ ability to challenge these restrictive laws! | The Washington Post Step by step, conservative judges are gutting the Voting Rights Act “A right without a remedy is worse than useless — it is a cruel mirage. And that is what conservatives want to do to the Voting Rights Act: Turn it into an illusion.” Here at the NDRC, we’ve never relied on one court or one ruling to accomplish our goal of defending democracy. We have to do the work ourselves. We’re working nationwide to mobilize our grassroots movement to defend voting rights and our democracy – and we depend on supporters like you to power these efforts. name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: Another VIP has confirmed for next week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
Dec. 17 on St. Thomas and Dec. 18 on St. Croix

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c72fa3c7c407/re-hey-9335030?e=d30db4cde8)
Fellow Republicans,

I just got off the phone and couldn't wait until tomorrow to share the news.

A second VIP speaker is coming to our Republican holiday receptions on St. Thomas (December 17) and St. Croix (December 18). The receptions start at 6 p.m. each night.

Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo is coming down in support of Governor Ron DeSantis.

Ladapo will join Congressman Byron Donalds, who President Donald J. Trumps is sending to personally representative him.

To ensure there are enough drinks for everyone, please reply to this email and I'll put you on the guest list.

Yours,
Gordon Ackley

============================================================

**We strongly disagree, team!**

As climate scientists continue to raise the alarm on the devastating impact of climate change on human life, economic and political stability, and our current infrastructure not being able to withstand the consequences, _**extremists continue to deny the harsh reality.**_

That’s why our work to replace climate change deniers and fossil fuel allies from elected office **with climate champions at every level of government** has an immediate impact in our fight to end the era of Big Oil.

So far, we’ve elected even more climate champions in pivotal races across the country, and millions of people in Virginia, Pennsylvania, Minnesota, and California now have representatives, senators, councilmembers, executives, and supervisors who will fight for a livable future for all their communities. _**And we’re just getting started.**_ [_**Will you contribute $10 today to join our movement to protect our planet and replace fossil fuel allies with climate champions in 2024?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74998714/443279810/931971737?refcode=BLU_EM_JANE_2023-12-11_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljZDRkMjVkLTdiOTgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=huthpRJGjGUN5VIi2nMAL6-3fxMDpT1ZJTKJAPC2tMU=)

That’s why our work to replace climate change deniers and fossil fuel allies from elected office with climate champions at every level of government has an immediate impact in our fight to end the era of Big Oil. Charging Catholics over criminals. Prosecuting parents over predators. Going after grandmas, not gangsters. Friend, the FBI’s priorities are all upside down. This is former FBI Special Agent Mike Rogers, and back in my day the FBI’s reputation was second-to-none. Even the criminals we put away had respect for us. A South Side Chicago gangster went so far as to tell me “**I don’t like the FBI, but I respect the FBI.** ” But those days are long gone. Today, the FBI and the DOJ are too busy surveilling school board moms to stop Fentanyl traffickers that have killed more than 250,000 Americans with overdoses since 2018. Terrorists and drug traffickers are crossing the border. Criminals are walking free. But school board moms are getting all of the FBI’s attention. **[When I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, it’ll be my top mission to CLEAN HOUSE.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=fa8268ea59c24edc9aacf88173351b5d&_e=cy-ezBsI97w6vhbHmxuHXzhxcIxga2Qk0WIJQbvv5JDaVIX9Hx2VvAF9SDV7V-_VLUxWeCTiZnR004vI2hjUuH-ia5Bws_IdlHlcjC0-OAjGd3LGodNVAwTOeE--x1XE5H9kmGEHRbGi4hL-5Uj5yzu20DE7L2_aDcWztwduvMK5x5DK4RXowgMPXeUzbehgBEi7lASCKkeVb0AWnATvboCemCKcHq87UgpzCR5-sYCx9z3chsXzhP30UQkEPQNnXoTnfJ4b5Hiw1cVEpYy6inR8L8FNWyWgR7VkAGv5cikByAPepRAncLyqCHmYEN5dR8LlxNtdC8IImwA0PYqKfMTw2pUvK8cXDdeHPbb5-UQdj5kk9X8lrASH5sjKuA6EvuNY4CurtJb8WicZaK7YMoXQGbdO2cedIlnqqzXq0Y8%3D)** Christopher Wray, Alejandro Mayorkas, Merrick Garland, and all of Joe Biden’s bureaucratic lackeys have got to go and I’ll be the one to finally hold them accountable. Friend, if you think everyday Americans deserve an FBI that works for them, not against them,**[I’d be honored if I could have your support!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=fa8268ea59c24edc9aacf88173351b5d&_e=cy-ezBsI97w6vhbHmxuHXzhxcIxga2Qk0WIJQbvv5JDaVIX9Hx2VvAF9SDV7V-_VLUxWeCTiZnR004vI2hjUuH-ia5Bws_IdlHlcjC0-OAjGd3LGodNVAwTOeE--x1XE5H9kmGEHRbGi4hL-5Uj5yzu20DE7L2_aDcWztwduvMK5x5DK4RXowgMPXeUzbehgBEi7lASCKkeVb0AWnATvboCemCKcHq87UgpzCR5-sYCx9z3chsXzhP30UQkEPQNnpmcfucyqyyoGnRNZePuFPHfp5DkcMWII8sOs8k5N5bT1O5XOmCI3JHinmrlWPx05g3NFcpQ6JLI9j9YntGNMPwtjOGBUw7EdD-FecIQciB4dhbrSX7ldJYR0pwHvq49-dWT6tX0gQyG5CE8Jr6aVEmQNekqT5Pw2AYVzIvnIZxM%3D)** Sincerely,

body:

Peter, Donald Trump leveled yet another vile personal attack against me recently at an Iowa campaign rally, riling up his crowd and online MAGA supporters, and here’s why it matters:

**California’s Republican presidential primary and our Senate primary elections both fall on Super Tuesday, March 5._Trump’s legions of MAGA supporters are all eligible to vote in our Senate primary election._** We will have to respond to Trump’s lies and attacks by then.

Hello,
It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie.
Before Dad decided to run against Boebert in 2022, my parents tried to warn my sister and me what would happen. It’s one thing to imagine what it’ll feel like; it’s another to experience it. Especially when the attacks got really, really nasty.
My dad, Adam Frisch, barely lost last year to Lauren Boebert. It was just 546 votes. I really thought he might pull it off when things went to a recount. But unfortunately, we lost in the closest race in the country.
Now, Dad’s running again – and I _know_ he’s going to win in 2024. But the attacks from Boebert and her allies have already started...
His campaign has set a goal of raising another $75,000 before midnight tonight, and I wanted to send an email to see if you could chip in to help Dad defeat Lauren Boebert.

Hello, It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie. Before Dad decided to run against Boebert in 2022, my parents tried to warn my sister and me what would happen. It’s one thing to imagine what it’ll feel like; it’s another to experience it. Especially when the attacks got really, really nasty. My dad, Adam Frisch, barely lost last year to Lauren Boebert. It was just 546 votes. I really thought he might pull it off when things went to a recount. But unfortunately, we lost in the closest race in the country. Now, Dad’s running again – and I know he’s going to win in 2024. But the attacks from Boebert and her allies have already started... His campaign has set a goal of raising another $75,000 before midnight tonight, and I wanted to send an email to see if you could chip in to help Dad defeat Lauren Boebert. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Dad and I have already started driving our pickup truck around the district again to meet with voters. He cares so much about our state and our district. I know he’ll be an incredible congressman. Thanks, Felix ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

December 11, 2023 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio
---
|
---
# Three Things to Know This Week:
---
1. Matt Dolan champions Ohio’s conservative values in new TV ad.

2. Matt Dolan wishes Jewish Community a Happy Hanukkah.

3. Matt Dolan continues to call out national security crisis on America’s southern border

---
# Get up to speed...

_**In latest television ad, Matt Dolan demonstrates his commitment to fighting for conservative**_
_**values in Ohio.**_
* In his latest television ad, Matt Dolan highlighted the most critical issues facing Ohio and his strong record of conservative results.

* Matt emphasized the necessity to fight to protect life, preserve the Second Amendment, secure the border and ensure Ohioans keep more of their hard-earned money.

* Dolan has continued to lead the primary field in conservative accomplishments, advertising and cash on hand.

** _Matt Dolan wishes Jewish Community a Happy Hanukkah._
**
* Matt Dolan extended warm wishes to the Jewish Community in Ohio and throughout the world to mark the beginning of Hanukkah.

* This year’s Hanukkah celebration comes with the backdrop of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, for which no candidate has offered stronger support for the Israeli people than Matt Dolan.

* ICYMI: Amid his [unwavering support for Israel,](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=4d8faec9fd2d419fa29b693da50b9bfc&_e=cYq0WYsQ0N3-DLvtmdCgebYqHh3U6PfPAqB5sxx34besrEwbCvM32P2ywwU2O-LVeUcrJe8D007gAY_XMgkE7iwNpUisKrulKiNDWELSoijtO_ggXs6gHK8nUqUsEfASiiSBBeHSmL4NU0VP-9PZwFDhjOeadF4Gs4Slknfh9hVu1FseMRD2Ql6nrrIH2LRJ-wsbSgDBINATWmzD-ijuOvKfW3dRVFiVbOvua2oXNM19MLHGyJeXwmWOamXqD5KOCiamRxOunCiwrinfNcrYDziIvgy_hVgnjeOAvxSGkzjDjKv5yY2W4zZ_bwjOF3hU) Matt Dolan has also [stood up to fight Big Tech censorship of conservative voices](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=4d8faec9fd2d419fa29b693da50b9bfc&_e=cYq0WYsQ0N3-DLvtmdCgebYqHh3U6PfPAqB5sxx34bdgCUOlwPYQ51ui19Id4U2uFBKYXrjXsLORS1_c9hlFoaYxFJMr0GfQxnJvoVH1EOHcIFzOfqNWcPwT_2el3ch3P-oFJ6W1d3oJFdYyanEDVcwnC6NGfvYndMMQIxV7XnaeRql_m8X_K5FCUpKlmlDapP_hHrO5U_xwqiBCSm0Vb421CY5AeoY9weUZVyae7wSf2Fh0d9arDheunPGz8r-0GDcAAjloIcNxzbPCL2XiEyBhZ_mwp1Nvg5vTzLzxhXNhebtXtqmI0T8bamh_Ns6H) after his pro-Israel op-ed was suppressed by X as “violent speech.”

| | [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=4d8faec9fd2d419fa29b693da50b9bfc&_e=cYq0WYsQ0N3-DLvtmdCgecH_KtmaqMNsQyoh4LADg4rXzi_UXFPDo9WDBGpMpWrPCr3N4vIp0jcZixawtQ2EmSiYC-hWuCwraNMEwAGAqurgNhV7DExZJVL4AdHMSnZ5_KAtLbqQexwz6BrhWEV8iar__yWcf21Sx5LU0IFkkfjLo9q9lx6z8xFwU3bz3A_pusqc18IDl7d-67J6IvQ_vQOC3_G6ziKSbTcYK0DKaicG_tg24zZbmuUoqYkN7lqvmj4jgkPBcCYbAgsYnXg5Kl5789QrbY6ZCmDqariUHnwhYNSLMCd_-1cYdx34sQpz)
---
| | |
---
**As Joe Biden and Sherrod Brown refuse to address the problem, Matt Dolan continues to call out crisis at America’s southern border.**
* U.S. Customs and Border Protection has reported that nearly 250,000 people illegally crossed into the United States last month – the highest November on record.

* Matt Dolan has remained laser-focused on securing the border from Day One, which included visiting the border earlier this year with Ohio law enforcement leaders to see the problem first-hand.

“Sherrod Brown downplays the border crisis,” Dolan said. “Ohio needs a U.S. Senator who will work to secure the border and protect our communities. Sherrod Brown hasn't done it. I will.”

This week, the campaign trail featured: The Ohio Republican Party State Dinner, where Matt proudly welcomed special guests, East Palestine Mayor Trent Conaway and Findlay Mayor Christina Muryn; Talking to voters in Northeast Ohio at Maumee Bay Brewing Company; Supporting the strong slate of principled conservative leaders with Cuyahoga County Republican Party Vice Chairwoman Ebony Grantonz; Visiting the Hancock County GOP First Friday event in Findlay with County Sheriff and proud endorser Mike Heldman; And catching up with fellow legislative and county party colleagues at holiday gatherings in Cuyahoga, Geauga, Trumbull, Mahoning and Warren counties.

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=744%2E52803%2E4KZAay)

| | Hi Peter, I hope you enjoyed your weekend! With only a few weeks until the end of the year, my team and I are putting together our plan to address the issues that matter most to Marylanders in this race for Senate. _It’s critical that we address the climate crisis, protect peoples’ fundamental rights, defend democracy, tackle rising costs for families... there’s so much to do._ **That’s why I’m hoping to get your feedback:[Would you be able to spare a quick minute to rank the priorities you’d like to see addressed in 2024?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_231211_EN_IssuesSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=7&akid=744%2E52803%2E4KZAay)** | | | [Rank the Issues >>](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_231211_EN_IssuesSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=8&akid=744%2E52803%2E4KZAay)
---
What is the most important issue to you, Peter?
Is your top issue reproductive rights, the economy, affordable housing, or perhaps student debt relief?
There are a lot of issues that need to be faced head-on, and I promise you that I’ll do everything I can to deliver for Marylanders.
**[But your input will help my team and I craft our campaign messaging and connect with voters in every corner of Maryland. Could you please let us know what issues matter most to you and your family?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_231211_EN_IssuesSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=9&akid=744%2E52803%2E4KZAay)**
| | [Take Our Survey >>](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/sign/EM_BS_AAL_231211_EN_IssuesSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=10&akid=744%2E52803%2E4KZAay)
---
Thanks, Peter!
—Angela Alsobrooks

body:
|
#
Peter — Donald Trump and the GOP are committed to ending the _Affordable Care Act,_ leaving millions of Americans without affordable healthcare. On the other hand, President Biden has worked tirelessly with our Senate Democratic majority, and in return, we’ve been able to lower the cost of prescriptions and expand affordable healthcare options. [**Over 16 million Americans rely on the ACA. Our Democratic majority will always stand up for accessible healthcare for everyone. Will you sign on right now to support protecting the**** _Affordable Care Act?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74999196/443281391/-1121714173?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGQxZmUyNy03Zjk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUGy8Xa4AeL2CydhHpOv0wNgtRLEH_Dwg5itgbO6fdY=&emci=c5c17c52-7498-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=f0d1fe27-7f98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=23190490) | | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74999197/443281392/-1121714173?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGQxZmUyNy03Zjk4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUGy8Xa4AeL2CydhHpOv0wNgtRLEH_Dwg5itgbO6fdY=&emci=c5c17c52-7498-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=f0d1fe27-7f98-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=23190490)

name: Tommy Vietor
subject: Bob Casey won’t win without our support.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, it’s Tommy Vietor with a hard truth: **We need to keep PA’s Senate seat blue in order to hold our Democratic majority, and Bob Casey might not win without our support.**
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231211-2?refcode=em20231211-2&refcode2=1355_552475_jGklWU&akid=1355%2E552475%2EjGklWU)**
Bob’s Connecticut-based opponent, David McCormick, is a mega-millionaire who is going to try to buy PA’s Senate seat with his personal fortune.
McCormick supports an extreme abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. It’s disgusting, and we can’t put him in a position of power.
PA is sure to see tons of GOP outside spending to get the wrong guy elected. Last year, McConnell's super PAC spent over 35 million in lobbyist dollars to buy ads in Pennsylvania. They’re desperate for a win in PA, so this time around, they’re sure to spend even more to finish the job.
[**That means we need to show up for Bob Casey. Chip in to help keep the majority out of Mitch McConnell’s hands >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231211-2?refcode=em20231211-2&refcode2=1355_552475_jGklWU&akid=1355%2E552475%2EjGklWU)
**[Keep Pennsylvania Blue ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231211-2?refcode=em20231211-2&refcode2=1355_552475_jGklWU&akid=1355%2E552475%2EjGklWU)**
Bob needs our support. Thanks for being on his team.
Tommy
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231211-2?refcode=em20231211-2&refcode2=1355_552475_jGklWU&akid=1355%2E552475%2EjGklWU)
Tommy Vietor
Co-host of Pod Save America
Former Spokesman for President Obama

clean_body: Peter, it’s Tommy Vietor with a hard truth: We need to keep PA’s Senate seat blue in order to hold our Democratic majority, and Bob Casey might not win without our support. Bob’s Connecticut-based opponent, David McCormick, is a mega-millionaire who is going to try to buy PA’s Senate seat with his personal fortune. McCormick supports an extreme abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. It’s disgusting, and we can’t put him in a position of power. PA is sure to see tons of GOP outside spending to get the wrong guy elected. Last year, McConnell's super PAC spent over 35 million in lobbyist dollars to buy ads in Pennsylvania. They’re desperate for a win in PA, so this time around, they’re sure to spend even more to finish the job. Bob needs our support. Thanks for being on his team. Tommy Tommy Vietor Co-host of Pod Save America Former Spokesman for President Obama

| | _MSNBC_
**"Trump vows to repeal healthcare for millions"**
"Former president Donald Trump is making renewed calls to **repeal the Affordable Care Act should he be re-elected in 2024."**

The ACA created a path for coverage for millions of Americans. Brian knows it's time to build on that legacy, not destroy it. If elected to Congress, he will continue to bring down drug costs and expand opportunities for those still in search of affordable solutions.
